title: Sales-Focused Virtual Assistant (Strong Closer with Admin Skills)
description:
Sales-Focused Virtual Assistant (Strong Closer with Admin Skills) – U.S. Cleaning Business



We are hiring a SALES-ORIENTED Virtual Assistant who knows how to confidently handle objections and close deals over the phone. You’ll be the first point of contact for leads interested in our U.S.-based cleaning services, and your MAIN GOAL is to convert those inquiries into paying customers.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in sales conversations, knows how to build trust quickly, and doesn’t shy away from tough questions or hesitations from prospects.



Key Responsibilities:

Take inbound sales calls from interested leads and follow up with outbound calls when needed



Confidently pitch our services and walk customers through pricing and packages



Handle common objections (pricing, scheduling, trust concerns) with professionalism and ease



Convert warm leads into scheduled jobs with a consistent close rate



Manage CRM updates, lead tracking, and post-call notes



Assist with scheduling, follow-up
s, and basic administrative tasks



Maintain excellent customer service before, during, and after the sale





What We're Looking For:

Fluent in English with strong conversational skills. Must have strong command over the English language



Proven ability to overcome objections and close sales on calls



Comfortable talking to U.S. customers and building rapport quickly



Detail-oriented with solid administrative follow-through



Able to work independently and take initiative without constant supervision



Experience with cleaning or home services (preferred but not required)





Technical Requirements:

Minimum 30 Mbps wired Internet connection



Quiet, professional work environment with no background noise



Backup Internet and device for emergencies



Compensation & Hours:

$5–$5.50 per hour (depending on experience)



Full-time role



Must be available during U.S. business hours (Central time)



To Apply:

Submit a resume

Submit a short video message  (with camera on) describing your experience with handling objections and closing sales over the phone. Real examples or metrics from past roles are a plus. Also explain why you think you'll be a top sales person for a cleaning business in Dallas TX

title: IT & Systems Administrator
description:
Apply through the following link: 



About the Company

We are a California-based company operating in the environmental health and safety (EHS) industry. With over 35 years in business, we are a stable, established organization that values consistency, clear processes, and the people who keep things running well behind the scenes.





Schedule Note

This role follows California business hours (PST/PDT), which means your shift will be approximately 1:00 AM – 10:00 AM Philippine time (shifting to 2:00 AM – 11:00 AM during daylight saving). Weekends are always off. The schedule is fixed and predictable — no rotating shifts, no surprise overtime.

We're upfront about this because it's a real consideration. If you've worked a graveyard shift before and found it suits your lifestyle, this role offers the stability and long-term security that makes it worthwhile.





About the Role

We're looking for a careful, methodical tech generalist to own our digital operations day-to-day. This is a stable, long-term role with a clear scope — not a chaotic environment where priorities change hourly.

You'll manage the platforms our team relies on, build automations that actually last, document everything you learn, and troubleshoot issues with patience and precision. Most work is independent; you'll have a senior tech lead to collaborate with on bigger initiatives but won't need constant supervision.





What You'll Own

•    Systems & Platforms — Become the resident expert on our core tools: Microsoft 365 (Teams, SharePoint, Power Automate), WordPress, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, FileMaker, and Dialpad. Handle configurations, updates, and improvements with attention to detail.

•    Automation — Identify repetitive processes and build reliable, well-documented automations that the team will actually use long-term.

•    Documentation — Write SOPs, troubleshooting guides, and process docs. Record training videos. Build the knowledge base that keeps operations consistent.

•    Tech Support & Troubleshooting — Diagnose real problems at the root level — not just surface symptoms — and guide teammates to lasting solutions via chat, call, or screen share.

•    Infrastructure & Systems Management — Maintain and monitor the underlying systems, networks, and environments that keep operations running reliably.

•    Security & Access — Manage user accounts, permissions, and passwords. Keep systems organized before issues arise.







What We're Looking For

•    You learn tools deeply — real expertise, not surface familiarity

•    Documentation comes naturally to you; it's how you ensure quality

•    You work well independently with a defined scope and clear direction

•    You're methodical: you'd rather fully understand a problem than rush a fix

•    You troubleshoot systematically — you trace problems to their root cause, not just the surface symptom

•    You have hands-on experience with tech infrastructure — networks, systems, user environments, or cloud-based setups

•    Stable, predictable work — even at odd hours — suits you better than daytime chaos



Why This Role Stands Out

•    Fixed schedule — same hours every day, no rotating shifts

•    Weekends always off — no exceptions

•    Long-term stability — permanent role, not project-based

•    160 hours/month — full-time, consistent workload

•    Deep ownership — you'll go deep on our systems, not bounce between tasks

•    Calm environment — established team, defined processes, no daily fire drills







Benefits

•    Paid leaves — we provide paid time off so you can rest and recharge without worrying about lost income

•    Paid California public holidays — you will be paid on all California public holidays

•    Stable, long-term engagement — this is not a project-based or contractual role; we're looking for someone to grow with us







Minimum Requirements

•    Bachelor's degree in any field (4-year course), preferably IT, Computer Science, or a related discipline

•    At least 2 years of experience in tech support, IT administration, or infrastructure management

•    Proven troubleshooting experience — hardware, software, network, or systems level

•    Solid Microsoft 365 experience (Teams, SharePoint, Power Automate)

•    Ability to work California business hours (graveyard shift, PH time)





Bonus Points

•    Experience with HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, WordPress, FileMaker, or Dialpad

•    Background in network administration, cloud infrastructure, or endpoint management

•    Experience with process documentation or SOP writing

•    Prior experience in a remote, US-based work setup







How to Apply

Submit a cover letter (300–500 words) addressing the following:

1.    Describe a tech infrastructure or systems problem you troubleshot — what was the issue, how did you diagnose it, and what was the outcome

2.    Walk us through a platform or system you managed and maintained — what tools were involved and how did you ensure it ran reliably

3.    Share an example where your documentation or SOPs made a real difference to a team or process

4.    Describe how you have handled security and access management — how do you manage user accounts, permissions, and passwords, and what does your workflow look like when onboarding or offboarding a user

5.    Walk us through how you approach tech infrastructure — how do you monitor, maintain, and flag issues before they become problems

6.    Why this role appeals to you, and confirm whether you are comfortable working California business hours (graveyard shift, PH time)



Attach your resume along with your cover letter. We review both, but we're more interested in how you think and work than in job titles.

title: Recruiting & HR Virtual Assistant — Hiring Lead / Executive Assistant
description:
Clean Buddies is a fast-growing, family-owned post-construction cleaning company based in Phoenix, Arizona. We are the post-construction crew that builders, contractors, and luxury homeowners call when a job needs to be turned over move-in ready. We've cleaned 5M+ square feet, run 6 days a week, and we are scaling our team — which is where you come in.



We are hiring a full-time Virtual Assistant to be the hiring engine and right hand to our leadership. This is NOT a "do a little of everything" task VA role. Recruiting and hiring is the core of the job. If you love the work of finding great people, running interviews, and building a team — keep reading.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN (60–70% of the role):

RECRUITING & HIRING

- Source candidates on OnlineJobs.ph, Indeed, LinkedIn, and other platforms

- Write and post job ads for cleaners, office staff, and other roles

- Review applications and resumes; screen out unqualified candidates

- Send outreach messages and
s to passive candidates

- Schedule interviews and manage the candidate calendar

- Run first-round phone/Zoom interviews using our scripts

- Reference checks, background check coordination, and onboarding paperwork

- Keep our applicant tracking spreadsheet/system clean and up to date

- Build pipelines so we always have qualified candidates ready



WHAT ELSE YOU'LL HANDLE (30–40% of the role):

HR & ADMIN

- Employee onboarding and offboarding

- Maintain HR records, employee files, and basic compliance docs

- Help draft policies, SOPs, and training materials

- Track time-off requests and basic HR coordination

EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / ADMIN

- Calendar and inbox management for the owner

- Data entry, document organization, and follow-ups

- Light vendor and customer communication when needed

- Other admin projects as they come up



WHO YOU ARE:

- 1+ years of recruiting, HR, or talent acquisition experience (running interviews, not just scheduling)

- Excellent written and spoken English (C1/C2)

- Confident on the phone and on Zoom — you'll be talking to candidates

- Highly organized, detail-obsessed, and follow-through is your default

- Comfortable working independently with weekly check-ins

- Reliable internet, quiet workspace, working webcam and headset

- Long-term mindset — we want someone who grows with us



NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience hiring for US-based companies

- Experience hiring blue-collar / field service roles (cleaners, technicians, drivers)

- Familiarity with Google Workspace, Slack, and basic spreadsheets

- Experience with applicant tracking systems or HR software



SCHEDULE:

- Full-time, ~40 hours/week

- Monday–Friday with some overlap with US Mountain Time business hours (we'll work out a schedule that's reasonable for you)



COMPENSATION:

- $3–$9/hour USD depending on experience

- Paid time off and holidays after probation

- Performance raises — we reward people who do great work

- Long-term role with real growth as we expand



TO APPLY:

Please reply with:

1. The subject line "I'm Your Clean Buddies Recruiter — [Your Name]"

2. A short paragraph on the most challenging hiring/recruiting project you've worked on and what made it hard

3. How many candidates you've personally interviewed (rough number is fine)

4. Your expected hourly rate

5. A 1–2 minute Loom or video introduction (optional but strongly preferred)



Applications without the subject line will be skipped — it's our first filter for attention to detail.



We're excited to meet you.

— The Clean Buddies Team

title: Urgent: Product Research & Sourcing Expert (Remote)
description:
At Orca Brands, we specialize in creating high-performance beauty and wellness tools designed to make a real impact. From advanced skincare to haircare technology, our products are backed by science and built for results. Sold both direct-to-consumer and via Amazon, our brand is trusted by women worldwide. As we continue to grow, we're looking for a strategic Product Research & Sourcing Expert with a marketing mindset to help us scale and innovate faster.



Job Summary

We’re seeking a Product Research & Sourcing Expert who is not only experienced in supplier and manufacturing coordination, but also has a strong grasp of brand positioning, consumer trends, and marketing strategy. In this role, you’ll work closely with cross-functional teams to source products and packaging that align with our Unique Selling Propositions (USPs) and meet evolving market demands.



Primary Duties and Responsibilities:

Product & R&D Timeline Management: Maintain an always-updated product development snapshot to monitor manufacturing status and proactively avoid delays.

Pretotyping & Trend Scouting: Collaborate with factories to explore new product categories and innovations that support product-market fit and deliver fresh USPs.

Quality Control Coordination: Ensure quality standards are met and sustained through consistent communication with suppliers and product testing.

Sourcing & Procurement: Identify and vet new suppliers, source competitive quotes, negotiate MOQ, pricing, and lead times.

Packaging & Brand Alignment: Source packaging that enhances brand perception and strengthens product USPs through aesthetics and functionality.

Spec Sheet & Tech Pack Oversight: Work with factories to maintain up-to-date product documentation, including part numbers, materials, and contract terms.

Cost Optimization: Track and manage per-part pricing and production efficiency without compromising quality or brand positioning.

Collaborate with Marketing: Work with product and marketing teams to ensure sourced products clearly communicate their value proposition and unique benefits.



Qualifications:

2–5 years experience in sourcing, preferably in beauty, wellness, or consumer electronics

Familiar with Chinese and Asian suppliers, Alibaba, 1688, and related platforms

Marketing background or strong understanding of product positioning and USP development

Experience working with DTC brands or Amazon sellers is a strong plus

Strong written and spoken English; Mandarin is a bonus

High attention to detail; process-driven and self-managed

Excellent communication, negotiation, and supplier relationship skills

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growth-focused environment



What We Offer:

Competitive salary – earn in USD

Health coverage (HMO) – after one year

Paid time off – we believe in work-life balance

Global exposure – work with a diverse and innovative team



Explore Our Brands

title: Setup Specialist (Applicants must hold a Bachelor degree in Finance, Economics, Business, Accounting)

 message:

title: Jr. Account Executive | Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company
description:
Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Experience Level: Entry-Level (with or without experience)

Base pay of Php 19,715.00 – Php 28,600.00 + monthly performance-based incentives



We are a growing U.S.-based mortgage company looking for a Jr. Account Executive to join our team. This role is not just administrative. You will be responsible for supporting loan operations while also helping drive business growth through outbound calling, lead generation, and relationship building with broker partners.



This position is ideal for fresh graduates or early-career professionals who are confident communicators, proactive, and comfortable speaking with people, following up consistently, and building long-term professional relationships.



Key Responsibilities



Conduct outbound cold calls to prospective and existing broker partners

Perform lead generation and outreach to grow our broker network

Build and maintain strong relationships with external broker partners

Follow up consistently with brokers to drive submissions and loan volume

Assist brokers and loan processors in collecting, reviewing, and organizing borrower documents

Coordinate with brokers, processors, and internal teams throughout the loan process

Follow up on missing documents, conditions, and outstanding requirements

Upload and manage files in the loan origination system

Ensure all documents are complete, accurate, and properly labeled

Maintain file notes, status updates, and internal records

Communicate updates between underwriting, processing, sales teams, and broker partners

Help keep loan files on track to meet turnaround timelines



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, or related field is a plus but not required

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Comfortable with cold calling and outbound communication

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

Proactive, reliable, and results-driven

Basic knowledge of Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

Willingness to learn U.S. mortgage processes (training will be provided)



Specific Requirements



Reliable high-speed internet connection

Backup internet or data plan (mobile hotspot or secondary ISP)

Quiet and professional work environment

Willingness to work full-time during U.S. business hours (PST), equivalent to 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time



Nice to Have



Experience in BPO, sales, lead generation, or customer service

Experience in cold calling or outbound sales

Familiarity with U.S. mortgage terms and loan process

Experience working with brokers or in relationship-based roles



Why join us?



Base pay of Php 19,715 – Php 28,600 with salary progression plus performance-based incentives

Opportunity to grow into a sales or Account Executive role

Paid training and continuous support provided

Supportive and collaborative team environment

Long-term remote role with career growth potential

Exposure to real-world U.S. mortgage operations and business development



How to Apply



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions below carefully.



Submit your updated resume in PDF format or as a link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or OLJ profile)

If submitting a link, make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view”

Include your relevant experience (Mortgage, Sales, BPO, Admin, or Customer Service)

Include your expected monthly salary in PHP

Include your earliest start date or availability



Please also answer the following questions in your application:



Are you aware that the working schedule is 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time, and are you able to work consistently during these hours?

Are you comfortable making outbound calls during this schedule?

Do you have a quiet and dedicated workspace suitable for calls?

What experience do you have with cold calling or outbound sales? Please briefly describe your role and results.



Important



Start your application with this exact line: “I have read the job post from beginning to end.”



Shortlisted Candidates



Will be asked to submit a speedtest (at least 100 MBPS required; screenshot from speedtest.net)

Will provide computer specifications (16 GB RAM and processor)

Will answer short scenario-based questions



Note



Only applicants who follow the instructions above will be prioritized for review



We are looking for reliable and motivated individuals who are serious about building a long-term career in both mortgage operations and business development. If that sounds like you, apply now. We review applications daily.

title: Customer Service Representative (Ecommerce Brand)
description:
Customer Support Representative (DTC E-Commerce)



We’re a fast-growing DTC eCommerce brand looking for a sharp, reliable Customer Support Rep to manage day-to-day support and keep our customers happy.



You’ll be handling support tickets primarily through Gmail, resolving issues quickly and professionally across areas like refunds, subscription cancellations, and order tracking. This role requires someone who can think on their feet, communicate clearly, and take full ownership of customer issues from start to finish.



What we’re looking for:

We’re looking for someone who moves fast, pays attention to detail, and takes pride in delivering a great customer experience.

title: FT USA Career Supporting Our Realtor Customers: Proof/Edit Flyers, Phone/Email support. 13th Mo. & Insurance
description:
APPLICATION DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT FRIDAY MAY 8, 2026 (USA CALIFORNIA TIME)



Are you an experienced remote worker with strong spoken AND written business English, ready to communicate directly with USA real estate agents by
 and phone?



Do you have prior experience speaking with US clients on the phone, and writing succinct and professional customer support
s?



Want a Full Time shift with real career growth at a SILICON VALLEY company, with training and promotions to higher-paid work?



This is NOT a data-entry-only role. We are looking for one or two VAs ready to handle a FULL RANGE of USA customer support — proofreading and editing real estate marketing flyers, composing
s to answer realtor questions, making and answering phone calls with realtors, and working in our CRM. Strong candidates will grow into senior support roles quickly.



=== IF INTERESTED, PLEASE READ THIS ENTIRE JOB POST ===





=== WHAT OUR 5+ YEARS FILIPINO VAS SAY ABOUT US ===



"This company understands the importance of work-life balance and that is what they've given me since I started working with them. They value and care about their employees. My manager consistently checks if my work hours are working for my situation and always grants me time off for quite a few personal affairs. They also make sure I get paid on time."



"Communication is key and they are very open and easy to communicate with. They treat you as partners. They are also very hands on when it comes to training. Their systematic ladder of promotion in terms of tasks and responsibilities made it easy for me to adjust and advance faster. This is a company where your feedback is also valued. I have only been working for them for 10 months but have received 3 raises already. I see myself working and growing here for many more years to come."



A small example of our values: last year we surprised all our PH VAs with a modest but unexpected 8,800 peso bonus before Undas simply because we value family gatherings and remembrance. 





=== ABOUT PAY, HOURS, BENEFITS ===



START PAY: $5 USD per hour (or higher depending on experience and ability). Candidates with demonstrated strong USA real estate customer support experience (phone +
) can soon earn meaningfully more.



For full-time 40 hours/week, that's $865/month, PLUS these benefits:



* EXTRA $60/month insurance reimbursement after first 3 month probation (we don't ask for receipts or proof of insurance)

* PAID 13th Month in early December (a full extra month's pay each year)

* TIME OFF for all PH holidays 

* PAID regular holidays after first 6 months

* PAID BREAKS: After your first 3 month probation you get a 1 hour paid break per shift. Taking at least 1 hour of break per full shift is required, you can split it up however you like (most VAs do something like 3 breaks of 15 + 30 + 15 minutes). Taking longer or more breaks (enjoy dinner with your family) is never a problem if you work out coverage with other on-duty staff. 



VAs who excel earn meaningful raises every 3-6 months during their first year. Our path from starting pay to senior support pay is real and well-traveled by our current team.



We pay EVERY two weeks, on-time, without fail. We use Wise (formerly TransferWise) and WE PAY their currency conversion fees.



FULL TIME 40 hours/week



SHIFT START TIMES (USA CALIFORNIA TIME): all shifts start 7am, 7:30am, OR 8am. We support USA real estate agents during their business hours.



REQUIRED WORK DAYS: Thursday and Friday 8 hours shifts are required (our busiest days). You pick the other days you prefer for your 40 hours per week.



WEEKEND SHIFTS ARE 100% OPTIONAL: One thing our USA realtors love about us is our weekend customer support. So VAs who include a half-day or full-day Saturday and/or a half-day Sunday shift in their preferences receive some preferential hiring consideration.



NICE SPLIT-SHIFT FLEXIBILITY: Many of our VAs are parents/spouses with mid-shift family obligations. We're flexible about splitting shifts — for example, working 7am-12pm + 2pm-6pm California time instead of a continuous 7am-4pm. We let our VA team work out the specific schedules among themselves; our only requirement is that we have at least one VA coveringeach part of the full 7am-5pm California period. Tell us in your application if you'd appreciate split-shift flexibility and what hours would work best for you, and we'll work it out with you and the team.





=== WHAT YOU WILL ACTUALLY DO ===



* MOSTLY
 & CRM, SOME PHONE. We mostly rely on
 to support our USA realtor customers, but VAs do take or make several phone calls per day with customers to confirm details or resolve order issues. VAs typically spend about 45-60 minutes on the phone per shift, so a phone-friendly work setup is essential.



* Proofread and edit real estate flyers (ads realtors want us to publish) against dozens of guidelines — for example: descriptive titles, has both interior AND exterior photos, property details match online info, proper formatting. Part of the job is learning when an exception to a guideline is appropriate and when it is not - and learning to ASK a manager when you are unsure... for example a first-time customer might get a little extra leeway in some areas. This is judgment work, not just checking boxes.



* Compose short, clear
s answering specific agent questions. Often the trick is figuring out what the agent is ACTUALLY asking. For example, an agent might write "how do I upload my video?" when what they really need is help adding a virtual tour link to their flyer. You need to decipher the real question before you answer.



* Work in our CRM to communicate with customers and keep contact and order data up to date.



* Conduct web research to double-check property details.



* Communicate constantly with your team via our internal chat system. Our team relies heavily on real-time chat to ensure seamless support for our busy realtor customers. That means logging issues, questions, and updates as they happen so the next VA on shift can pick up where you left off.





=== JOB REQUIREMENTS ===



* FLUENT spoken English from the perspective of a USA real estate agent. Clear pronunciation, natural conversational rhythm, no heavy accent that requires the agent to ask you to repeat.



* FLUENT written English that is succinct and professional. You can compose business
s WITHOUT common errors such as "kindly revert back," "discuss about," "regarding to," "for your perusal," wrong verb tense, or template-style phrasing. Your writing should sound like a sharp, professional American assistant wrote it. Concise and direct.



* JUDGMENT. Many of our proofing guidelines have legitimate exceptions for different situations. We need someone who can think, not just match patterns.



* TEAM COMMUNICATION. We need good communicators who understand the importance of keeping team chat/notes up-to-date about issues and questions in real time.



* Prior phone experience with USA customers, clients, or professionals (not just BPO script-reading). Tell us how many years and what kind of customers.



* Some USA real estate familiarity is strongly preferred — you should know terms like MLS, escrow, listing agent, buyer's agent, pending, contingent, CMA, open house, virtual tour. We will train on our specific systems.



* Composure with stressed or blunt customers. Most of our customers are upbeat and relaxed, but real estate agents work on commission and sometimes call when a deal is on the line. If they are brusque once in a while you don't take it personally; you solve the problem.



* CRM experience preferred (we built our own, but let us know what you're familiar with).



If offered a position, you will be an independent contractor and we will need a signed W-8BEN and a copy of your government ID before you start work.





=== YOUR TECHNOLOGY & ENVIRONMENT ===



* Reliable at-home internet (wired preferred) and a computer suitable for full-time professional work

* QUIET workspace suitable for taking and making phone calls during USA business hours — no roosters, traffic, dogs barking, family noise, or construction audible on calls

* Good quality headset with clear microphone

* Backup power and/or backup internet is a plus, given how often storms knock out service in the PH



If your home environment is not good for business phone calls, this is not the right role for you.



== VERY IMPORTANT - HOW TO APPLY - WE DISCARD APPLICATIONS THAT IGNORE THIS SECTION ==



1. SPEAKPIPE VOICE MESSAGE — record a voice message up to 2 or 3 minutes at our voice inbox at:

   



   In the Speakpipe NAME field, type: JOB2605A FIRSTNAME LASTNAME (same format as your
 subject line, below). Voi
s without "JOB2605A" in the name field are deleted unheard.



   In your voice message: 



   (a) State your full name clearly at the start so we can match your voi
 to your
 application. 



   (b) Then answer two quick questions: "Tell me about a time a customer was upset on the phone or in writing, and what you did about it" AND "What did you like best and least about a current or recent job?"



   Just talk normally, it's not a rehearsed sales pitch.



2. In your
 to us, describe your most recent work experience in detail. Please tell me about the actual work you did, NOT just a list of skills. INCLUDE YOUR COMPENSATION HISTORY FOR EACH JOB THE PAST 3 YEARS: HOURS/WEEK AND USD $/HOUR.



3. In your

 to us, state your current shift preferences in CALIFORNIA TIMEZONE: (a) Your preferred start and end times — continuous 7am-4pm or 8am-5pm, OR a split shift (one possible example: 7am-12pm + 2pm-5pm).  to us, confirm your home environment is QUIET and suitable for phone calls during USA business hours.  me start your

 won't go to spam.

Mr Parker

title: Guest Communications Co-Host (Experienced Only | On-Demand + Weekend On-Call)
description:
Guest Communications Co-Host (Experienced Only | On-Demand + Weekend On-Call)



Company: Vivid Vacation Rentals

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Part-Time / On-Demand (Max 10 hrs/week)



Who This Is For



This role is for a seasoned Airbnb Co-Host or hospitality professional.



You already know how to:



Communicate clearly and professionally with guests

Manage multiple conversations in real time

Respond quickly and accurately without delays



If you do not have direct Airbnb or hospitality experience, this role is not a fit.



Role Overview



You will own guest communication and experience across our U.S.-based vacation rental portfolio.



This is an on-demand role, not a fixed shift.



Work is based on:



Daily arrivals and departures

Guest communication flow

Being available and highly responsive during key windows and on-call periods

How the Role Works

Daily Execution (Typically 1–2 Hours)

Review arrivals and departures

Send required guest messages

Respond to active conversations

Peak Communication Windows (U.S. Mountain Time – Critical)



You must be highly responsive during:



6:00 AM – 10:00 AM

4:00 PM – 7:00 PM (check-in window)

Weekend After-Hours On-Call (Required)

Friday, Saturday, Sunday (U.S. time)

On-call for:

6:01 PM – 9:59 AM (Mountain Time)



You are not expected to work continuously—but must be available and responsive.



Response Standard (Non-Negotiable)



All guest messages must receive a complete and accurate response within 5 minutes of receipt.



Not 6 minutes

Not 5 minutes + delay

Not a placeholder or acknowledgment



The guest must receive a real answer within 5 minutes.



If escalation is required, it must happen immediately with a clear and confident response.



Core Responsibilities

1. Guest Communication (Primary)

Manage messaging across:

Airbnb

VRBO

 and messaging platforms

Handle:

Booking inquiries

Reservation questions

Pre-arrival and in-stay communication

Guest issues and coordination

2. Proactive Guest Experience



Send personalized messages (not automated):



2 Days After Check-In

Day Before Departure

3. Arrival Coordination

Send check-in instructions and access details

Support guests during arrival window

4. Issue Triage & Escalation

Respond immediately to guest issues

Escalate appropriately when needed

Boundaries (Phase 1)

No payment processing

No refunds or financial decisions

No pricing or rate management

Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Airbnb Co-Host or hospitality experience

Strong written English

Fast response capability

High attention to detail

Comfortable with on-demand and on-call work

Equipment & Internet Requirements (Strict)

Laptop (required)

Smartphone (required)

Minimum 50 Mbps down / 20 Mbps up

Backup internet required



Provide:



Speed test screenshot via Speedtest by Ookla

Short screen recording

Compensation

Base Salary: $250 – $300/month

Performance Bonus: $100 – $150/month

Pay Schedule

Paid bi-weekly (every two weeks)

Base salary is split across pay periods

Performance bonus is evaluated and paid each pay period, if earned

Performance & Bonus Structure

Base covers availability and execution

Bonus requires 100% compliance, including:

All messages responded to within 5 minutes

Zero missed messages

Accurate, complete responses



Any missed message or delayed response results in:

???? Loss of bonus for that pay period



Repeated performance issues will result in removal from the role.



Growth Opportunity

Increased hours during peak seasons

Expanded responsibilities based on performance

How to Apply



Include:



Your Airbnb/hospitality experience

Sample response to:

Guest can’t find property at 5:30 PM

Speed test + recording

Confirmation you:

Meet 5-minute response standard

Can work on-demand + on-call



Start your application with: “VIVID”



Final Note



We are not hiring general VAs.



We are hiring someone who:



Moves fast

Communicates clearly

Takes ownership



If you cannot consistently respond within 5 minutes with real answers, this role is not a fit.

description:

We're looking for a dynamic and tenacious Digital PR Pitch Specialist to join our team. s.

title: Professional Video Editor + ElevenLabs AI Specialist for Ad Video
description:
I recently filmed a professional ad video for my company, Home Service Blueprint, and I’m looking for an experienced video editor who can help turn it into a polished, high-converting video.



I need someone who can review my raw video, make strong cuts where needed, improve the pacing, and help shape the video into the style I’m looking for. I will provide a reference video/link so you can see the exact type of editing style, pacing, captions, visuals, and overall feel I want.



This project may also require ElevenLabs, so you must be experienced with ElevenLabs voice tools, AI voice creation, dubbing, voice cleanup, or voice enhancement.



This first project will be for 2 videos. If the first project goes well, this can turn into ongoing paid video editing work.



Responsibilities:



* Edit 2 professional ad videos for Home Service Blueprint

* Review the reference video/link and match the editing style as closely as possible

* Make clean cuts and improve the pacing of the video

* Add professional captions, graphics, music, b-roll, and transitions where needed

* Use ElevenLabs for AI voice, dubbing, voice enhancement, or voice creation

* Help create polished ads that feel professional, clear, and engaging

* Make sure the final videos are suitable for social media ads and online marketing

* Follow creative direction carefully and communicate clearly throughout the project



Requirements:



* Strong experience editing professional ad videos

* Expert knowledge of ElevenLabs

* Experience with AI video/audio tools

* Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, captions, hooks, and ad structure

* Ability to match a reference video style

* Experience editing videos for Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube, or online ads

* Must be reliable, detail-oriented, and able to complete revisions quickly

* Must be able to show examples of previous video editing work



Reference Video:

I will provide a reference link showing the exact style I want. Please review the link and let me know if you can create a similar version using my video.



Video Url: 







How to Apply:

Please send the following:



1. Your video editing portfolio

2. Examples of ad videos you’ve edited

3. Examples of work using ElevenLabs or other AI voice/video tools

4. The editing and AI tools you use

5. Your rate

6. A short explanation of how you would approach editing this video based on the reference link



To confirm you read the full post, please include the word BLUEPRINT at the end of your application.

title: PERFORMANCE ADS SPECIALIST (FACEBOOK & GOOGLE)
description:
We are not looking for someone to simply click buttons. We are looking for partners who can command the flow of data across
 and Google to create genuine growth. If you are tired of spending budgets like a machine and want to truly master multi-thousand dollar campaigns, this is the position for you.

Strategize: You won't just receive briefs; you will participate in defining customer personas and building conversion funnels.

 Ads and Google Ads (Search, GDN, Shopping, YouTube, etc.).

 platforms.

Professional Environment: A culture of support where we solve problems together and conquer KPIs.

HOW TO APPLY

Send your CV to: 



Subject: [ADS] – Full Name – Phone Number

title: Full-Time AI Automation Specialist (GHL + N8N + Make.com)
description:

We're a fast-growing US-based marketing agency serving local businesses and residential contractors across multiple verticals. We move fast, build smart systems, and we're looking for someone who can keep up with — and push — our automation game.

This is a long-term role with real growth potential. We invest in our team's tools and skills, including a paid Claude AI membership to supercharge your productivity.

- Building more advanced custom solutions using Google Apps Script or Python when needed (we'll support you with Claude for the heavy lifting)

- Documenting your builds clearly so the team can maintain them

 (Integromat) — multi-step scenarios, error handling, webhooks

Python scripting

Webhook/API integration experience

Experience working with US-based agencies or marketing teams

 webhooks, or Google Workspace APIs





What You Get



- $1,200 – $1,500 USD/month (based on experience)

- Room to grow into a senior/lead automation role as we scale

title: Virtual Assistant (Dental Practice Growth & Patient Experience Coordinator)
description:
Remote | Part-Time ? Full-Time Growth Opportunity



About Us

Amore Dentistry is a modern, holistic dental practice focused on high-level patient care, efficiency, and a luxury experience. We are growing quickly and looking for a detail-oriented, proactive Virtual Assistant who can help manage patient communication, scheduling, and business operations—while evolving into a key role in marketing and practice growth.



Role Overview



This is NOT a basic assistant role. You will start by managing patient communication and scheduling but will grow into helping oversee systems, patient experience, and eventually social media + operational strategy.



We are looking for someone sharp, organized, and highly reliable who wants to grow with a business long-term.



Core Responsibilities (Phase 1)



Patient Communication & Scheduling



Answer incoming calls (via VOIP system) professionally and warmly

Respond to texts,
s, and website inquiries

Schedule, confirm, and reschedule patient appointments

Manage daily schedule to optimize production and efficiency



Patient Follow-Up & Experience



Follow up with new leads and unscheduled treatment

Send reminders and reactivation messages

Request and track patient reviews (Google, etc.)

Ensure every patient interaction feels high-touch and personalized



Administrative Support



Maintain accurate patient records

Coordinate forms, paperwork, and onboarding

Assist with insurance/basic admin tasks if needed

Growth Responsibilities (Phase 2 ? 3)



As you grow into the role, you will:



Help manage and improve office systems and workflows

Assist with KPI tracking (production, case acceptance, etc.)

Oversee patient journey from first contact ? completed treatment

Manage and post on social media (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

Coordinate marketing initiatives and campaigns

Act as a “remote office manager” / operations lead

Ideal Candidate

Strong communication skills (friendly, confident, articulate)

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Proactive problem-solver (doesn’t wait to be told what to do)

Comfortable handling patients and sensitive conversations

Tech-savvy (can quickly learn software systems)

Growth mindset — wants to evolve into a bigger role

Experience in dental, medical, or concierge client services is a PLUS

Tools You May Use

Scheduling software (Dentrix, OpenDental, ORYX etc.)

VOIP phone systems

Google Workspace

CRM / patient communication tools

Social media platforms

Schedule & Compensation

Remote position

Starting part-time (20–30 hrs/week), opportunity for full-time

Flexible hours, but must overlap with business hours (EST)

Competitive hourly pay based on experience

Performance-based bonuses available

What Success Looks Like

A smooth, organized schedule with minimal gaps

Patients feel cared for and consistently followed up with

Increased case acceptance and patient retention

Strong online presence and growing reviews

How to Apply



Please submit:



A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

Your resume

A brief answer to:

“How would you handle a patient who is hesitant to schedule treatment?”

Why This Role is Different

I WOULD LIKE TO DO AN INTERVIEW, THIS WILL BE FUN :D



This is an opportunity to grow into a high-level operations + marketing role within a rapidly expanding dental brand. If you’re looking for something long-term where you can take ownership and grow, this is it.

Why you're qualified for the Job

 ID (It's an instant messaging app)

title: Marketing Virtual Assistant
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Virtual Assistant to support our team with a variety of administrative, marketing, and operational tasks. The ideal candidate is organized, tech-savvy, and comfortable managing multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced remote environment.



This role involves data entry, social media management, customer service, online research, and Shopify store support, so we are looking for someone who is both reliable and adaptable.



To apply, kindly fill out this form: 



Key Responsibilities

- Perform accurate and efficient data entry and maintain organized records

- Manage social media accounts, including content creation, photo editing, scheduling, and posting

- Assist with social media strategy and engagement

- Conduct online research and organize findings 

- Provide customer service support, responding to inquiries in a professional and timely manner

- Manage vendor relations and communications

- Assist in managing and updating the Shopify store, including product listings and updates

- Provide general administrative and operational support as needed



Qualifications

- Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or similar role

- Experience with social media management and content creation

- Familiarity with Shopify or other e-commerce platforms

- Strong organizational and multitasking skills

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

- Proficiency in Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

- Experience with photo editing tools or design tools (e.g., Canva, Photoshop) is a plus



What We’re Looking For

- A proactive and resourceful problem-solver

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities

- A reliable professional who can work independently in a remote setup



Once you send your application, please make sure to check your
 for interview invites. 



#HiringPH #jobopening #jobopportunity #jobph #hiring #workfromhome #remotework #fulltime

title: All-In-One Virtual Assistant (Credit Repair, Funnels, Social Media Marketing & Editing)
description:
Overview:

We are looking for a highly skilled, experienced Virtual Assistant who can handle multiple areas of business operations including credit repair, funnel building, social media marketing, and content editing. This is an advanced role — not for beginners. You must already be skilled and able to execute without supervision.



?



Key Responsibilities:



Credit Repair:



* Draft and manage dispute letters (credit bureaus & creditors)

* Analyze credit reports and identify inaccuracies

* Build and execute dispute strategies

* Manage client onboarding, files, and follow-ups

* Knowledge of FCRA, FDCPA, and Metro 2 preferred



?



Funnels & Marketing:



* Build and manage sales funnels (ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel, etc.)

* Landing pages, lead capture, and automation setup

*
 and SMS marketing campaigns

* Lead generation strategies

* Optimize funnels for conversions



?



Social Media Marketing & Growth:



* Manage and grow platforms (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

* Content posting, scheduling, and engagement

* Create viral-style edits for reels/short-form content

* Research top influencers in the industry and pull winning content ideas

* Develop and write out content strategies and post ideas

* Identify trends and adapt them to the brand

* Basic ad management (Meta preferred)



?



Content Editing:



* Edit videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)

* Create graphics (Canva or similar)

* Write captions aligned with brand voice

* Maintain consistent branding across all platforms



?



Requirements (Non-Negotiable):



* Must be skilled and experienced in ALL areas listed above

* Must provide proof of work and a resume

* Strong organization and attention to detail

* Ability to work independently and execute tasks without supervision



?



Important: Read Before Applying

If you do not have proven experience in credit repair, funnels, social media marketing (including viral content creation), AND content editing — do not apply.



We will review and verify all experience. If your resume does not reflect your true skill level, it will be clear.



We are not looking for someone to train. We need someone who already knows how to perform at a high level.



If you are not skilled in all categories, please do not apply or reach out.



?



What We’re Looking For:

A reliable, high-level operator who can take ownership, execute efficiently, and help grow the business.



?



How to Apply:

Submit:



* Resume

* Portfolio / proof of work

* Brief summary of your experience in:

    * Credit Repair

    * Funnels

    * Social Media Marketing (including viral edits + content strategy)

    * Content Editing



Only serious and qualified applicants will be considered.

title: Appointment Setter / Sales Associate (Coffee Bike World) — Part-Time to Full-Time (NA Hours)
description:
Company: Coffee Bike World (Vancouver-based, expanding worldwide)

Role Type: Remote — Part-time to start (20–30 hrs/week), potential to scale to Full-time

Work Hours: North America time zones, typically 10:00am–5:00pm across PST/MST/CST/EST (schedule may rotate)



About Us: Coffee Bike World designs and sells fully equipped mobile espresso tricycles and espresso bars used by entrepreneurs and brands worldwide. We’re growing fast and need a proactive, fluent-English caller who can turn warm leads into booked calls—and closed deals.



What You’ll Do: You will call and qualify leads from our global pipeline and follow up via phone, SMS, WhatsApp, and
. You will book qualified appointments on the calendar for the Founder and, when ready, close straightforward deals yourself. You will nurture interested prospects by overcoming objections, sharing information, and maintaining 
ntum until purchase. You will learn the product (with training and scripts provided) to confidently explain features, pricing, and ROI. You will maintain CRM hygiene by logging every touch and updating stages, next steps, and notes. You will provide admin and personal-assistant support as needed, including inbox triage, document preparation, simple research, and scheduling. Optionally, you may take on growth tasks such as light social media management, simple Canva graphics, and basic video edits for reels and shorts.



Required Skills and Experience: You have excellent spoken and written English with a neutral and pleasant accent. You have a phone-first mindset with confidence, courtesy, and strong follow-through. You bring experience in sales, appointment setting, or call centers (B2B or high-ticket B2C preferred). You are organized in a CRM such as GoHighLevel. You are comfortable working North America daytime hours. You have stable internet of at least 25 Mbps, a reliable laptop and headset, and a quiet workspace.



Bonus Skills: You may have social media management experience for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts, short-form video editing and captioning, and basic motion text. You may have graphic design skills in Canva or Figma for simple one-pagers, proposals, or posts. You may be familiar with cold
 tools, LinkedIn outreach, and list clean-up, and have light copywriting skills for follow-ups and landing page tweaks. Experience with WhatsApp Business, Calendly, Notion, and Google Workspace is valuable. 



KPIs You’ll Own: You will be measured on dials and contacts per day and the resulting contact rate, on appointments booked and show-up rate, on pipeline conversion from qualified to closed once ramped, and on CRM completeness and adherence to follow-up SLAs.

title: Sales-Focused Virtual Assistant (Strong Closer) - U.S. Cleaning Business
description:
Sales-Focused Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based | Cleaning Services)



We are hiring a sales-driven Virtual Assistant who knows how to confidently handle objections, guide conversations, and close deals over the phone.



You will be the first point of contact for warm inbound leads interested in our U.S.-based residential cleaning services. Your primary goal is simple: turn qualified inquiries into booked jobs.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys sales conversations, builds trust quickly, and is comfortable asking for the booking.



Key Responsibilities:

? Answer inbound sales calls and follow up with warm leads as needed

? Confidently explain our services, pricing, and packages

? Handle common objections (pricing, timing, trust) calmly and professionally

? Convert leads into scheduled jobs with consistency

? Update CRM with call notes, outcomes, and follow-ups

? Assist with scheduling confirmations and basic admin support

? Deliver excellent customer service throughout the customer journey



What We’re Looking For:

? Fluent, confident English with a natural phone presence

? Proven phone sales or closing experience (metrics preferred)

? Comfortable speaking with U.S.-based homeowners

? Organized, reliable, and able to work independently

? Experience with home services or cleaning is a plus, not required



Technical Requirements:

? Stable wired internet (minimum 30 Mbps)

? Quiet, professional workspace

? Backup internet/device available



Compensation & Schedule:

? $5.50–$6.50/hr base (depending on experience)

? Performance bonuses tied to booked revenue

? 30–40 hours per week

? Availability during U.S. Central Time business hours



To Apply:

Please submit a short video (1–2 minutes) explaining your experience handling objections and closing sales over the phone. Real examples or results are strongly encouraged.



?? If you do not have phone-based sales experience, please do not apply.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Please apply through the below link: 
/careers/43?source=aWQ9MTg=



Compensation: $1,300 – $1,800 / month USD 



Contractual | California business hours | Compensation is based on experience, depth of B2B SEO/content expertise, and demonstrated results. There is strong potential for compensation growth based on performance and impact within the first 3–6 months. 



ABOUT CDMS 



CDMS is a B2B Environmental, Health & Safety (EHS) services company. We work directly with manufacturing and industrial clients, helping them stay compliant, safe, and operationally sound. 



We have strong technical expertise and a clear brand. This role is about turning that expertise into a consistent, credible, and results-driven digital presence. 



THE ROLE 



This is a senior contractual role, not a management position, but one that requires you to operate independently and with sound judgment. You will own our digital marketing output end-to-end: SEO strategy and implementation, content creation, LinkedIn presence, and brand collateral. You will deeply learn our voice, our clients, and our industry, and use that knowledge to build a presence that earns trust in a technical, compliance-driven space. 



You will work closely with our leadership team, who will brief you directly from client conversations and field intelligence. Your job is to transform that raw material into polished, on-brand content that sounds like us: credible, clear, and grounded in real EHS work. 



If you have ever built a B2B content engine from a standing start and you understand what it takes to earn authority in a niche technical industry, this role was written for you. 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (3–6 MONTHS) 



Grow LinkedIn presence by 50%–100%, with a focus on relevant, industry-aligned followers 

Increase qualified inbound leads by 30%–70%, supported by consistent content and targeted outreach 

Improve organic website traffic by 20%–40% through SEO optimization and new content 

Establish a consistent, high-quality content cadence across blog, LinkedIn, and newsletters 

Build an initial pipeline of case studies and thought leadership content based on real client work 

Deliver clear monthly reporting with actionable recommendations - not just data 



Note: These targets are supported by timely input from leadership, tool access (Ahrefs, etc.), and shared alignment on priorities. We treat this as a two-way commitment. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO 



SEO 



Conduct and maintain a full SEO audit using Ahrefs; implement and track on-page optimizations 



Perform ongoing keyword research and monitor rankings across target terms 



Identify content gaps and build a topic roadmap based on search demand and competitive analysis 



Own SEO reporting — surface insights to leadership in plain language with clear action items 



Content & Ghostwriting 



Write blog posts, LinkedIn articles, and newsletters in the voice of our leadership team 



Turn client conversations and project outcomes (fed to you by our team) into compelling case studies 



Curate RSS feeds from EHS, manufacturing, and safety industry sources; develop timely, opinionated content based on those topics 



Maintain a consistent editorial calendar across all channels 



Develop and refine our brand voice guide over time — so the standard is documented, not just in your head 



LinkedIn Management 



Manage our leadership team's LinkedIn presence — posting, commenting, and connecting on their behalf 



Engage daily with content from existing clients and prospects in the EHS and manufacturing space 



Grow our LinkedIn network through targeted, strategic outreach 



Track follower growth, engagement rate, and lead signals — report monthly with clear takeaways 



Collateral & Internal Branding 



Apply our existing brand guidelines to materials provided by our technical team — one pagers, site posters, and laminated sheets for client locations 



Coordinate with our onsite admin assistant for printing and lamination, and with the EHS team for client delivery 



Keep all materials current and on-brand 



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 



4+ years of B2B content marketing or digital marketing experience 



Expert-level SEO with demonstrated ranking results — Ahrefs is your daily driver 



Proven ghostwriting for C-suite or senior executives in B2B industries 



Experience managing full editorial calendars independently, with minimal direction 



Strong track record growing LinkedIn presence for a company or executive 



Excellent written English — you catch errors others miss and you have range 



Canva or basic design skills to adapt brand templates 



Proficient in WordPress or equivalent CMS 



Comfortable with AI writing tools to accelerate output — without sacrificing voice or accuracy 



Self-directed: you manage your own priorities and deadlines without hand-holding 



NICE TO HAVE 



Familiarity with EHS, safety, manufacturing, or industrial compliance industries 



Experience with newsletter platforms (ActiveCampaign or similar) 



Background in managing or mentoring junior content contributors 



WORK SETUP 



Engagement Type: Independent Contractor 



Schedule: California business hours (PST/PDT) 



Location: Remote — Philippines-based candidates preferred 



Equipment: You provide your own setup; stable internet required 



Tools: Ahrefs, WordPress, Canva, LinkedIn — we provide access on hire 



Next Step: To move forward in the hiring process, please complete the assessment below. Once finished, you’ll receive a second assessment. Completion of both is required for consideration. 
/bo/2SKX/DigitalMarketingSpecialist2026

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring  Cold callers to Help Build Local Business In the USA

 Base pay $600 per month (after two week training) plus commissions OTE each month $1000-$1500

Company: Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)

Location: Remote - 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

Type: Full-time Independent Contractor

---

The Story Behind Start Over

Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.

Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)

It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.

---

Why We Need You

We are looking for 3 cold callers each week to join the team now. We need in total another 180 cold callers within 3 months so this team and the level of recruitment will grow quickly to help launch and fill  up a weekly webinar  the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ cold callers across all our territories.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.

closers then to attend a webinar designed to close them for us





The 14-Day Trial

We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:

$15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

Day 2 onwards: Full production with daily minimums

Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2

---

What Makes This Role Different

1. You are not hustling a bad offer. Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.

2. You are part of a real team. We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.

3. You have a growth path. Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.

4. You get real support. Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.

---

The Daily Reality

Let us be honest about what the day looks like:

9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

Monday to Friday, five nights a week

300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

10+ event bookings per day (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)

It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.

---

We Are Looking For Someone Who

Must have:

2+ years phone sales or closing experience

OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+ verified on your profile

NBI clearance (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---

Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---

Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---

Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---

Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---

How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status



Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---

Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi

We look forward to meeting you Monday

title: Client Care Coordinator
description:

This person will be our potential clients first point of contact and first impression of JEM, so they need to have great English skills and people skills, be compassionate and patient yet have good boundaries and be very organized.  

Hard Skills needed:  Answer phone and interact with clients, share about our practice, place them with a clinician, and schedule their first appointment.  Return calls same day.  When you apply please let me know how much you love horses. Operate practice software/electronic health record and schedule clients, fill out profiles, create reports to
 to owner. Create
s and respond to
s daily.  Please use 4 Apply Points when you apply. Create systems for workflow with owner. 

Soft Skills needed:  Takes initiative, self starter,  compassionate, patient, very organized and punctual, creative thinker, conversational, has good boundaries, cares about others and is a natural helper.

title: Sales Representative
description:
Part-Time Sales Follow-Up VA for Auto Detailing Business



Role summary



We are hiring a part-time VA to help with lead follow-up, past-client reactivation, review follow-up, and simple sales/admin support for a mobile detailing and ceramic coating business. This is not a generic admin role. We need someone who is strong at communication, organized with follow-up, and capable of helping turn old conversations into booked work.



What you will do



- Reply to inbound leads by text and

- Follow up leads that went cold

- Reach back out to past clients to get them rebooked

- Ask happy customers for reviews

- Update customer and lead status inside Fieldd CRM

- Flag hot leads that need owner attention

- After training, begin helping with phone follow-up



What matters most



- Strong written English

- Strong spoken English

- Friendly but confident communication

- Good follow-up habits

- Comfort with sales conversations

- Organized and reliable work style

- Able to learn offers, pricing, and customer tone quickly

- available in the 9AM-5PM PST hours



 Nice to have



- Appointment setting experience

- Experience with local service businesses

- Experience with automotive detailing, home services, or similar businesses

- Experience using a CRM, Google Sheets, or lead tracking systems



Hours and structure



- Part-time to start then up to full time as demand increases

- About 15 to 20 hours per week

- Text and
 first

- Phone follow-up later if the fit is strong



Pay



- $4 to $8 per hour depending on experience

- +$3 per booked job

- +$2 per review landed



To apply

1. Apply to this position

2. Send a short intro

3. Share your relevant follow-up, sales support, or VA experience

4. Write a sample message to an old lead who asked for a quote but never booked

5. Write a sample message to a past client you want to rebook

6. Include the word oakley at the top so we know you read the full post

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---



Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---



Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---



Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---



Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---



How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status





Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---



Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi



We look forward to meeting you Monday

title: Job Title: Billing & Invoicing Specialist (Full-Time VA) — Marketing Agency
description:
About Us



We're a marketing agency working with high-ticket financial services clients. We run a team of salespeople (setters and closers) and marketing contractors, and we need someone meticulous to own our billing operations end-to-end.



What You'll Do

You'll be the person who makes sure money moves correctly in and out of the business. Specifically:



- Manage our billing system and own the full invoicing cycle for clients

- Calculate and process commission payouts for salespeople (setters, closers) based on deal data — accuracy is non-negotiable here

- Process payments and reimbursements for marketing contractors (UGC creators, media buyers, freelancers)

- Reconcile invoices against payments received and flag discrepancies

- Maintain organized records of every transaction — who got paid, how much, when, and why

- Chase down missing information from team leads when payouts are unclear

- Send payment confirmations and follow up on overdue client invoices

- Build and maintain a clean monthly close process so we always know where we stand

- Identify errors, overpayments, or missed billings before they become problems



Who You Are



2+ years of experience in billing, bookkeeping, accounts payable/receivable, or finance VA work



Obsessive about accuracy — you double-check your work and catch your own mistakes before anyone else does



Advanced Google Sheets skills — formulas, pivot tables, conditional formatting (we run everything in Sheets) Comfortable with numbers and reconciling multi-source data



Organized to a fault — if something falls through the cracks on your watch, you treat it as a serious problem



Proactive communicator — you raise issues early instead of waiting to be asked



Discreet and trustworthy — you'll see sensitive financial information daily



Strong English



Why This Role

You'll work directly with the founder and own a critical function. No layers of bureaucracy. If you're sharp, you'll have a long-term home here with raises tied to performance.



How to Apply

To filter out copy-paste applicants, please do the following:



- Start your message with the word "Reconciled" so I know you read this carefully.

- Record a Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking me through the billing, invoicing, or finance work you've done in previous roles. 

-Show me actual examples on screen if possible — spreadsheets you've built, processes you've owned, problems you've solved.



Applications missing either of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Phone Support Specialist (WFH)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and confident communicator with strong English skills to handle client calls and support a growing U.S.-based business.

_____________________



ABOUT YOU: 

You are a capable, confident woman who takes pride in how you show up professionally: focused, reliable, and someone others can depend on.



You treat your work like it’s your own business.



You don’t just “answer calls.” You connect, influence, and move conversations forward.



You are sharp, quick-thinking, and confident speaking in English. You don’t rely on scripts to sound natural. You know how to build rapport with someone new.



You are not looking for your next job. You are looking for a long-term role where you can stay and become indispensable.

_____________________



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• You love speaking with people - the idea of confidently guiding clients, answering questions, and helping them move forward energizes you.

• You are calm, patient, and solution-focused under pressure - you don’t get flustered, you take control.

• You speak exceptional English with a clear voice and minimal accent - easily understood by U.S. callers.

• You can build rapport quickly - not robotic, not scripted, but natural and engaging.

• You are comfortable handling inbound sales inquiries and guiding warm leads toward clear next steps.

• You are resourceful and think on your feet - you don’t freeze when situations change.

• You are intelligent and proactive - you don’t wait to be told every step.

• You are comfortable influencing conversations - not aggressive sales, but confident guidance.

_____________________



READ THIS CAREFULLY

• If you do not naturally know how to build rapport with someone new, this position is NOT for you.

• If you prefer doing the minimum and logging off or clocking in/out, this position is NOT for you.

• If you are the type of woman who steps up, supports the business, and takes pride in doing excellent work — you will do very well here.

_____________________



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

• Work from home experience

• Night shift experience

• At least two years of work experience within the same company

• Executive assistant OR BPO experience

• Phone experience (ex: Phone customer support OR Phone sales experience)

_____________________



MINDSET REQUIREMENTS

• You take ownership - you treat the business like it’s yours

• You go the extra mile without being asked

• You are reliable, consistent, and professional every day

• You want long-term, possibly lifetime, stability - not job hopping every few years

_____________________



ABOUT US

• U.S.-based company

• Small and close like family

• We value long-term tea
mbers who want stability and consistency 

• We recognize your hard work and reward you for your dedication and additional contributions 

_____________________



COMMITMENT

• Independent Contractor work setup directly with the client.

• Full-time (40 working hours/week)

• Availability Requirement: Monday–Friday, within timeframe of 7 AM–7 PM Pacific Time. (Plus helping with time-sensitive client matters as needed Saturday-Sunday)

• Long-term, possibly lifetime position

• $500–$800/month (based on experience) + Bonuses

_____________________



FINAL NOTE

We are not looking for average. We are looking for a confident, capable woman who:

• Can communicate clearly

• Can connect with people and make them feel comfortable on the phone

• Can think independently

• Wants to stay and grow long-term



If that’s you - apply here: Apply Here: 



If that's not you - this role will not be a fit.



OLJ Applications or OLJ Messages will not be reviewed.

Apply Here:
