title: Experienced Email Template Designer for BetterMail Visual Editor
description:
We are looking for an experienced
 Template Designer to create original marketing
 templates inside BetterMail, our visual
 editor.



This is a 1-2 month part-time project to start. Future work may be available depending on BetterMail customer demand and the need for additional template/design support.



No HTML coding is required. You will build directly inside BetterMail’s drag-and-drop
 editor. BetterMail also has a built-in banner editor, which you will use to create editable banners for the templates.



The templates you create will become part of BetterMail’s free template collection for customers to use, so they must be original, polished, modern, responsive, and easy for users to customize.



Important:

As you build templates, we will also ask you to give feedback on the BetterMail editor. We are actively improving the editor, so your feedback about usability, missing features, difficult workflows, and template-building limitations will be valuable.



Initial Work:

Before creating the full set of templates, we will do a research and planning stage. You will help research and suggest a template category list. We already have some ideas and starting points, but we want your input on useful categories, industries, campaign types, and template styles.



Responsibilities:

- Research and suggest template categories for BetterMail’s free template collection

- Create original
 templates inside the BetterMail visual editor

- Use BetterMail’s built-in banner editor to create editable banners

- Create templates that demonstrate the flexibility of the BetterMail editor

- Make templates easy for customers to modify, adjust, and re-theme

- Design templates that look modern, clean, and professional

- Ensure templates look good on both desktop and mobile

- Create templates across different industries and campaign types

- Give clear feedback on the BetterMail editor while using it

- Revise templates based on feedback



Template Requirements:

- Must be original designs, not copied from existing templates

- Must be suitable for BetterMail customers to use as free templates

- Must be responsive and mobile-friendly

- Must use modern
 design practices, including strong hierarchy, large readable fonts, clean spacing, and clear calls to action

- Must be easy for users to edit and customize

- Must use editable banners where appropriate

- Must show a range of layouts, styles, and use cases so customers can see what BetterMail can do



Experience Required:

- Minimum 3 years of experience in
 template production,
 design, or digital marketing design

- Strong portfolio of
 templates or
 campaign designs

- Experience with tools such as Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Canva, Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, or similar

- Strong understanding of
 design, mobile layout, typography, spacing, color, hierarchy, and CTA placement

- Comfortable using AI image/banner tools

- Able to create original ideas and not just copy existing designs

- Good written English

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to work independently



Preferred:

- Experience designing templates for SaaS, ecommerce, newsletters, events, local businesses, real estate, restaurants, education, fitness, beauty, travel, or professional services

- Experience creating reusable template systems or template libraries

- Experience giving product feedback while using design software or
 editors



To apply, please answer these questions:

1. Put "BetterMail
 Designer" at the top of your application.

2. Send a link to your portfolio. Please include
 templates or
 campaign designs if possible.

3. How many years of
 template or
 campaign design experience do you have?

4. What
/design tools have you used?

5. Have you used Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Canva, Figma, or any drag-and-drop
 editor before?

6. Are you comfortable using AI tools and built-in banner editors to create editable banners?

7. How would you approach creating an original template library for BetterMail customers?

8. How many polished
 templates do you think you could create per week inside a visual editor?

9. What is your hourly rate?

10. Are you open to a paid test task?



Paid Test:

Shortlisted applicants will be asked to create a small number of sample
 templates inside BetterMail from a brief. This test will be paid.



We are looking for someone who can start part-time for 1-2 months.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media Manager

title: Real Estate Lead Qualifier (Warm Leads | EST Shift)
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a disciplined and high-performing Lead Qualifier to manage our warm lead database. This is a targeted role focused on re-engaging property owners who have previously shown interest in selling.



This position requires a "prospecting athlete"—someone who can maintain high energy across a split-shift schedule to reach homeowners at peak response times. You will vet leads for motivation and property details before passing them to our senior acquisitions team.



The Schedule & Performance Standards

This role is strictly tied to Eastern Standard Time (EST). To maximize contact rates, you will work one or two of the following windows:



Morning: 8 AM – 10 AM EST



Mid-day: 12 PM – 2 PM EST



Evening: 5 PM – 8 PM EST



Success is measured by data. We are a KPI-driven (Key Performance Indicator) company. You will be expected to:



Maintain a consistent daily call volume (Expected: 250 dials per day).



Meet weekly targets for qualified leads and warm transfers.



Log all activity with 100?curacy in our CRM.



Required Qualifications

Real Estate Expertise: 1–2 years of experience in Real Estate cold calling or lead management is required.



Objection Mastery: You must be able to handle "not interested" or price objections with grace, curiosity, and persistence.



EST Availability: You must be fully available and alert during the specific split-shift hours listed above.



Technical Specs: Noise-canceling headset, stable high-speed internet, and a backup power solution.



Key Responsibilities

Call "Old Warm" leads to re-verify selling intent.



Qualify leads based on the 3 Pillars: Interest in selling, Price and Motivation.



Perform seamless warm transfers to the acquisitions team.



Overcome gatekeepers and stalls to reach the decision-maker.



Mandatory Paid Training

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Description: Project Manager, Outbound Calling Team



Position Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented Project Manager to oversee an outbound calling team responsible for booking demos for client campaigns. This role is responsible for managing daily team execution, tracking performance data, ensuring KPI and script compliance, maintaining accurate HubSpot reporting, and supporting weekly client communication.

The ideal candidate is organized, data-driven, comfortable managing sales activity, and able to identify performance issues quickly while keeping the account manager and client informed.



Key Responsibilities

- Daily Team Management

- Oversee the outbound calling team’s daily execution.

- Ensure reps complete required calls,
s, and follow-up activities.

- Monitor daily talk time, activity levels, conversations, and demos booked.

- Identify blockers that may prevent the team from hitting campaign goals.

- Hold reps accountable to daily expectations and client requirements.

- KPI and Script Compliance

- Ensure reps are following the approved calling script and campaign messaging.

- Monitor performance against daily and weekly KPIs.

- Review call quality, talk tracks, and outreach consistency.

- Coach or escalate when reps are off-script or below performance expectations.

- Confirm the team is aligned with the client’s ICP, offer, and demo-booking goals.

- HubSpot Reporting

- Ensure all calls,
s, notes, outcomes, and booked demos are logged accurately in HubSpot.

- Review HubSpot daily for missing or inaccurate activity.

- Confirm contacts, companies, meetings, and deals are updated correctly.

- Maintain HubSpot as the source of truth for client reporting.

- Tool Management and Optimization

- Review the outbound calling tool daily to monitor call volume, dispositions, connection rates, and rep activity.

- Identify any technical, workflow, or data issues impacting performance.

- Review and optimize Lemlist campaigns daily, including
s, replies, bounces, deliverability, and sequence performance.

- Recommend improvements to messaging, list quality, timing, and campaign execution.

- Client Reporting and Communication

- Prepare weekly client performance reports.

- Summarize key metrics, wins, issues, risks, and next steps.

- Participate in or support weekly client check-ins.

- Communicate client issues, campaign successes, and performance trends to the account manager.

- Ensure the account manager has the information needed to manage the client relationship effectively.



Qualifications

- Experience managing outbound sales, SDR, BDR, or appointment-setting teams.

- Familiarity with HubSpot or similar CRM platforms.

- Experience with outbound sales tools, calling platforms, and
 sequencing tools such as Lemlist.

- Strong understanding of sales KPIs, including calls,
s, talk time, conversations, and meetings booked.

- Ability to review data and identify performance gaps.

- Strong organizational and communication skills.

- Comfortable holding reps accountable to process, activity, and script compliance.

- Ability to manage multiple moving parts in a fast-paced client environment.



Success Metrics

Success in this role will be measured by:

- Daily calling team activity completion.

- KPI and script compliance.

- Accurate and complete HubSpot reporting.

- Consistent review and optimization of outbound tools and Lemlist.

- Weekly client reporting delivered on time.

- Clear communication of campaign issues and successes to the account manager.

- Improvement in demo-booking performance over time.



Ideal Candidate

- The ideal candidate is highly organized, proactive, and comfortable managing both people and data. They understand outbound sales execution, know how to inspect CRM and calling activity, and can keep a team focused on booking qualified demos for clients.



IMPORTANT



All candidates must include:

- CV/Resume 

- Video Introduction of yourself, your experience, and why you are the best fit for the role.

- Internet Speed Test



*Candidates that don't supply these things will not be considered for the role.

title: Rockstar Real Estate Wholesaling Virtual Assistant / Cold Caller
description:
We are looking for a reliable, hungry, and organized Virtual Assistant / Cold Caller to join our real estate wholesaling business.



This role is for someone fast and efficient who understands the USA real estate wholesaling business, knows how to speak with motivated sellers, run comparables, and is comfortable working inside Go High Level CRM and creating automations/workflows



You will be helping with seller outreach, follow-ups, CRM updates, lead management, and daily communication with our team.



This is not just a dialing job. We are looking for someone who can think, ask good questions, stay organized, and help us move leads from cold conversations to warm opportunities.



1. Strong Follow-Up System



Most deals do not close on the first call. The VA should know how to follow up without sounding pushy.



They should be able to:



Call back warm leads

Send short text follow-ups

Track next follow-up dates

Keep notes on seller objections

Revive old leads inside the CRM



A good cold caller does not just “make calls.” They create a follow-up machine.



2. Lead Qualification and Seller Motivation



The VA should understand that not every seller is a deal.



They must be able to identify:



Why the seller may want to sell

How soon they want to sell

What problem they are trying to solve

Whether the property needs repairs

Whether there are taxes, liens, vacancy, probate, tenants, divorce, foreclosure, or other issues

Whether the seller’s price is realistic



This helps protect your time and keeps you focused on the right opportunities.



3. CRM Discipline and Daily Reporting



A cold caller can be friendly, but if the CRM is messy, the business becomes messy.



The assistant should update every lead properly:



Correct pipeline stage

Clear call notes

Proper tags

Follow-up date

Seller motivation

Asking price

Property condition

Call outcome

Next action



They should also send a simple daily report showing:



Number of calls made

Number of conversations

Number of warm leads

Number of appointments booked

Top seller objections

Leads needing our review



You must have experience with:



Real estate wholesaling in the USA market

Cold calling motivated sellers

Go High Level CRM

Lead follow-up and pipeline management

Speaking clearly and professionally with homeowners

Take detailed notes inside CRM

Asking qualifying questions about property condition, motivation, timeline, and asking price



You Must not: 



Be working for another company during the hours you are hired with us

title: Growth Marketing Lead
description:
Apply through the following link: 
/careers/48?source=aWQ9MTg=



Compensation: $1,500 – $2,000 / month USD 



Contractual | California business hours | Compensation is based on experience, depth of B2B SEO/content expertise, and demonstrated results. There is strong potential for compensation growth based on performance and impact within the first 3–6 months. 



ABOUT CDMS 



CDMS is a B2B Environmental, Health & Safety (EHS) services company. We work directly with manufacturing and industrial clients, helping them stay compliant, safe, and operationally sound. 



We have strong technical expertise and a clear brand. This role is about turning that expertise into a consistent, credible, and results-driven digital presence. 



THE ROLE 



This is a senior contractual role, not a management position, but one that requires you to operate independently and with sound judgment. You will own our digital marketing output end-to-end: SEO strategy and implementation, content creation, LinkedIn presence, and brand collateral. You will deeply learn our voice, our clients, and our industry, and use that knowledge to build a presence that earns trust in a technical, compliance-driven space. 



You will work closely with our leadership team, who will brief you directly from client conversations and field intelligence. Your job is to transform that raw material into polished, on-brand content that sounds like us: credible, clear, and grounded in real EHS work. 



If you have ever built a B2B content engine from a standing start and you understand what it takes to earn authority in a niche technical industry, this role was written for you. 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (3–6 MONTHS) 



Grow LinkedIn presence by 50%–100%, with a focus on relevant, industry-aligned followers 

Increase qualified inbound leads by 30%–70%, supported by consistent content and targeted outreach 

Improve organic website traffic by 20%–40% through SEO optimization and new content 

Establish a consistent, high-quality content cadence across blog, LinkedIn, and newsletters 

Build an initial pipeline of case studies and thought leadership content based on real client work 

Deliver clear monthly reporting with actionable recommendations - not just data 



Note: These targets are supported by timely input from leadership, tool access (Ahrefs, etc.), and shared alignment on priorities. We treat this as a two-way commitment. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO 



SEO 



Conduct and maintain a full SEO audit using Ahrefs; implement and track on-page optimizations 



Perform ongoing keyword research and monitor rankings across target terms 



Identify content gaps and build a topic roadmap based on search demand and competitive analysis 



Own SEO reporting — surface insights to leadership in plain language with clear action items 



Content & Ghostwriting 



Write blog posts, LinkedIn articles, and newsletters in the voice of our leadership team 



Turn client conversations and project outcomes (fed to you by our team) into compelling case studies 



Curate RSS feeds from EHS, manufacturing, and safety industry sources; develop timely, opinionated content based on those topics 



Maintain a consistent editorial calendar across all channels 



Develop and refine our brand voice guide over time — so the standard is documented, not just in your head 



LinkedIn Management 



Manage our leadership team's LinkedIn presence — posting, commenting, and connecting on their behalf 



Engage daily with content from existing clients and prospects in the EHS and manufacturing space 



Grow our LinkedIn network through targeted, strategic outreach 



Track follower growth, engagement rate, and lead signals — report monthly with clear takeaways 



Collateral & Internal Branding 



Apply our existing brand guidelines to materials provided by our technical team — one pagers, site posters, and laminated sheets for client locations 



Coordinate with our onsite admin assistant for printing and lamination, and with the EHS team for client delivery 



Keep all materials current and on-brand 



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 



4+ years of B2B content marketing or digital marketing experience 



Expert-level SEO with demonstrated ranking results — Ahrefs is your daily driver 



Proven ghostwriting for C-suite or senior executives in B2B industries 



Experience managing full editorial calendars independently, with minimal direction 



Strong track record growing LinkedIn presence for a company or executive 



Excellent written English — you catch errors others miss and you have range 



Canva or basic design skills to adapt brand templates 



Proficient in WordPress or equivalent CMS 



Comfortable with AI writing tools to accelerate output — without sacrificing voice or accuracy 



Self-directed: you manage your own priorities and deadlines without hand-holding 



NICE TO HAVE 



Familiarity with EHS, safety, manufacturing, or industrial compliance industries 



Experience with newsletter platforms (ActiveCampaign or similar) 



Background in managing or mentoring junior content contributors 



WORK SETUP 



Engagement Type: Independent Contractor 



Schedule: California business hours (PST/PDT) 



Location: Remote — Philippines-based candidates preferred 



Equipment: You provide your own setup; stable internet required 



Tools: Ahrefs, WordPress, Canva, LinkedIn — we provide access on hire 



Next Step: To move forward in the hiring process, please complete the assessment below. Once finished, you’ll receive a second assessment. Completion of both is required for consideration. 
/bo/2SKX/DigitalMarketingSpecialist2026

title: Urgent Hiring | Architectural Designer | U.S. Client Experience Required | Join Now!
description:
**About Us**

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate development company focused on high-quality home renovations and new construction projects in California.



We don’t just build homes — we build efficient systems, strong teams, and scalable operations.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented, proactive, and reliable tea
mber who can help support design, drafting, revisions, and project coordination across multiple projects. 

______________________________________________________



**Why This Role is Important**

This role is a key part of our design and project workflow. If drawings are incomplete, inaccurate, or delayed, coordination suffers and projects slow down. 



Your job is to make sure that NEVER happens.

______________________________________________________



**What You’ll Be Doing**

Design & Drawing Coordination

-Prepare and revise architectural drawings, plans, and design documents

-Review architectural, structural, civil, and MEP plans in detail 

-Review markups, redlines, and project requirements for accuracy and completeness

-Assist with design development, space planning, and drawing updates



Documentation & Plan Support

-Help produce clear, organized, and accurate plan sets and design documents

-Evaluate comments based on design and construction elements

-Update drawings based on feedback, revisions, and project changes

-Maintain consistency across plans, notes, dimensions, and details



Coordination & Project Support

-Coordinate with vendors and tea
mbers

-Work closely with architects most of the time to support design development, drawing coordination, and plan updates

-Track drawing updates, pending items, and revision progress

-Organize project files and support material, product, or design research as needed



Accuracy & Risk Management

-Maintain accuracy, clarity, and consistency in all work

-Proactively flag missing information, design conflicts, and potential delays (VERY IMPORTANT)

-Help keep projects moving by completing revisions and deliverables on time 



**What We’re Looking For**

Required

-Degree in Architecture, Interior Design, Construction, or related field

-At least 2+ years experience in architectural design, drafting, or construction documents

-Experience in U.S. residential construction projects

-Strong ability to prepare, read, and understand plans, elevations, sections, and detailed drawings

-Experience in photo realistic rendering based on floor plans

-Proficiency in architectural drafting/design software

-Experience working closely with architects on design development, drawing coordination, and revisions

-Highly organized and detail-oriented

-Strong English communication (written & verbal)



**Preferred (Big Plus)**

-Familiarity with permit sets, construction documents, and project coordination

-Experience working with revisions, redlines, and consultant or team coordination

-Basic knowledge of materials, finishes, and construction detailing 



**Tools You May Use**

-AutoCAD/Revit

-SketchUp

-Bluebeam

-Adobe Photoshop/InDesign

-Google Drive, Google Sheets, and Excel



**Perks/Benefits**

– 10 days paid time off (PTO)/holiday

– Maxicare health insurance

– Performance-based bonuses per property sold

– SV anniversary & birthday gifts

– 13th Month Pay with the potential to earn 2–3× based on performance and company results



**How to Apply (IMPORTANT)**

To be considered, submit the following:  

-Your updated resume

-2 to 3 mins. introduction video of relevant experience 

-Example project(s) or sample drawings you’ve worked on

-Photo of your workstation

-Screenshot of your device specifications

-Screenshot of your internet speed test results



Due to the high volume of applications we receive, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted

title: Meta Ads Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
At The Equine Practice Company and Horse Health HQ, we empower equine veterinarians globally through elite education and community. We are a high-performing core team of 9. While we live by our values of Innovation and Fun, we are a results-driven company with ambitious financial targets.



The businesses have reached a stage where we are prioritising internal integration. We are moving away from the 'agency model' to bring this role in-house, ensuring our Meta strategy is fully embedded in our daily operations and core team.



We are looking for a Performance-Focused Media Buyer who treats our ad accounts as their own. You aren’t just a "button pusher" - you are a strategic partner responsible for driving consistent, high-quality lead generation and maximizing ROI.



What You’ll Own

1. Campaign Architecture: Build and launch campaigns (Lead Gen, Conversions, Awareness) from scratch using best-practice structures.



2. Aggressive Optimization: Daily monitoring of bids, budgets, and placements. You identify winners and kill losers without being asked.



3. Audience Management: Expertly navigate custom audiences, lookalikes, and deep interest-based targeting for our niche equine market.



4. Creative Testing: Set up rigorous A/B tests, analyze the data, and flag winning creative for scaling.



5. Technical Operations: Act as the internal lead for Meta Business Manager. You must be able to troubleshoot page access, asset permissions, and portfolio connections live.



6. Tracking & QA: Verify Pixel fires, CAPI, conversion events, and maintain 100% UTM hygiene. Zero tolerance for sloppy trafficking.



7. Reporting: Weekly summaries with clear insights—tell us what happened, why, and what we are doing next.



Who You Are

1. Experience: 2+ years of hands-on Meta Ads experience managing $5,000–$10,000+ USD monthly spend.



2. Strategic Mindset: You understand lead gen funnels and customer acquisition. You don't wait for instructions; you identify opportunities and recommend improvements.



3. Technical Troubleshooting: You are confident working inside Meta Business Manager to fix backend issues when they happen.



4. Fast & Accurate: You move quickly but have a "measure twice, cut once" mentality.



5. Equine-Passionate: You are excited about helping veterinarians and improving horse welfare globally.



Important Notes

1. This is not a role for someone who requires constant direction or simply executes tasks without thinking. We need a self-starter who takes ownership of results. If you need hand-holding, this is not the role for you.



2. Agencies will be ignored. We are looking for an in-house tea
mber for the long term.



3. We are an entirely English-speaking team. Fluency in verbal and written English is non-negotiable. You must be comfortable and confident communicating complex technical issues clearly to our team. Our current team is based in Australia (3), United States (1), The Philippines (4) and India (1).



How to Apply



When you prepare your application for this role., please provide the following:



1. Please share a brief summary of your Meta Ads experience and the largest monthly spend you have managed.

2. An example of a complex Business Manager/Asset issue you resolved.

3. A short explanation of how you approach "Creative Testing."

4.This is a full-time role (40 hours/week) designed for someone looking to grow with us long-term. Please confirm your availability for this schedule. If you are an exceptional candidate but have a minor existing commitment, please specify the maximum number of hours you can consistently dedicate to us each week.

5. We are based in Australia, please confirm you are available to work from 9am - 5pm Brisbane time.

title: Accounts Receivable (AR) Specialist – QuickBooks Online Expert
description:
About Us:

Axis Water Technologies is a growing, fast-paced company focused on delivering high-quality water treatment solutions across multiple markets. We are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented Accounts Receivable (AR) Specialist to join our team and help maintain the financial health and accuracy of our operations.



Position Overview:



We are seeking an AR expert who understands the full accounting cycle—not just invoicing and collections. This role requires someone who can confidently work within QuickBooks Online, understands how transactions impact financial statements, and takes ownership of keeping receivables accurate, current, and aggressively managed.



This person must be strong in communication, and completing tasks and understanding how AR affects the Balance Sheet and Profit & Loss Statement.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage Accounts Receivable, request remittances, payment matching, and account reconciliation

Reconcile customer accounts and give notice of billing discrepancies

Maintain accurate records and support financial reporting with clean, audit-ready books

Work closely with internal teams and customers to resolve account issues quickly



Qualifications:

 Certified in QuickBooks Online (REQUIRED)

 Strong understanding of accounting principles, including how AR impacts the Balance Sheet & Profit and Loss Statement

 Proven experience in Accounts Receivable, Bookkeeping

 High attention to detail and accuracy

 Strong organizational and time management skills

 Self-motivated, dependable, and able to meet deadlines



What We’re Looking For:

A driven and dedicated professional who takes ownership of accounts

Someone who understands that AR is not just posting payments—it’s protecting the financial health of the company

A strong communicator who can be professional, and solutions-oriented

A team player who is proactive and thrives in a fast-paced environment

title: E-Commerce Shipping Analyst
description:
E-Commerce Shipping Analyst

Full-Time | US Mountain Standard Time (MST)



Overview

We are seeking a highly analytical E-Commerce Shipping Analyst to own and optimize our DTC shipping costs and performance, with a direct impact on margin and efficiency. This role focuses on understanding what we’re being charged, identifying cost drivers, and improving shipping efficiency across every order.

This is not a traditional shipping or warehouse role. You will focus on analyzing parcel shipping costs (UPS, FedEx, USPS), improving packaging and dimensional efficiency, and optimizing shipping logic to reduce overall cost and improve ROI.



Key Responsibilities

Shipping Cost Analysis & Optimization



Analyze shipping costs across parcel shipments to identify key cost drivers (zones, dimensional weight, surcharges, service levels)

Develop reports and insights to track cost-per-shipment and identify savings opportunities

Identify and implement initiatives to reduce shipping costs and improve overall efficiency

Carrier & Service Optimization



Evaluate carrier performance, rates, and service levels

Optimize carrier mix, service selection, and shipping rules based on cost and performance

Support rate reviews and ensure accurate billing across carriers

Packaging & Dimensional Optimization



Optimize packaging, carton sizes, and master pack quantities to reduce dimensional weight and shipping costs

Conduct packaging and dimensional weight experiments to validate cost-saving opportunities

Improve cube utilization and overall shipping efficiency

Shipping Systems & Data



Work within shipping platforms (e.g., Shippo or similar) to improve automation and shipping logic

Maintain accurate shipping data and reporting systems

Audit carrier invoices and identify discrepancies, refunds, and surcharge issues

Cross-Functional Collaboration



Collaborate with warehouse and product teams to implement packaging and shipping improvements

Help improve shipping workflows, rules, and operational efficiency





Qualifications

Core Requirements



2–5+ years of experience in shipping, logistics, e-commerce operations, or transportation analysis

Experience with parcel shipping (UPS, FedEx, USPS) in a DTC or e-commerce environment

Strong understanding of shipping cost drivers (dimensional weight, zones, surcharges, etc.)

Analytical Skills



Proficiency in Excel for data analysis and reporting

Ability to identify patterns, cost drivers, and optimization opportunities

Highly analytical, detail-oriented, and cost-focused

Nice to Have



Experience with shipping platforms (Shippo, ShipStation, EasyPost, etc.)

Experience with packaging optimization or dimensional weight reduction

Familiarity with LTL or freight shipping



Schedule

Full-time position

Must work US Mountain Standard Time (MST) hours



TO APPLY:

Please apply with 8 or more apply points

Attach your resume

Subject line to say " E-Commerce Shipping Analyst "

*Strong problem solver who anticipates needs and creates systems

*Comfortable supporting across multiple areas (marketing, operations, personal tasks)

*Thinks like an owner, not just an assistant

*Thrives in a fast-moving, multi-faceted environment

*Loves bringing structure and organization to multiple areas

*Takes pride in doing things exceptionally well

*Must be female



What You’ll Do:



Must-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Must Be Proficient In)

These are the tasks you need to handle independently and confidently from day one:



Executive, Administrative, and Business Support:

*Schedule and coordinate appointments, meetings, and commitments

*Follow up on tasks and ensure deadlines are met

*Coordinate with tea
mbers, vendors, and contractors

Personal & Household Support:

*Order and track supplies for both home and business

*Ensure my schedule is realistic, organized, and optimized



Social Media & Content Execution (Execution-Focused):

*Engage with followers, respond to comments and DMs, and maintain relationships with past clients

Rental Property Support:

These tasks are valuable but can be trained on the job:

Ready to Apply?

3. Indicate your contact

title: Lead Video Editor – (TikTok & Instagram)
description:
We are seeking a Lead Video Editor to serve as the creative backbone of our agency. You will be responsible for executing our proprietary playbook and currently trending video formats, designed specifically to convert on TikTok Shop and Instagram (eventually Instagram Shop). You are not just making social media posts; you are creating high-end digital commercials that drive affiliate revenue. Part with growth potential to full time. 



[RESPONSIBILITIES]



The "Garde" Playbook: Edit high-converting, vertical videos (9:16) designed specifically for the TikTok Shop and Instagram algorithms.



Advanced Typography: Seamlessly integrate sophisticated, magazine-quality text overlays to elevate standard affiliate content.



Color Grading & Pacing: Apply professional color grading to raw product and lifestyle footage to achieve a "Vogue meets journal" aesthetic, while maintaining the fast hook-pacing required for social commerce.



Creative Direction: Help set the visual standard for the agency. When we scale and hire junior editors, your work will be the gold standard they follow.



[RESPONSIBILITIES]



Social Commerce Architecture: Edit high-converting, vertical videos (9:16) for the TikTok Shop Affiliate ecosystem. You must know how to balance a "Native" algorithmic feel with a high-conversion, "shopper" hook.



The "Garde" Playbook: Apply professional color grading and cinematic framing to raw product/lifestyle footage to achieve a luxurious, "Vogue meets journal" aesthetic.



Advanced Typography: Seamlessly integrate sophisticated, magazine-quality text overlays using our brand fonts (Playfair Display, Butler) to elevate standard affiliate content.



Creative Direction: Help set the visual standard for the agency. When we scale and hire junior editors, your work will be the gold standard they follow.



[REQUIREMENTS]



The Software: You must be an expert in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or After Effects. (While these are for TikTok/IG, this role requires desktop-level precision, layering, and grading that mobile apps cannot provide).



The Platform DNA: You deeply understand what works on TikTok Shop and Instagram right now, but you know how to elevate those trends visually so they look expensive.



The Eye: You understand the power of white space, cinematic pacing, and sophisticated design. "Busy," "cheesy," or overly aggressive edits will not work here.



Experience: A proven track record of editing for premium brands, luxury markets, or high-performing e-commerce/affiliate accounts.



[HOW TO APPLY]



Start your application with the word "GARDE" so I know you possess strong attention to detail.



Send a link to your portfolio. I only want to see your best vertical (9:16) work for TikTok or Instagram. Show me 3 examples of cinematic, high-end, or editorial video.



Answer this: How do you balance the need for a fast, attention-grabbing TikTok "hook" with a high-end, luxurious visual aesthetic?

title: Senior Customer Service Representative
description:
HVAC Supply is hiring a Senior Customer Service Representative to be a primary point of contact for our customers — handling everything from order entry and quoting to proactive account outreach and resolving service issues. This is a senior-level seat for someone who's done the job before, knows distribution, and can operate independently in a remote setting.

You'll work directly with customers, our sales team, and operations to make sure orders move smoothly, pricing is accurate, problems get solved fast, and accounts feel taken care of. Because this role spans inside sales, order management, and support, we're looking for someone who's comfortable wearing all three hats in a single day.

What you'll do



Take inbound calls,
s, and orders from customers — entering orders accurately and quoting pricing in our ERP

Proactively reach out to assigned accounts to check in, surface opportunities, and grow wallet share

Resolve service issues end-to-end: tracking, returns, backorders, billing questions, product substitutions

Partner with outside sales reps on shared accounts — keeping them in the loop on activity and flagging risks or opportunities

Work cross-functionally with purchasing, warehouse, and accounting to keep orders flowing and customers informed

Maintain clean records in the ERP and follow internal pricing/process standards

Help mentor junior CSRs informally and contribute to improving how the team works



What we're looking for



5+ years of customer service or inside sales experience, ideally in distribution, wholesale, or B2B

Strong ERP fluency — Advantive experience is a big plus; comfort with any distribution ERP (Epicor, Infor, NetSuite, Eclipse, Prophet 21, etc.) is welcome

Confidence on the phone and in writing — you can de-escalate, sell, and explain technical product details with equal ease

Sharp attention to detail with pricing, part numbers, and order accuracy

Self-directed — remote work means we need someone who manages their own day without hand-holding

Solid tech setup at home and comfort using multiple systems (ERP,
, chat, possibly CRM and eCommerce platforms)



Nice to have



Familiarity with our product categories

Experience supporting an eCommerce channel (Shopify or similar) alongside traditional orders

History training or mentoring other CSRs

title: Freight Billing Specialist
description:
GH Logistics is a growing freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and refrigerated freight. Built on disciplined systems, structured SOPs, and financial accuracy, we operate with a strong focus on execution, accountability, and real-time visibility.



As we scale nationally, we are hiring a Freight Billing Specialist to serve as a critical financial control point across both load validation and carrier invoicing workflows, ensuring loads and invoices are accurate, fully documented, dispute-free, and ready for Finance and factoring.



Role Overview

You will act as the final gatekeeper before loads and invoices move to Finance and factoring, ensuring every load is fully validated first, then properly invoiced and submitted. This role requires flexibility, ownership, and the ability to operate across both functions without compromising accuracy or SOP compliance.



What You’ll Be Doing



Load Validation

• Validate all loads before final status (Completed, Cancelled, or TONU)

• Ensure every load reaches complete status (fully documented, financially accurate, dispute-free)

• Review and correct load statuses in TMS

• Enforce complete documentation (BOL, POD, white slips, rate confirmations, accessorials)

• Upload and verify documents in TMS and ELD systems

• Confirm financial accuracy (rates, TONU logic, FSC, accessorials, fines)

• Own and investigate carrier disputes before escalation

• Apply correct TONU vs Cancel determinations

• Maintain structured, audit ready notes on every load

• Prevent incomplete or inaccurate loads from reaching Finance

• Prepare validated loads for invoicing and factoring submission



Carrier Invoicing

• Upload and process carrier invoices accurately in TMS

• Verify invoice amounts against rate confirmations and approved charges

• Ensure all required documents are complete (POD, BOL, detention, lumper, etc.)

• Request and follow up on missing or incomplete invoices

• Coordinate with carriers and factoring companies for documentation

• Identify discrepancies and escalate with proper support

• Submit validated loads to factoring companies per requirements

• Resolve Held, Rejected, and Denied invoices

• Maintain structured, audit-ready invoice records

• Prevent incomplete or unsupported invoices from reaching Finance



What Success Looks Like

• 95%+ of loads reach Finance without rework

• 0 missing documents (POD, white slips, etc.) at billing stage

• 0 financial discrepancies identified by Finance

• All loads and invoices are fully audit-ready

• Minimal disputes due to documentation or validation errors

• Loads and invoices processed within 24–48 hours

• Factoring submissions meet compliance standards



Required Skills & Qualifications

• Experience in US freight brokerage, load auditing, QA, carrier billing, or operations

• Strong understanding of dry van & refrigerated freight

• Knowledge of TONU, rate confirmations, accessorials, and FSC

• Familiarity with TMS, ELD, and tracking systems

• Experience with factoring companies (preferred)

• Strong documentation discipline and audit mindset

• High attention to financial accuracy and detail

• Ability to enforce SOPs without shortcuts

• Strong written and verbal English communication

• Minimum 45–50 WPM typing speed

• Comfortable working in a structured, accountability-driven environment

• Ability to shift priorities between validation and invoicing workflows



Work Setup & Schedule

• Full Time | 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (San Antonio time)

• Must work U.S. business hours

• Collaborative Zoom-based work environment (camera on)

• Time tracking tools used for accountability



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Independent Contractor Setup

• $75 monthly insurance stipend (eligibility begins 30 days after hire)

• SOP-driven operational systems

• High impact financial control role across two critical workflows

• Direct involvement in revenue protection and billing accuracy

• Performance based growth opportunities

• Structured training and certification path



If you take pride in closing operational loops, enforcing standards, and ensuring financial accuracy from validation to invoicing, this role is designed for you.



Apply here: 
/team/
/GHApplicationForm

title: Dispatch Operations Specialist
description:
AJG Transport (GH Logistics Affiliate) is a US based asset carrier operating 150+ company trucks on dedicated government contract freight. We run 365 days a year on consistent, contracted routes across 48 states. We're scaling fast with new markets, new lanes, new teams, and we need operators who can keep up.



This isn't a BPO. This isn't a call center. You'll be embedded in a real U.S. logistics operation working alongside American dispatchers, drivers, and carriers on live freight.



Role Overview

You're an operator working directly alongside our dispatch and freight management team, handling the higher complexity operational work that keeps our network running. Think of this as the role that handles what most people can't, the exceptions, the escalations, the details that make or break a load.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Monitor and manage active loads across our network. Tracking, status updates, carrier and driver communication, and exception handling. You own the load from pickup to delivery.

• Verify data accuracy, documentation completeness, and process compliance across active loads. Catch problems before they become expensive.

• Conduct check calls, appointment scheduling, detention tracking, rate confirmations. You're the voice on the phone making sure freight moves on time.

• Respond to driver inquiries, route them to the right internal team, document issues. Drivers call with problems and you solve them or escalate them fast.

• Ensure accurate data on TMS for Loads, rates, stops, and documents. Everything in our systems needs to be accurate. You're the last line of defense before bad data creates bad decisions.

• Identify recurring issues, flag inefficiencies, and recommend fixes. We don't want someone who just follows a checklist. We want someone who makes the checklist better.

• Report daily and weekly ops summaries for US leadership.

• Know what you can solve vs. what needs to go up the chain, and route it fast. No sitting on problems.



Who We’re Looking For

• 2+ years experience in freight brokerage, dispatch, or logistics operations. NOT GENERAL VA WORK. We need someone who already knows what a BOL is, what detention means, and how a load moves from quote to delivery.

• Hands on experience with TMS platforms such as McLeod, Aljex, Turvo, or similar. If you've dispatched loads in a real system, we want to talk to you.

• Familiarity with load boards such as DAT, Truckstop, Highway or similar. You've sourced carriers or managed freight on these platforms before.

• Strong written and verbal English. You'll be on calls and
s with US based drivers, carriers, and leadership daily. This is non negotiable.

• Night shift in PH availability — You'll work U.S. business hours. CST timezone alignment preferred (example: 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST/CDT = 8:00 PM – 6:00 AM PHT). 

• Self-directed. You don't wait to be told what to do. You see the problem, you fix it, you report it. If you need someone holding your hand, this isn't the role.



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full time permanent remote role

• Direct Hire to a US Company (not agency or BPO)

• Current needed shifts: 7 AM – 5 PM CDT | 3 PM - 1 AM CDT | 11 PM - 9 AM CDT (San Antonio time)

• Reliable home office setup and back up internet and power stations

• Zoom presence required (camera on throughout shift)

• Possible Hubstaff time tracking during shifts, but is not currently in use.



What You'll Get

• $7/hr USD. Paid consistently biweekly. No delayed payments and no excuses.

• Independent Contractor Setup

• $75 monthly insurance stipend (eligibility begins 30 days after hire)

• Stable & long-term position. This is not project-based nor seasonal. We're building a team and we need people who want to build with us.

• Growth path. 90 day performance review with opportunity to advance into senior operations roles as we scale. We're growing fast and the people who prove themselves early get the best opportunities.

• Direct access to U.S. executive leadership. You're not buried in a call center reporting to a middle manager in Manila. You work directly with our operations team in Texas and Tennessee.

• Real operations work. Live freight, real drivers, real carriers, real money on the line. This isn't data entry with a fancy title.



Who Thrives Here

• People who've worked in a U.S. freight brokerage or 3PL and want something more stable

• Former dispatchers or carrier reps who are tired of BPO environments

• Operators who take ownership. You don't clock in and zone out. You run your loads like they are your business.

• People who want to grow into leadership but need the right company to do it in.



Who This Isn't For

• General VAs looking for easy remote work. This is real logistics and not admin tasks.

• People who need constant supervision or step by step instructions for every task

• Anyone who can't commit to US shift hours consistently

• Candidates without actual freight/logistics experience. We don't have time to teach the basics.



How to Apply:

title: Business Development & Sales Manager
description:
Business Development & Sales Manager

Full Time, Remote, EST Hours

About the Company

Our client is a luxury hanger company with premium, handcrafted products designed

by Rolls Royce engineers. The product is unrivaled in quality, ranging from $125-

$250 per unit, and has been featured at prestigious events including the Grammys,

The Masters, and F1 races. The company currently has over $1 million in inventory

and is undergoing a strategic pivot to focus on direct sales and brand partnerships.

the sales pipeline and strategy. This is a high-impact role with significant autonomy,

a dedicated budget, and the opportunity to build a sales operation from the ground

up. You will work directly with the owner and manage a lead generation tea
mber,

while implementing a strategic approach to B2B sales focused on authorized

retailers, high-end distributors, and luxury market segments.

? Market Analysis: Identify and target high-end retail partners, luxury

distributors, and niche markets (e.g., climate-controlled storage services for

segments

mber(s)

What You Will NOT Be Doing

tea
mber(s))

Ideal Candidate Profile

commerce

management

 B2B sales strategy and pipeline management

CRM software experience (you'll recommend which platform to

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Ability to work independently with regular check-ins

Strategic thinking and problem-solving

Mindset: Entrepreneurial, resourceful, and comfortable in a startup-like

environment with significant autonomy



Please reply with a link to your resume, your desired rate of pay and any EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating Systems) experience you may have.

title: Track and Trace Assistant
description:
GH Logistics is a high performance freight brokerage and asset based logistics company specializing in dry van and reefer freight. We move quickly, but we move with structure. Our operation is built on real time visibility, disciplined execution, and clear communication. We take pride in keeping freight organized, on track, and moving cleanly from pickup to delivery. If you’re someone who enjoys staying engaged, solving live challenges, and being part of a fast moving operations team, you’ll feel right at home here.



Role Overview

As a Track & Trace Assistant, you serve as part of the operational backbone, ensuring shipments are accurately monitored, risks are identified early, and critical information reaches the right people at the right time. if you thrive behind the scenes keeping operations running smoothly, this role is an excellent fit.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Updating assigned sections of the Tracking Dashboard with accurate ETAs, locations, mileage, and notes

• Communicating with carriers via
 and internal channels to gather updates or resolve missing information

• Verifying that carriers are properly assigned, accepted, and actively tracking in required platforms

• Monitoring multiple communication channels to prevent missed updates

• Proactively flagging delays, risks, and irregularities, and escalating when necessary

• Coordinating with the Booking Team to confirm ETAs for time sensitive shipments

• Ensuring clean shift handoffs through verbal (Zoom) and written updates

• Follows instructions consistently and executes with precision

• Team oriented, coachable, and open to feedback without ego



What Success Looks Like

• Assigned tracking sections are consistently accurate and up to date

• Scheduled updates are sent on time

• Critical shipments are monitored closely and handled with urgency from start to finish

• Carrier tracking and acceptance issues are caught early

• Issues are communicated clearly, both verbally and in writing

• Shift handoffs are smooth, complete, and well documented



Who We’re Looking For

• Has experience in US logistics, freight brokerage, or track & trace

• Familiar with US geography and US logistics trucking operations (a plus)

• Highly organized and comfortable working with multiple spreadsheets, dashboards, and group chats

• Understands urgency and prioritization in a live freight environment

• Communicates clearly and professionally via chat and

• Can monitor multiple shipments at once without losing accuracy

• Pays strong attention to detail and uses sound judgment when issues arise

• Follows instructions consistently and values clean processes

• Works well with a team and is open to feedback and coaching. Collaborates without resistance or ego



Why Join GH Logistics?

• Independent Contractor Setup

• $75 monthly insurance stipend (eligibility begins 30 days after hire)

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance based advancement



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time Remote Role| Direct Hire to US Company

• Current Shift Availability: 7 AM - 5 PM CDT & 11 PM - 9 AM CDT

• Other shifts (only if assigned): 3 PM - 1 AM CDT

• Zoom presence (with camera open and unmuted audio) required

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support



This role is built for someone who genuinely enjoys following freight in motion, monitoring shipments, confirming updates, and making sure deliveries stay on track. If you like staying proactive, spotting risks before they become problems, and keeping operations running smoothly behind the scenes, you’ll fit right in.

title: Part-Time Google & Meta Ads Coordinator (Remote)
description:
Job Title: Part-Time Google & Meta Ads Coordinator (Remote)

Company: Connect My Church

Pay: $300/month

Hours: ~15 hours per week



ABOUT CONNECT MY CHURCH

Connect My Church is a platform dedicated to helping churches and Christian non-profits grow, communicate, and reach more people effectively. We work with ministries across the country to generate leads, promote events, and expand their impact through digital marketing.



We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Ads Coordinator to help execute and manage campaigns that make a real difference. If you take pride in accuracy, enjoy working with performance data, and want consistent part-time work with a mission-driven team, this role is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Set up Google Ads and Meta 
/Instagram) campaigns from provided briefs

* Upload ad creatives, copy, and targeting settings accurately

* Follow naming conventions and campaign structure consistently

* Check campaigns multiple times per week for performance and delivery issues

* Pause underperforming ads based on defined thresholds

* Identify disapproved ads or anomalies and flag them quickly

* Suggest basic improvements when issues are identified

* Install Meta Pixel and Google Ads conversion tracking

* Verify events are firing correctly using platform tools

* Assist with Google Tag Manager setup when needed

* Deliver a clear weekly performance report (AI tool usage encouraged)

* Track key metrics: CPL, CTR, CPC, conversions

* Proactively surface unusual trends or performance concerns



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



* You have launched
 or Google Ads campaign from setup to live

* You have independently installed a Meta Pixel or Google conversion tracking and verified it was working

* You are detail-oriented and catch mistakes before they become problems

* Strong written English and reliable communication

* Organized, dependable, and able to manage your time effectively

* Comfortable being measured on performance metrics

* Comfortable using time-tracking software to track working hours

* As a quick attention-to-detail check, include the phrase "I'm your next detail-oriented Ad Specialist" in the subject line of your application



NICE TO HAVE



* Experience with Google Tag Manager

* Experience with lead generation campaigns

* Familiarity with spreadsheet-based reporting

* Experience using GoHighLevel (CRM, funnels, or automation)



WORK REQUIREMENT



* This role requires the use of time-tracking software during working hours

* You must be comfortable tracking your time consistently while completing assigned tasks

NOTE: We do not micromanage, but we do expect all employees to track hours for basic accountability



HOW TO APPLY

Please include:



* A brief summary of your Google Ads and/or Meta Ads experience

* Whether you've installed a Meta Pixel or Google conversion tracking — and how you tested it

* Why you're a good fit for a detail-focused, mission-driven role



We're excited to find someone reliable who wants to grow with a team that serves Christian churches and ministries.

title: Video Editor
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Alloy is a growth partner for association management companies across the U.S. We’re looking for a

Video Production Specialist to join our team and produce high-volume, polished video content

across a range of formats—from marketing campaigns to educational content to social media.

You’ll be our go-to person for all things video. That means you should be just as comfortable editing

a talking-head interview as you are assembling a complex piece with mixed assets like motion

graphics, screen recordings, and slide-based visuals. Because we work with multiple clients across

different industries and brand voices, you’ll need to adapt your style and creative approach to match

each client’s tone, aesthetic, and audience.



This is not a “wait for footage” role. Our clients rarely have existing video assets, so you’ll need to be

a resourceful creator who can build compelling content from scratch using stock footage, AI-

generated media, motion graphics, and original assets. You’ll work alongside strategists and account

managers who handle ideation and client relationships, but you’ll have significant creative ownership

over how content comes to life.



WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON

   • Marketing videos — promotional content, brand storytelling, product explainers, and

campaign assets

   • Talking-head videos — clean, professional edits with dynamic pacing, lower thirds, b-roll

cutaways, and branded overlays

   • Webinar and presentation edits — transforming raw webinar recordings and slide decks

into polished, engaging content

   • E-course and learning content — lesson videos for online courses, including multi-format

edits that blend talking head, slides, screen captures, and graphics

   • Social media clips — short-form vertical and horizontal cuts optimized for Instagram,

TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

   • Mixed-asset production — assembling final videos from a variety of source materials

including talking-head footage, motion graphics, static graphics, and audio tracks

   • Stock footage and AI-generated content — sourcing, curating, and creatively repurposing

stock footage and AI-generated visuals to build narratives when original footage is

unavailable

   • Template and asset library management — maintaining organized project files, branded

templates, and reusable asset libraries to support high-volume output without sacrificing

quality



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



Must-Have

   • Proven experience in video production and post-production, with a portfolio that

demonstrates range across multiple video formats



Adobe Creative Suite proficiency:



– Premiere Pro — your primary editing environment

– After Effects — for motion graphics, compositing, and visual polish

– Photoshop — for asset creation, thumbnail design, and graphic prep

– Audition — for audio cleanup, mixing, and mastering



AI video tool fluency — you actively use AI-powered tools (e.g., Runway, Descript, HeyGen,

ElevenLabs, Opus Clip, CapCut, Pika, or similar) to accelerate production without sacrificing quality.

This is a major requirement—we want someone who is already integrating AI into their workflow, not

just curious about it.



   • Familiarity with AI-powered research and scripting workflows (e.g., Google NotebookLM,

Claude, ChatGPT) for content development and scripting support

   • Demonstrated ability to build polished video content from stock footage, screen recordings,

and limited source material—you don’t wait for perfect assets to start creating

   • Strong eye for quality—every deliverable should feel polished and professional, whether it’s

a 15-second social clip or a 45-minute course module

   • Ability to work with mixed media—comfortable combining talking-head footage, motion

graphics, static slides, screen recordings, and audio into cohesive final products

   • Strong eye for pacing, color grading, typography, and sound design

   • Comfortable working across formats: horizontal (YouTube/web), vertical

(Reels/TikTok/Shorts), and square (social)

   • Reliable communication and availability—responsive, proactive, and comfortable working

asynchronously across time zones



Nice-to-Have

   • Animation skills (2D motion design, character animation, kinetic typography, Lottie, etc.)

   • Experience with color grading and advanced audio design

   • Familiarity with YouTube optimization (thumbnails, chapters, end screens)

   • Experience producing content for marketing funnels or growth campaigns

   • Experience in an agency or white-label environment serving multiple brands

   • Familiarity with the HOA, property management, or real estate industry

   • Basic knowledge of SEO and social media distribution strategies for video content

   • Experience with DaVinci Resolve or other editing platforms

   • Illustration, graphic design, or 3D motion skills

   • Ability to work from creative briefs with minimal hand-holding



WHAT WE OFFER

   • Fully remote position with flexible scheduling

   • The opportunity to shape a growing creative function from the ground up

   • A collaborative, low-ego team that values speed, quality, and resourcefulness

   • Exposure to a wide variety of client industries and creative challenges

   • Room to grow as our video capabilities expand across the client portfolio



HOW TO APPLY

Please submit:



1. Your portfolio or showreel — we want to see range. Include examples of talking-head

edits, mixed-asset videos, social clips, and any course/webinar content you’ve produced.

Bonus points for work where you built something compelling without much source material.

2. A brief note on your AI workflow — tell us which AI tools you use, how you use them, and

how they’ve improved your speed or output quality.

3. Your availability and preferred working hours.

We value speed, quality, and creative problem-solving. If you’re someone who’s constantly leveling

up your toolkit and can deliver professional-grade video content efficiently, we’d love to hear from

you.

4. 2–3 minute video intro (Loom or Drive link)

5. Please share your video portfolio



***  Incomplete applications will not be reviewed. ***

title: Local SEO Specialist - Google Business Profile & Map Pack Expert
description:
Who we are



Alloy Growth Partners is a U.S.-based growth agency that works exclusively with HOA management companies — the firms that professionally manage residential communities and homeowner associations across the country. It's a large, competitive, and underserved industry, and we're the only agency built specifically for it.



Our team brings 35+ combined years of experience inside this industry. We know it from the inside out — and we build marketing, SEO, and growth systems that actually move the needle for our clients. Our mission: growth should be engineered, not hoped for.



The role



We're looking for a full-time Local SEO Specialist who owns Google Business Profile performance end-to-end for our clients. You live in the local search landscape — map packs, GBP signals, local citations, ranking factors — and you have the results to prove it.



This is not a generalist SEO role. We need someone who has done the hands-on work of moving clients into the local 3-pack in competitive markets and keeping them there. You'll manage multiple client accounts, track and report on ranking progress, and work closely with our content and web teams to make sure every local signal is aligned.



A key part of this role is the ability to audit existing local SEO strategies — including diagnosing over-reliance on aggressive tactics — and build clean, sustainable ranking foundations that hold up long-term. If you've managed ranking transitions and know how to protect a listing while shifting strategies, that experience matters here.



What you'll own

— Manage, optimize, and monitor Google Business Profile listings for multiple HOA management clients across U.S. markets

— Build and execute local SEO strategies designed to move clients into and up within the local map pack

— Audit existing local SEO setups — assess signal quality, identify risk, and build transition plans where needed

— Audit and maintain local citation profiles — NAP consistency, duplicate listings, directory accuracy

— Develop and manage review generation systems; monitor and respond to reviews strategically

— Identify and resolve GBP issues, suspensions, policy violations, and ranking drops — fast

— Track ranking performance using local SEO toolsets; benchmark against competitors and flag opportunities

— Coordinate with content and web teams to align on-page local signals with GBP strategy

— Deliver clear, consistent ranking reports that translate data into action items — not just charts

— Stay current on Google's local algorithm updates, GBP policy changes, and industry developments

— Manage your workload and deadlines in 



What we're looking for



Non-negotiables

— 3+ years of hands-on local SEO experience with a provable track record of map pack results

— Deep, current expertise in Google Business Profile optimization — categories, attributes, posts, Q&A, photos, products, and beyond

— Real examples of moving clients into the local 3-pack in competitive markets — you must be able to show your work

— Experience managing GBP for multiple clients or locations simultaneously

— Proficiency with local SEO tools: BrightLocal, Whitespark, Semrush Local, or equivalent

— Strong understanding of local ranking factors — proximity, relevance, prominence, and behavioral signals

— Ability to audit existing strategies, identify signal risk, and manage clean ranking transitions

— Ability to diagnose ranking problems systematically and build clear remediation plans

— Fluent, professional English — written and verbal

— Highly organized, detail-oriented, and accountable across multiple client accounts



Strong pluses

— Experience in HOA management, property management, or real estate

— 
 or comparable project management platform experience

— Familiarity with local link building, geo-targeted landing pages, and local schema markup

— Experience troubleshooting GBP suspensions and reinstatement

— Knowledge of review platform integrations and automated review generation workflows



What working at Alloy looks like



We operate with clear systems, defined processes, and high accountability. Everyone on the team knows what they own, how success is measured, and how their work connects to client results. We move fast, communicate clearly, and don't tolerate ambiguity sitting unaddressed.



We're a remote team, which means you'll need to be self-directed and proactive — not waiting to be told what to do next. If you thrive with ownership and hate being micromanaged, you'll fit.



How to Apply

Please submit all of the following:



— Updated Resume (PDF format)



— 2–3 minute Introduction Video (Loom, Google Drive, or similar link)

Briefly introduce yourself

Share your experience with Local SEO and Google Business Profile

Highlight specific results (e.g., moving clients into the local 3-pack)



— Portfolio or Case Studies (if available)

Examples of GBP listings you’ve managed

Before-and-after results, rankings, or performance metrics



— Answers to the following questions:

Describe a time you moved a client into the Google local 3-pack. What was your strategy?

How do you audit a Google Business Profile and identify ranking issues?

What local SEO tools have you used, and how do you use them in your workflow?

title: Design Operations Associate
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly organized Design Operations Associate to support our architectural and design team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys working behind the scenes, and can keep projects, people, and systems running smoothly.



You will play a key role in ensuring the design department operates efficiently by handling administrative tasks, coordinating workflows, managing resources, and supporting the team in meeting deadlines and delivering high-quality work.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Provide efficient virtual office management support, including accurate processing of invoices, maintaining digital records, and assisting with online procurement tasks.

- Assist and coordinate with designers to ensure project tracking data is accurate and up to date.

- Help manage team accounts, assist with logins, and provide guidance on using tools such as Docusign, Dialpad, Lark Payment Requests, and others.

- Support designers with operational tasks such as sending documents via Docusign, submitting payment requests, scheduling meetings, coordinating projects, and working with other departments.

- Coordinate with consultants, request proposals, assist in scheduling site visits, track progress, and ensure timely submission of payments.

- Support the recruiting process for the design department by collating applicants from different platforms and scheduling interviews for shortlisted candidates.

- Ensure proper folder management and that all necessary documents are correctly stored in project folders.

- Assist in client contract processing by coordinating with sales, engineering, and finance teams, helping with contract drafting, payment reminders, and maintaining meeting records.

- Understand construction project processes, including phases, timelines, and deliverables, to help ensure smooth contract and project flow.

- Perform other tasks as needed to support the operations of the design team.



What We’re Looking For

- Bachelor's degree in Architecture, Engineering, or a related field.

- Proven experience in a project coordination, operations, or administrative role, preferably in a design-related environment.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, etc.).

- Basic knowledge of Revit, AutoCAD, and Bluebeam.

- Strong communication and presentation skills.

- Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail and accuracy.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

- Knowledge of industry-specific standards, if applicable.



Why This Role is a Great Fit

- Long-term, stable remote role with a growing design team

- Work closely with architects, designers, and project managers

- Opportunity to grow within operations and project coordination

- Exposure to real-world architectural and construction workflows



How to Apply

Please submit your application along with your resume and a brief note/portfolio about your experience in operations, or any relevant experience.

title: Executive Assistant (Operations & Development-Real Estate)
description:
About Us

We are a premier U.S.-based real estate development and home building group with a heavy footprint in the San Francisco Bay Area. Our portfolio focuses on high-quality residential projects, ranging from ADUs and single-family homes to large-scale community developments. We value speed, clarity, and excellence. We are seeking a high-performance Executive Assistant who thrives in a fast-moving, execution-heavy environment.



Position Summary

The Executive Assistant (EA) will directly support the VP of Development / Chief Asset Management Officer with daily communications, scheduling, and rigorous execution follow-through. You will act as an operational partner, ensuring that land acquisition, project entitlement, and permitting tasks move forward without friction. This role requires exceptional organizational skills and a strong background in real estate development or architectural operations.



Key Responsibilities

1. Communication & Stakeholder Triage

- Manage and filter high-volume inboxes; draft concise, professional replies to city officials, architects, and contractors.

- Track correspondence with partners, consultants, and clients to ensure zero communication backlog.

- Maintain a professional tone in all high-stakes external communications.



2. Task & Project Management

- Maintain and update complex project trackers in Lark, Google Sheets, or Salesforce.

- Proactively follow up with internal teams and external consultants to ensure project milestones (permitting, site visits, and escrow) stay on schedule.

- Help implement and manage CRM or task automation systems to streamline project workflows.



3. Scheduling & Cross-Border Coordination

- Manage calendars across multiple entities and time zones (U.S.–Asia).

- Schedule internal team syncs, consultant meetings, site visits, and board meetings.

- Prepare detailed agendas and distribute "Action-Item" recap notes with a clear reminder system for all parties involved.



4. Document & Research Support

- Organize and maintain digital files (blueprints, permits, and reports) in Dropbox/Box.

- Assist in preparing project presentations, meeting briefs, and development progress summaries.

- Support real estate development research, including zoning analysis and city-specific ordinance tracking.



Qualifications

- Experience: Minimum 2+ years supporting senior executives in Real Estate Development, Architectural Design, Home Building or related fields.

- Industry Knowledge: Understanding of residential project flow (LOIs, pro formas, and permitting timelines).

- Tech Stack: High proficiency in Lark, Google Workspace,and Dropbox, Microsoft Suites, Canva and project management softwares.

- Language: Excellent written and spoken English

- Presence: Sharp, organized, detail-oriented, discreet, and proactive.



Compensation & Structure

- Full-time remote role with partial Pacific Time overlap.

- Competitive base salary/retainer + performance bonuses.

- Long-term growth potential within the investment and operations leadership track.



Submit your resume in a pdf format.

title: Virtual Manager (Yoga Studios)
description:
Studio Operations Manager — Remote

We're looking for an organized, proactive Yoga & Pilates Operations Manager to support the day-to-day running of our yoga studio locations. This is a fully remote role focused on keeping scheduling and inventory running smoothly across multiple locations so classes stay full and studios stay stocked.



What You'll Do:

- Scheduling

Build and maintain weekly class schedules across locations

Coordinate instructor availability and flag conflicts in advance

Handle last-minute schedule changes and communicate updates to relevant parties

Track class capacity and flag low-booking sessions for review



- Inventory & Stock

Monitor studio supply levels across locations and submit reorder requests (on-site staff will tell you about stock)

Maintain a running inventory log and flag shortages proactively

Communicate with suppliers or local contacts to coordinate deliveries

Track stock-related expenses and report to ownership



- General Operations

Respond to operational questions and escalate issues appropriately

Maintain organized records and shared documents

Communicate clearly and promptly — you're the connective tissue between locations



- What We're Looking For

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
