title: Senior Design Associate (PH)
description:
Join our fast-growing architectural and design firm in the vibrant city of San Jose, backed by AlphaX RE Capital. Specializing in single-family homes, ADUs, SB9 projects, multi-family dwellings, and light industrial developments, our team is dedicated to innovation and excellence. With a full range of real estate services—from land acquisition to project execution—Alignment Architects Inc. offers a unique opportunity for growth and collaboration across disciplines



We at Alignment Architects Inc. are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Senior Design Associate to join our architectural and design firm. In this role, you will take a leadership position in the design department, overseeing drafting, coordinating workflows, mentoring junior staff, and ensuring timely delivery of high-quality architectural projects. This position is essential in driving design excellence, maintaining compliance, and supporting the team in meeting deadlines across residential and commercial developments in California.

.

Responsibilities

• Lead the preparation of detailed construction documents using Revit (required) and CAD for California projects.

• Ensure accurate integration of MEP, Structural, and Civil Engineering plans into architectural design.

• Oversee project coordination with Design Leads, Engineers, and consultants, ensuring seamless workflow.

• Implement rigorous quality control processes to ensure compliance with California Building Codes and City/County Zoning laws.

• Manage project documentation, including schedules, coordination records, and technical reports.

• Represent the design team in client meetings, presentations, and reviews, incorporating feedback into deliverables.

• Prepare and manage complete submission packages for Building Permits across multiple jurisdictions.

• Mentor junior associates, providing guidance on drafting standards, compliance, and project workflows.

• Contribute to workflow optimization and process improvements within the design department.



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Architecture.

• 5–10 years minimum drafting experience in the Architecture/Construction industry. Previous US project experience strongly preferred.

• Revit proficiency is required. Knowledge of AutoCAD, SketchUp, and Bluebeam is a plus.

• Strong leadership and mentoring skills, with proven ability to manage project workflows.

• Excellent communication and presentation skills in English.

• Strong organizational skills, high attention to detail, and accuracy in documentation.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.

• Knowledge of industry-specific standards and California compliance requirements.



Fully Remote

Schedule: 10:00 am – 6:00 pm PST Monday–Friday (1:00 am – 9:00 am PH Time)

title: Medical practica VA
description:
Remote secretarial / administrative assistance for directors of an Australian specialist dermatology practice

- Liaise with medical director daily

- Assist with bookings, templating, triaging and booking referrals, calling patients, confirming bookings

- Manage medicare rejections/queries, and private health fund rejections.queries 

- Assist with miscellaneous life admin queries for director 

- KEY - Experience with Xestro, our medical software, will set applicants apart from others. If no experience, ideally an ability to become a self-trained EXPERT in Xestro,. This cannot be over-emphasised. This is key. 

- We seek someone for this position for medium-long term - this is not a short term post. 

- Interview essential to confirm we are a match



NOTE - 

To set yourself apart from other applicants, please ensure your message to me is:

Tailored to this job specifically

NOT written by AI 

Less than 200 words 

Briefly share the way in which two things have impacted your life: 1) social media and 2) AI. 

Submit your entire message in italic font.

title: Credit Repair Specialist
description:
We are looking for a knowledgeable and experienced Credit Repair Specialist to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of credit reporting, dispute processes, and strategies for improving clients’ credit profiles.



Responsibilities:



Review client credit reports and identify negative, inaccurate, or outdated items

Prepare and submit dispute letters to credit bureaus and creditors

Guide clients through the credit repair process and provide clear updates

Maintain organized records of disputes and client progress

Stay up to date with credit laws and regulations (FCRA, FDCPA, etc.)

Communicate professionally with clients via phone,
, and text



Requirements:



Proven experience in credit repair or a related field

Strong knowledge of credit bureaus, scoring models, and dispute strategies

Strong English communication skills (both verbal and written)

Familiarity with credit repair software (Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, etc. is a plus)

Excellent customer service skills

Detail-oriented and highly organized

Ability to handle sensitive information with confidentiality

Must be familiar with GHL



Preferred:



Experience working with multiple clients at once

Understanding of identity theft, fraud alerts, and credit building strategies



Compensation:



Competitive pay (based on experience)

Flexible work environment



How to Apply:

Please submit your experience, background in credit repair, and any tools/software you’ve used.

title: HubSpot Developer (Expert/Guru)
description:
Company: Upside Capital Holdings



About Upside Capital Holdings:

Upside Capital Holdings is a fast-growing real estate investment firm acquiring and operating multifamily and residential assets at scale. We are building a tech-driven platform to dominate acquisitions, streamline operations, and maximize asset performance.





The Opportunity:

We’re not looking for someone to “manage HubSpot.” We’re looking for someone to own it, rebuild it, and scale it.



This role sits at the center of our revenue engine—directly impacting how we source deals, convert leads, and close opportunities. You’ll architect and execute a high-performance CRM and automation ecosystem that powers acquisitions, leasing, and investor pipelines.



If you’ve built systems that drive real revenue—not just workflows—this is for you.







What You’ll Own:



* Architect and scale our HubSpot CRM to support acquisitions, dispositions, and leasing pipelines

* Build advanced automation systems (lead routing, nurturing, follow-ups, deal progression) that eliminate manual work

* Develop high-converting landing pages, forms, and
 systems that drive inbound deal flow

* Design and implement lead scoring, segmentation, and lifecycle automation tailored to real estate

* Integrate multiple data sources and platforms (lead providers, dialers, property tools, APIs) into a unified system

* Build real-time dashboards and reporting for leadership—pipeline visibility, conversion rates, and deal velocity

* Optimize system performance, speed, and scalability across both CRM and web assets

* Partner directly with acquisitions and leadership to identify bottlenecks and engineer solutions





What We’re Looking For:



* Deep, hands-on expertise in HubSpot CRM, CMS, workflows, and automation

* Proven track record of building systems that directly impact sales or acquisitions performance

* Strong development skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, HubL

* Experience with API integrations and complex system architecture

* Ability to think like an operator—not just a developer

* Comfortable in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment







Strong Advantage:



* Experience in real estate, acquisitions, or high-volume lead generation environments

* Background in optimizing sales funnels and conversion systems

* Experience working with multi-channel lead pipelines (inbound + outbound)





What Success Looks Like:



* A fully optimized, automated CRM that runs the acquisitions engine

* Faster lead response times and measurable lift in conversion rates

* Clear, reliable reporting that leadership actually uses to make decisions

* Systems that scale with the business—without breaking





Why This Role Matters:

This isn’t a support role—it’s a revenue-critical position. The systems you build will directly influence how fast we grow, how many deals we close, and how efficiently we operate.



If you want to build something that actually moves numbers—not just tickets—this is your seat.

title: REMOTE: Outbound Sales Representative / Enrollment Specialist
description:
Outbound Sales Representative / Enrollment Specialist

Brand U Academy | Part-Time Remote Position



Brand U Academy was founded by Best-Selling Author and Award-Winning Digital and Brand Management Consultant Glenda Boone.



Brand U Academy is an online entrepreneurial school that helps female entrepreneurs, creatives, authors, coaches, and women in ministry gain clarity, structure, and strategy so they can develop, manage, and monetize their brands.



We are a mission-driven company that believes women do not need more confusion, more busy work, or more information overload. They need clarity, support, systems, and the right next step.



Our students are purpose-driven women who are building businesses, ministries, books, coaching programs, and digital platforms that speak, serve, and sell.



We are looking for a confident, warm, organized, and results-driven Outbound Sales Representative / Enrollment Specialist to join our growing team.



This is a part-time remote position to start, with the opportunity to grow into full-time, leadership, or sales management opportunities as Brand U Academy continues to expand.



Role Overview



The Outbound Sales Representative / Enrollment Specialist will be responsible for calling, texting, following up with, and nurturing warm leads who have shown interest in Brand U Academy.



These leads may come from paid advertising, Instagram,
, text campaigns, live masterclasses, webinars, Brand U funnels, and other marketing campaigns.



This person will work closely with our Success Advisor and internal team to help leads understand their best next step inside Brand U Academy.



At Brand U Academy, our Success Advisors help with Brand Clarity Calls, student support, community engagement, and onboarding. The Sales Representative’s role is to focus on lead follow-up, enrollment conversations, and helping qualified prospects make a confident decision.



This role is not about being pushy. It is about being professional, consistent, clear, and helpful.



The ideal candidate understands how to build trust, ask good questions, follow up well, and guide interested leads toward the right Brand U Academy offer.



Primary Responsibilities



The Outbound Sales Representative / Enrollment Specialist will:



Make outbound calls to warm leads generated from paid advertising, Instagram,
, text campaigns, live sessions, and Brand U funnels.

Respond to incoming text messages and follow-up conversations.

Nurture leads through the decision-making process.

Help qualified prospects understand the best Brand U Academy offer for their needs.

Work closely with the Success Advisor to support leads before and after Brand Clarity Calls.

Follow up with prospects who registered for a live session, attended a masterclass, missed a class, watched a video, clicked a link, or requested more information.

Use approved sales scripts, call guides, and messaging templates.

Book qualified prospects for Brand Clarity Calls, Bootcamp, consultations, or other next-step opportunities when appropriate.

Track all conversations, notes, follow-ups, and lead status inside Go High Level.

Add notes, tags, tasks, and follow-up reminders inside the CRM.

Work with the Brand U AI Sales Team and understand how to follow up when AI tools trigger tasks, alerts, or lead activity.

Identify hot leads, warm leads, and leads who need additional nurturing.

Report daily activity, including calls made, conversations held, appointments booked, follow-ups completed, and sales opportunities created.

Maintain a warm, professional, faith-friendly, and encouraging tone in all calls and messages.

Help support the Brand U mission by guiding women from confusion to clarity and from interest to action.

Sales and Follow-Up Responsibilities



The Sales Representative will support the lead journey by:



Calling new leads as quickly as possible after they opt in.

Following up with leads who do not answer the first call.

Sending friendly text messages to continue the conversation.

Asking discovery questions to understand the prospect’s goals, needs, and challenges.

Helping prospects understand whether Brand U Bootcamp, Brand U Academy, Brand U Engine, or another Brand U offer may be the right fit.

Encouraging qualified leads to take action without pressure or hype.

Following up after live sessions and masterclasses.

Supporting prospects who are interested but need more clarity before making a decision.

Keeping the CRM updated so the team always knows where each lead stands.



The goal is to create trust, build relationships, and help the right women move forward.



Required Skills



The ideal candidate should have:



Strong verbal and written English communication skills.

A warm, confident, and professional phone presence.

Experience or comfort making outbound calls.

Strong listening skills.

Ability to ask thoughtful questions.

Ability to follow a script while still sounding natural and human.

Strong organization and follow-up habits.

Comfort sending and responding to text messages.

Basic computer and internet skills.

Ability to update notes, tags, tasks, and records inside a CRM.

Ability to work independently and stay accountable.

A positive attitude and willingness to learn.

Comfort working in a fast-moving sales and marketing environment.

Respect for faith-based, purpose-driven, and women-centered business communities.

Preferred Experience



Experience in any of the following is a plus:



Outbound sales

Appointment setting

Enrollment calls

Discovery calls

Lead nurturing

Customer service

Online coaching program sales

Digital course or membership sales

Go High Level / GHL

CRM systems

AI sales tools or automation systems

Working with entrepreneurs, coaches, consultants, ministries, or small businesses

Sales for webinars, masterclasses, bootcamps, or online programs



Go High Level experience is preferred, but we are willing to train the right person.



Technology You May Use



The Sales Representative may work with:



Go High Level / Brand U Engine

CRM pipelines

Phone and SMS systems

 follow-up tools

Calendar booking links

 and Instagram lead sources

AI Sales Team tools

Sales scripts and follow-up templates

Google Docs or Google Sheets

Internal SOPs and checklists



You do not need to know every tool before starting, but you must be willing to learn and work inside a tech-supported sales environment.



Work Schedule



This is a part-time remote position to start.



The schedule may include daytime or evening availability depending on lead activity, campaign schedules, live sessions, and follow-up needs.



The ideal person is dependable, responsive, organized, and consistent during agreed-upon hours.



There is room for this role to grow into a full-time position as Brand U Academy continues to expand.



Compensation



Compensation will be discussed during the interview process based on experience, skill level, and availability.



This role may include a base hourly rate, performance bonuses, and/or commission opportunities depending on experience and fit.



Growth Opportunity



Brand U Academy is growing, and the right person may have the opportunity to move into:



Full-time Sales Representative

Lead Enrollment Specialist

Sales Team Lead

Sales Manager

Enrollment Manager

Client Success Support

AI-Assisted Sales Team Manager

Brand U Sales Trainer



We are not just hiring for where we are today. We are looking for someone who can grow with us.



Company Culture



Brand U Academy is a supportive, purpose-driven, and fast-growing company.



We believe in clarity, faith, structure, excellence, community, systems, action, and transformation.



Our team culture is warm, professional, innovative, and focused on helping women succeed without losing who they are.



We value people who are:



Coachable

Honest

Organized

Reliable

Mission-minded

Results-focused

Good communicators

Comfortable with technology

Comfortable with follow-up

Open to working with AI tools

Able to work well with a team

Who This Role Is Best For



This role is a good fit for someone who:



Enjoys talking to people.

Is not afraid to make outbound calls.

Can handle follow-up without getting discouraged.

Knows how to build trust over the phone.

Can work with both people and technology.

Likes helping women make confident decisions.

Is interested in sales, marketing, coaching, or online education.

Can stay organized inside a CRM.

Wants to be part of a mission bigger than just making calls.

Who This Role Is Not For



This role may not be a good fit if you:



Do not like making outbound calls.

Avoid follow-up.

Struggle to stay organized.

Are uncomfortable using a CRM.

Do not like working with scripts or systems.

Need constant reminders to complete tasks.

Are not open to learning AI-assisted sales tools.

Prefer only administrative work with no sales responsibility.

Are uncomfortable supporting a faith-friendly, women-centered brand.

Sample Message You May Use in This Role



Hi {{contact.first_name}}, this is [Name] with Brand U Academy. I saw that you requested information about our upcoming live session, and I wanted to personally reach out.



Before the session, we want to help you get clear on what you’re building and what your best next step may be.



Are you currently building a business, ministry, book, coaching program, or digital offer?



How to Apply



Interested candidates should complete the application using the link below:







In your application, please include:



Your sales, appointment setting, or customer service experience.

Your experience making outbound calls.

Your experience with text follow-up or lead nurturing.

Your experience with Go High Level or other CRM systems, if any.

Your experience with online courses, coaching programs, or digital offers, if any.

Why you believe you would be a great fit for Brand U Academy.

Your availability and desired work schedule.

title: WordPress Developer  - Join DisruptorsMedia
description:
Remote  •  US business hours overlap preferred



Read this first



This role is hands-on WordPress development. You write code, you build sites end-to-end, and you ship one to two new sites or major site sections every week. We are not hiring a site admin, a theme tweaker, or a designer who clicks around in Elementor. We are hiring a builder.



If you have shipped real WordPress sites and can hand us live URLs you built yourself, this seat could be a great fit. If your last build was installing a template and changing the colors, please skip this one.



Who we are



Disruptors Media is a Utah-based, AI-first marketing agency. We serve service businesses doing $300K or more in annual revenue: contractors, trades, medical, legal, and other professional service firms. Our founders run point as Fractional CMO and Chief AI Officer for our clients, and we build marketing systems and AI infrastructure inside the client's own software stack, not on top of someone else's vendor lock-in.



Learn more about how we work at 



Sites are a core deliverable. Every client gets a fast, conversion-focused web presence wired into our marketing stack. You are the person who builds them.



What this seat looks like day to day



Mornings are heads-down build time on whatever site is live in the queue: a contractor homepage, a medical practice landing page, a law firm rebuild. Afternoons mix client revisions, performance optimization, and integration work: embedding GoHighLevel forms, wiring Google Tag Manager events, setting up CallRail tracking numbers, configuring schema markup. Friday is a build review where we audit page speed, mobile UX, and conversion flow on everything that shipped that week.



You work inside WordPress, Elementor, ACF, GitHub, and our marketing stack (GoHighLevel, GTM, CallRail, Cloudflare). You are not designing from scratch every time, you are working from our component library and brand standards and shipping fast.



What you will own



Building WordPress sites end-to-end: theme setup or custom theme work, Elementor page builds, custom post types, ACF field groups, and the PHP needed to glue it together. Hitting performance benchmarks on every launch: 90 plus on mobile PageSpeed and sub 2.5 second LCP on content-heavy pages.



Integrating with our marketing stack: GoHighLevel forms and tracking, CallRail dynamic numbers, Google Tag Manager events, Meta Pixel, Google Ads conversion tracking, and structured data. DNS, hosting migrations, SSL, and redirect maps when we move sites between hosts. Maintenance tickets across our existing book: plugin updates, security patches, content edits, and broken-thing fixes.



Occasional Shopify work for our e-commerce clients: theme edits, Liquid templating, app integrations, and custom section builds. WordPress is the primary stack, but candidates who can also operate in Shopify will see that work first.



What success looks like in your first 90 days

By day 30, you have shipped your first site under our quality bar and you are fluent in our component library. By day 60, you are shipping one to two sites per week consistently and owning the full flow from kickoff to launch. By day 90, you have a documented opinion on which page templates and stack choices convert best for which verticals.



Required



- Two or more years building WordPress sites professionally with live URLs you can show us. You built them, not your team.



- Strong with Elementor and ACF, and a defensible workflow you can walk us through.



- Comfortable in PHP for theme and plugin customization. You do not avoid 
p.



- Solid HTML and CSS, basic JavaScript for tracking and interactions. Git for version control.



- Documented PageSpeed work. You have hit 90 plus on mobile on real client sites and you know how you got there.



- Familiar with DNS, hosting moves, SSL, and redirects. Cloudflare, WP Engine, Kinsta, Cloudways, or equivalent.



- Reliable infrastructure: high-speed internet, quiet workspace, US business hours overlap.



Nice to have



Shopify development experience: themes, Liquid, sections, and app integrations. Custom Gutenberg blocks. Headless or hybrid WordPress setups. Familiarity with GoHighLevel, CallRail, and Google Tag Manager. AI-assisted development with Claude Code or Cursor. Webflow, Framer, or other visual builders for context. Past agency experience with weekly ship cadence. Schema and technical SEO chops.



Compensation and perks



Competitive monthly base salary, paid on a monthly or bi-monthly cycle. Per-site delivery bonuses on launches that hit our quality and timeline bar. Clear promotion path into senior dev or technical lead for top performers.



Direct mentorship from the founders. You are in the room when strategy gets built, not after. Paid access to the full stack: hosting, plugins, dev tools, and the AI software we use internally. We pay for your AI tooling because we expect you to use it.



We share specific base and bonus numbers on the first call, calibrated to your experience and your portfolio.



This role is not for you if



You only know one page builder and refuse to open a code editor. You cannot show us three or more live URLs you built end-to-end. You expect to hand off DNS, hosting, and integrations to someone else. Page speed is not your problem. You are uncomfortable shipping under deadline. You want a slow, quarterly cadence instead of weekly launches.





How to apply

Send all of the following to [hiring inbox]:



- Your resume or LinkedIn profile.



- Three live URLs of sites you built end-to-end. For each one, note your exact role ("I built theme plus all pages" vs "I built homepage only").



- PageSpeed scores (mobile and desktop) for one of those sites. Screenshots are fine.



- A code sample: GitHub link, gist, or a short snippet of custom PHP or JavaScript you wrote for a real client.



- One sentence on the part of this job you expect to be hardest for you, and how you plan to manage it.



- Your expected monthly salary.



Complete applications get a response inside 5 business days. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Code, ship, repeat. If that is the seat you want, send it over.

title: Remote Executive Assistant & ClickUp Operations Manager (Full-time)
description:
About the Company

We are a fast-growing international fashion/ lifestyle & retail brand with operations across USA, Europe, a new warehouse in China, and a strong Shopify/DTC presence. We are scaling quickly and are looking for a true right-hand to bring structure, follow-up and operational excellence to the entire business.

The Role

We are seeking a proactive, highly organized and tech-savvy Virtual Assistant / Operations Manager who will own and optimize our ClickUp workspace while acting as Executive Assistant to the Founder. You will transform the current workspace into a clean, professional and scalable system, and ensure that all departments (Finance, China Operations, Supply Chain, Shopify/DTC, HR, Product & R&D) run smoothly and efficiently.

Key Responsibilities

•  Fully design, implement and own the new ClickUp structure (5 Spaces with folders, lists, dashboards, templates and automations)

•  Daily and weekly follow-up on all tasks, deadlines and projects across departments

•  Create weekly summary reports and proactively flag overdue items, bottlenecks and priorities for the Founder

•  Coordinate between international teams — especially the new China warehouse (labeling, packing, shipping), sourcing, logistics and Shopify/DTC

•  Prepare meetings, take notes and manage action points

•  Execute ad-hoc projects, research and executive support

What We’re Looking For

•  2–4+ years experience as Virtual Assistant / Executive Assistant / Operations VA for e-commerce, retail or scaling businesses

•  Expert-level ClickUp knowledge (you must be able to restructure an entire workspace from scratch — this is non-negotiable)

•  Excellent written and spoken English (professional communication)

•  Remote with reliable high-speed internet and a quiet, dedicated workspace

•  Strong overlap with European working hours (CET) — flexible full-time availability (30–40 hours/week)

•  Proactive, detail-oriented, ownership mindset and ability to work independently

•  Bonus: experience with Shopify, Google Workspace, Slack, Zapier or similar tools

What We Offer

•  Full-time remote position (long-term collaboration)

•  Competitive monthly salary

•  Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling international company

•  Clear expectations, great communication and real ownership of your area

How to Apply

Please send:

1.  Your updated CV / résumé

2.  A short video (1–2 minutes) or written message answering:?“Why are you the perfect ClickUp Operations Manager for a growing retail brand?”

3.  Examples of ClickUp workspaces you have built or restructured (screenshots or links)

Only serious applicants with strong ClickUp experience will be considered.

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: AR Specialist – Construction
description:
Job Title: AR Specialist – Construction

Employment Type: Full-Time, Non-Exempt (Hourly)



Location: Remote



Reports To: Accounting Manager



Who Is Team RRE?

We are team players that prioritize open communication while exercising emotional control, that do the right thing while being dedicated to winning. We are not perfect — we learn from our mistakes in the process of being great.  



Position Overview

Team RRE is seeking a high-energy AR Specialist with a "hunter" mentality for collections and a precision mindset for billing. This role is the engine of our cash flow. You will be responsible for active, daily outreach to clients, managing complex construction billings, and ensuring our aging report stays lean.



Note to Fresh Graduates: We value drive and talent over years of sitting in a chair. If you are a recent grad with a degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business and you possess an aggressive work ethic and a "refuse to lose" attitude, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities

Active Collections: Conduct high-volume outbound calls and
s to clients regarding past-due balances. You must be comfortable picking up the phone.



Construction Billing: Prepare and submit AIA G702/G703 progress billings, schedule of values, and standard invoices.



Compliance: Ensure all billings include required backup documentation (lien waivers, insurance certs, etc.).



Cash Application: Post daily deposits and wire transfers in QuickBooks Desktop with 100?curacy.



Resolution: Research and resolve client discrepancies or "short pays" with urgency and professional composure.



Productivity & Execution Standard (Team RRE Non-Negotiable)

Massive Action: You don't wait for a report to tell you a client is late; you are proactive and move work forward daily.



Urgency: You treat every dollar as if it’s your own.



Emotional Control: You stay calm and professional, even during difficult collection calls.



Ownership: You take ownership of outcomes, not just tasks. You finish what you start.



Required Qualifications

Experience Level: 0–3 years of experience in Accounting or AR. Fresh graduates with an Accounting or Finance degree are encouraged to apply!



Communication: Exceptional verbal communication; you must be confident and professional when calling clients for money.



Technical Aptitude: Ability to learn QuickBooks Desktop and construction-specific billing (AIA) quickly.



Work Ethic: A proven track record of "winning" in previous roles, internships, or academic projects.



Independence: Proven ability to work accurately and stay on task in a 100% remote environment.



Preferred Experience (Not Required)

Prior experience in construction or contractor accounting.



Familiarity with lien waivers and progress payments.



Advanced Excel skills (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUPs).



Growth & Development Opportunity

This role offers the opportunity to grow with Team RRE as the company scales. High performers (including fresh grads who scale quickly) may advance into:



Senior AR Specialist



AR Lead / Supervisor



Project Accountant



Team RRE values internal development and promotes tea
mbers who demonstrate consistency, accountability, and leadership.



Team RRE Commitment

We provide clear expectations and the systems you need to win. We treat our team with respect and create long-term career opportunities for high performers who are dedicated to our core values.



Are you ready to start your career by taking massive action? Apply today.

title: Verification Specialist: CALL CENTER
description:
KENTECH Consulting Inc. is seeking a detail-oriented, hardworking, and team-focused Verification Specialist / Call Center Representative to play a crucial role in conducting accurate and timely background verifications. This role requires strong communication skills, professionalism, and the ability to manage a high volume of outreach efficiently.



Key Responsibilities



- Verification & Outreach – Contact employers, educational institutions, and references to verify candidate information.

- High-Volume Calls – Conduct 70+ professional and clear phone calls daily to collect required verification details.

- Multi-Channel Communication – Gather and confirm information via phone, fax, and
 while ensuring accuracy.

- Data Research & Accuracy – Retrieve and verify data from various websites and databases to support background checks.

- Client Updates & Reporting – Provide timely updates on verification progress and maintain detailed records.

- Team Collaboration – Support team goals by assisting with additional tasks as assigned.



Qualifications & Experience



-2+ years of experience in call center or customer service roles and 1+ year in an office environment.

- College Degree (Preferred) – Criminal Justice, Pre-Law, Paralegal, Journalism, or Political Science OR 3+ years of relevant work experience.

- Fast & Accurate Typing – Minimum 50+ words per minute with high accuracy.

- Security Clearance Requirement – Must be able to pass background checks to obtain a Permanent Employee Registration Card (PERC).



Soft Skills



- Strong Communication – Professional, clear, and client-focused verbal and written communication.

- Organized & Detail-Oriented – Ability to manage multiple verifications and meet deadlines.

- Quick Problem-Solver – Adaptable and resourceful in resolving verification challenges.

-Team Player – Works well in a fast-paced, team-oriented environment with a customer-first approach.



Why Join KENTECH?



- Remote & Flexible – Work from anywhere while supporting a global team.

- Professional Growth – Gain valuable experience in background verification & compliance.

- Impactful Work – Play a key role in helping organizations make informed hiring decisions.

title: Sales And Customer Service Manager
description:
Job Title: Sales And Customer Service Manager



Location: Remote



Hours: Monday-Friday, 8-5 Central Standard Time. Full Time (40 hours per week).



Company Overview



Everblue Pond is based in the United States.



Everblue Pond is a pioneering online pond and lake store dedicated to guiding customers to the right products and solutions. With a focus on selling highly technical products that require intricate electrical configurations, we pride ourselves on our unmatched customer service and technical expertise. Established for 3 years, our mission is to surpass competitors in customer care, embodying values of integrity, strong relationships, and exceptional service. As a small, family-owned business, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and professionalism, striving to build positive and honest relationships with our customers, dealers, and vendors while driving revenue and business growth.



Role Summary



As a key player in our company, the Sales and Customer Service Manager will be the face of Everblue Pond, leading day-to-day operations and driving our mission forward. This role requires a unique blend of tech savvy, sales and customer service skills. You will guide customers through thorough product selection, manage customer service issues, and forge strong supplier and customer relationships—all while operating remotely.



Primary Responsibilities



-Guide customers through the sales process via phone, providing technical advice and solutions while generating and closing sales.

-Handle customer service inquiries, troubleshooting, and warranty claims.

-Develop and maintain relationships with suppliers, HOAs, contractors, and business customers.

-Process orders, fulfillments, and returns through Shopify.

-Create sales materials and update website when needed.

-Participate in and contribute to ongoing training and professional development.



Candidate Requirements



-Strong problem-solving skills and technical aptitude.

-Experience in sales and customer service preferred.

-Ability to learn and apply technical information.

-Proficient in relationship-building and sales closing strategies.

-Self-motivated with extreme ownership, good judgment, and decision-making skills.

-Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, comfortable with confrontation and capable of closing sales.

-Must have a reliable computer and internet connection for remote work.

-A self-starter attitude is critical. We seek someone who actively seeks solutions, approaches challenges creatively, and shows -exceptional judgment in autonomous decision-making while learning quickly.



Benefits/Compensation



-$16,000-$18,000 Salary + Commission (based on monthly sales volume)

-Flexible, remote working environment.

-Opportunities for professional development and growth within the company.

-This will be a Full Time contractor position estimated at 40 working hours per week.



Our Culture



At Everblue Pond, we believe in empowering our tea
mbers to make decisions and learn from their experiences. We value open communication, teamwork, and a culture of continuous improvement. Our daily operations are grounded in our core values, and we strive to deliver the “Wow” factor in everything we do.



Application Process



Please follow these directions to apply for this position. Any applications that do not follow these steps will be immediately disqualified.



1.) Send an
 to 

2.) The subject line of your response must be "Sales And Customer Service Manager"

3.) Write one paragraph of 3 lines or less in black font and tell me about yourself.

4.) Write a second paragraph of 3 lines or less in blue size 14 font about why you would be a great fit for this role.

5.) Include your resume as an attachment in the
.



If you're a proactive problem solver with a technical edge and a passion for sales and customer service, we'd love to hear from you! Everblue Pond is more than just a business; it's a family committed to excellence, integrity, and our customers. Join us in making a difference together.



Job Types: Full-time, Contract



Benefits:



-Flexible schedule

-On-the-job training

-Paid time off and paid holidays

-Work from home



Work Location: Remote

title: RFP & Proposals Manager
description:
KENTECH Consulting Inc.



This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports revenue growth and competitive wins. As the RFP & Proposals Manager, you will own the full proposal lifecycle and help position KENTECH to secure complex, high-value opportunities.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Own the full RFP lifecycle from opportunity review and win strategy through drafting, submission, and post-submission follow-up



Partner with leadership to align proposals with revenue goals, competitive positioning, and client priorities



Manage timelines and stakeholders, ensuring proposals are accurate, compliant, and submitted on time



Develop and refine proposal content that is persuasive, client-focused, and aligned with RFP requirements



Leverage AI and automation tools to streamline workflows, manage content libraries, and improve efficiency



Coordinate with clients, partners, and subcontractors during the proposal process as needed



Track outcomes and performance, including win/loss data, and continuously improve the proposal process



What We’re Looking For



3+ years of experience in RFP management, proposal development, business development, or bids and tenders



Demonstrated success using persuasive writing and sales strategy to win contracts



Strong project management skills with the ability to manage multiple deadlines



Experience working cross-functionally with leadership, sales, and operations teams



Proficiency with Microsoft Office and Google Workspace



Experience with proposal management tools, project management software, or AI tools is a plus



Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, Marketing, or a related field preferred



Self-motivated, organized, and comfortable working independently in a remote environment



Why This Role Matters



This role sits at the intersection of strategy, execution, and growth. You will directly influence how KENTECH competes, how we tell our story, and how we win new business.

title: Global Virtual Assistant
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Global Virtual Assistant provides administrative and operational support to executive leadership. This role is responsible for managing schedules, coordinating team workflows, supporting meetings and events, and ensuring day-to-day administrative functions run smoothly. The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple priorities in a professional environment.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns

· Assist with travel arrangements and itinerary planning when needed.

· Maintain organized records and documentation.

· Support special projects and additional administrative tasks as assigned.



COMPETENCIES

· Strong organizational and time management skills.

· Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

· Ability to handle confidential information with professionalism.

· Proficiency with calendar,
, and standard office software tools.

· Ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.

COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

title: Learner Success Coordinator
description:
P50,000 to P55,000POSITION SUMMARY

The Learner Success Coordinator supports the onboarding and ongoing engagement of clients and their teams within the 10X Business Academy. This role focuses on executing engagement plans, monitoring participation metrics, and maintaining proactive communication to ensure a positive learner experience. The Coordinator partners closely with the Learner Success Manager to deliver consistent service, identify engagement risks early, and contribute to high client satisfaction and retention.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Participation, course completion, and engagement metrics consistently meet or exceed benchmarks, demonstrating strong learner follow-through.

• Engagement gaps or client concerns are identified early and escalated appropriately, preventing negative impact on satisfaction or retention.

• Client records, tracking, and reporting are consistently accurate and timely, while the Coordinator demonstrates increasing ownership, confidence, and readiness for advancement to Learner Success Manager.



OBJECTIVES

• Support seamless onboarding of new clients and learners by coordinating orientation sessions, tracking setup completion, and ensuring timely follow-up communication.

• Monitor learner engagement metrics daily/weekly (course progress, participation, attendance, logins) and escalate risks to the Learner Success Manager.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Conduct scheduled check-in calls and
 follow-ups using approved engagement frameworks.

• Execute engagement action plans developed by the Learner Success Lead.

• Identify disengagement patterns early and recommend proactive outreach strategies.

• Ensure client inquiries are responded to within established service-level timelines.

• Prepare client progress summaries and engagement reports for review by the Learner Success Lead.

• Coordinate scheduling of kick-off/accountability/coaching calls.

• Support accountability tracking by documenting team participation and milestone completion.

• Assist in renewal preparation by compiling engagement history and performance insights.

• Contribute to continuous improvement by documenting common learner challenges and recommending process enhancements.

• Uphold client confidentiality and data integrity standards.

• Demonstrate consistent adherence to communication and service quality standards.



COMPETENCIES

• Demonstrates patience, empathy, and professionalism in client interactions.

• Clear verbal and written communication in a global business environment.

• Follows structured workflows, checklists, and SOPs with accuracy.

• Builds rapport and trust with clients and learners.

• Consistently meets deadlines and follows through on commitments.

• Ability to interpret basic engagement metrics and recognize trends.

• Maintains high accuracy in documentation and reporting.

• Adjusts quickly to new systems, tools, and evolving processes.

• Works effectively with managers and cross-functional teams.

• Knows when to resolve independently and when to escalate.

• Effectively manages multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Operates effectively in cross-border client relationships.

• Demonstrates willingness to learn coaching frameworks and client engagement strategies.

• Comfortable using CRM systems, online learning platforms, and productivity tools.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Education, Communications, or related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, virtual support, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience supporting global clients or working in remote environments is preferred.

• Familiarity with CRM systems and online learning platforms is an advantage.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:

title: Warm Call Appointment Setter (NO COLD CALLING!)
description:
YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE VIEWED IF YOU DO NOT FOLLOW THE REQUIREMENTS LISTED BELOW



About the Role:

Are you a great communicator who enjoys talking to people and making a positive impact? We are looking for a Warm-Call Appointment Setter to join our team! In this role, you will be reaching out to veterans who are already connected with a veteran-focused nonprofit and helping them schedule free consultations with Veterans Savings Network agents. These agents provide guidance on Medicare plans that can work alongside TRICARE for Life or VA Only Benefits—helping veterans maximize their healthcare options.



Key Responsibilities:

Make warm calls to veterans (NO cold calling)

Use a simple, friendly script to guide conversations

Educate veterans about the opportunity for a free Medicare consultation

Schedule appointments with agents for veterans who are interested

Maintain professionalism and a positive attitude on all calls



What We’re Looking For:

Strong English verbal communication skills

Confidence in speaking with people over the phone

A friendly and professional demeanor

Ability to follow a script while keeping the conversation engaging

A passion for helping veterans access the benefits they deserve

Self-motivated and able to work remotely



How to Apply:

We’d love to hear from you! To apply, please send an
 to







with the subject line:

"Appointment Setter Application – [Your Name]"



In your
, include a short video recording of yourself reading the sample script below. We want to hear your tone, enthusiasm, and ability to engage in a natural conversation.



Also introduce yourself i.e. Who you are, Relevant experience, Fun fact (do you have pets? What is your hobby? Something like that) Why you feel you would be a good fit and what sets you apart from other candidates?



Sample Warm-Call Script:



YOU: Hi John, this is [Your Name] calling on behalf of a veteran-focused nonprofit. How are you today?



VETERAN: (Responds)



YOU: Great! The reason for my call is to let you know about a valuable Medicare review available to veterans like yourself. Many veterans don’t realize there are Medicare plans that can work alongside your TRICARE for Life or VA benefits, possibly adding extra coverage and savings. We’re offering a free, no-obligation consultation with a specialist from Veterans Savings Network who can walk you through your options. It’s a quick call, and many veterans have found it extremely helpful. Would you be open to scheduling a time to learn more? It won’t affect your current benefits, just helps you see if there are additional options available to you.



YOU: Great! I just need a few quick details to get you scheduled. What day and time works best for you?



We look forward to reviewing your application! Please submit all videos in one
.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
We’re a growing payment service provider looking for a motivated and experienced Cold Caller / Appointment Setter to be the front line of our sales engine.



In this role, you are the first voice our prospects hear—qualifying leads, sparking interest, and booking high-value appointments for our closing sales team. If you thrive in a performance-based environment and enjoy building 
ntum through outbound calling, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Make high-volume outbound calls to both cold and warm leads

- Clearly introduce our payment processing solutions and schedule demos

- Qualify prospects using simple, defined criteria

- Set and confirm appointments for senior sales representatives

- Maintain accurate CRM records (call notes, follow-ups, lead status)

- Follow up with warm leads and no-shows to maximize conversions

- Consistently meet or exceed call and appointment targets







Lead Types You’ll Work With

1. Cold Leads - Businesses that haven’t engaged with us before. Expect higher volume, objection handling, and persistence.

2. Warm Leads - Prospects who’ve already shown interest—form fills, referrals, re-engagement lists, or previous conversations. These typically convert faster and reward strong follow-up skills.



What We Provide

- CRM access to your dedicated leads

- Structured training and onboarding resources, such as, call scripts, objection handling guides, and qualification criteria

- Ongoing coaching and support from sales leadership

- Transparent commission structure tied directly to performance



Requirements

- 2+ years of cold calling or appointment setting experience

(Payment processing experience is a strong plus)

- Excellent spoken English with a confident, natural phone presence

- Strong rapport-building skills (non-robotic, adaptable, persuasive)

- Comfortable handling objections and rejection

- Self-driven, reliable, and target-oriented

- Ready to start ASAP



Must have

- Reliable internet connection and quiet calling environment

- Experience with CRM systems (ClickUp is a plus)

- Full-time availability



Compensation & Growth

- Base Pay: Starting at $5/hour (higher based on experience)

- Commission: Paid per qualified appointment and/or closed deal

- Career Growth: Top performers can advance into Closer or Senior Sales roles



To Apply:

Please include:

1. A brief summary of your cold calling experience

2. Your industry background (if any)

3. Your internet speed

4. Your availability

5. Copy of your CV / Intro Video / Voice Recording



**Only serious, long-term applicants will be considered.

title: Cold Calling VA for Real Estate Investment Company
description:
**Job Title:** Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Lead Generation & Cold Calling – Full Time)



**Location:** Remote (Must be available during Mountain Standard Time working hours)



**Position Type:** Full-Time



---



About Us



We are a fast-growing real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market opportunities through direct-to-seller marketing. Our business is built on speed, consistency, and strong communication. We are looking for a high-performing Virtual Assistant who can take ownership of lead generation efforts and contribute meaningfully to our deal pipeline.



---



Role Overview



This is not a task-based VA role—we are looking for someone who thinks, improves systems, and operates independently. You will be responsible for identifying potential sellers, skip tracing contact information, and initiating outbound cold calls to generate qualified leads.



You should be comfortable working with minimal supervision, taking initiative, and continuously improving your approach.



---



Key Responsibilities



* Pull property and owner records from county and online databases

* Skip trace property owners to obtain accurate contact information

* Conduct high-volume outbound cold calls to property owners

* Follow structured call scripts while adapting naturally in conversation

* Identify motivated sellers and gather key property/seller details

* Accurately input and update lead data in CRM (e.g., Follow Up Boss or similar)

* Provide daily reporting on activity, conversations, and lead quality

* Continuously improve processes and suggest efficiencies



---



Required Skills & Experience



* Proven experience in real estate cold calling or telemarketing

* Strong English communication skills (clear, confident, conversational)

* Experience with skip tracing tools (Batch, PropStream, REI Skip, etc.)

* Familiarity with CRM systems

* Ability to handle rejection and maintain high call volume

* Highly organized with strong attention to detail



---



Who You Are



* **Self-starter:** You don’t wait for instructions—you take action

* **Driven:** You are motivated by performance and results

* **Innovative:** You look for better, faster ways to get things done

* **Accountable:** You own your numbers and outcomes

* **Resilient:** You can handle objections and stay consistent



---



Working Hours



* Must be available to work during **Mountain Standard Time (MST)** 

* Full-time commitment (40 hours/week)



---



Compensation



* Base pay (dependent on experience)

* Performance-based bonuses tied to qualified leads and deals



---



How to Apply



Please submit:



1. A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and your experience with cold calling

2. A brief description of your experience with skip tracing and lead generation

3. Your internet speed test results

4. A sample cold call recording (if available)



---



Final Note



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term. If you’re just looking for a task list, this isn’t the role. If you want to be part of a results-driven team and directly impact deals, we want to hear from you.



---

title: Inbound Sales & Customer Service Representative (CSR)
description:
About Us

We are a professional Air Duct and Dryer Vent Cleaning company based in Denver, Colorado, USA. We pride ourselves on delivering high-quality indoor air solutions and exceptional service to our local community. We are currently looking for a results-driven Booking Agent to join our team.



What We Are Looking For

We need a "Closer." We are not looking for someone to just answer questions; we need a professional who understands the customer's pain, provides expert solutions, and secures the booking before the call ends.



Responsibilities

Handle inbound calls from "warm" leads (customers looking for services).

Identify customer needs and "pain points" to recommend the right cleaning packages.

Masterfully handle objections (price, timing, second opinions) to ensure a high conversion rate.

Manage the service schedule and dispatch technicians efficiently using our CRM.

Follow up with unconverted leads to maximize booking opportunities.

Maintain a high "Call-to-Booking" ratio.



Required Skills

Fluent or Upper-Intermediate English (Strong accent is okay, but clarity and "sales flow" are a must).

Active Listening & Empathy: Ability to connect with homeowners and business owners.

Assumptive Closing: Confidence to lead the customer to a scheduled appointment.

Sense of Urgency: Ability to fill gaps in the schedule and handle "now" requests.

Multitasking: Comfortable navigating software/maps while talking to the client.



Work Schedule (Mountain Time - MST)

You can choose between two shifts:

Standard: Monday – Friday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Denver Time).

Flexible: 3/3 Rotation (3 days on, 3 days off), 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM (Denver Time).



Payment & Benefits

Payment Method: Weekly or bi-weekly via Wise.

Base: $4/hr + $2-3 bonus for every "Completed Appointment" (Estimate or Job).

Remote work environment.

Full training on our services and CRM (HCP) provided.



When applying, please start your message with: "CSR in Denver". Send your resume on 



We need a dedicated professional who is comfortable working in a fast-paced environment. Since you will be the first point of contact for our Denver Metro Area clients, your ability to project confidence and expertise is vital. Our team values clear communication and proactive problem-solving. If you are a natural "closer" who hates letting a lead go, we want to talk to you.

title: Attorney
description:
**Job Title:** Litigation Legal Assistant / Attorney (Work from Home – U.S. Cases)



**Job Overview:**



I am looking for a highly skilled legal professional based in the Philippines to assist me with ongoing litigation cases in New York and New Jersey (USA). I am currently representing myself (pro se) and need reliable support with legal research, drafting, and case preparation.



This is a remote, long-term opportunity for the right candidate.



**Responsibilities:**



* Conduct legal research (U.S. federal, New York, and New Jersey law)

* Draft and review legal documents (motions, pleadings, letters)

* Assist with case strategy and organization

* Help ensure filings meet court rules and deadlines

* Organize documents and maintain case files

* Communicate clearly and provide updates on assigned tasks



**Requirements:**



* Law degree (required); licensed attorney preferred but not required

* Strong English writing and communication skills

* Experience with legal research tools (Westlaw, LexisNexis, or similar)

* Understanding of U.S. legal system (very important)

* Detail-oriented and able to meet deadlines consistently

* Ability to work independently and follow instructions



**Nice to Have (Bonus):**



* Experience working with U.S. lawyers or clients

* Familiarity with New York or New Jersey court procedures

* Litigation experience (civil cases)



**Work Setup:**



* Work from home

* Flexible hours, but must be responsive

* Ongoing work (not just a one-time project)



**Compensation:**



* Negotiable based on experience and skill level

* Please include your hourly rate or desired monthly salary



**To Apply:**

Please send:



1. Your resume/CV

2. A short summary of your legal experience

3. A writing sample (legal document preferred)

4. Your availability and preferred work schedule



I am looking for someone reliable, professional, and detail-oriented. If you have strong legal skills and want consistent remote work, I’d love to hear from you.

title: Wordpress Developer and poster
description:
About the Job

I own a website called 
. It is a safety resource website for construction workers and tradespeople in the United States. The website uses WordPress with Elementor Pro.





I need someone to write safety articles, build pages, publish content, and keep the website running smoothly. I will handle all sales and business tasks. Your job is the website and the content on it.

This is a part-time, long-term position. I expect about 10 to 20 hours per week to start. If things go well, hours can increase.



NEED EXPIRIENCE WITH WORDPRESS AND ELEMENTOR PRO





What You Will Do Every Week

Content Writing:

* Research and write toolbox talk articles and safety guides for US construction and trade workers. You can re write from other sites or use AI to make the written content.

* Topics will include things like fall protection, electrical safety, heat illness, PPE, confined spaces, lockout tagout, and more

* I will give you a list of topics and keywords to write about

* Articles should be clear, helpful, and easy to read

* You may use AI tools like ChatGPT to help you write, but you must review and edit everything before publishing — it needs to sound natural, not robotic

* Create downloadable PDF safety templates and checklists to go with some articles

Website Work:

* Build and update pages using Elementor Pro

* Publish all content on the website with proper formatting

* Add proper titles, descriptions, headings, and image tags for SEO

* Add internal links between related articles

* Find and add images to posts (free stock photos)

* Make sure the website loads fast and looks clean on desktop and mobile

* Update plugins and keep WordPress running without errors

* Check Google Analytics and Google Search Console and let me know if anything looks wrong or if traffic is changing

* Set up ad banners and sponsored content sections on the site when I tell you a new sponsor is ready

* Organize the site menu, categories, and page structure as we add more content

What You Will NOT Do

* You will not sell ads or talk to sponsors. That is my job.

* You do not need to be online at a specific time, but I will give you weekly deadlines and content targets.

What I Am Looking For

* You can write clearly in English — your writing does not need to be perfect, but it needs to be easy to read and make sense

* You have at least 2 years of experience using WordPress

* You know how to use Elementor or Elementor Pro well

* You understand basic SEO — keyword research, title tags, meta descriptions, headings, alt text, internal linking

* You are comfortable using AI writing tools and know how to edit AI output so it reads naturally

* You can work on your own without me checking on you every day

* You are organized and meet deadlines

* You know how to use Google Analytics and Google Search Console

* You have a good eye for clean, simple website design

* You can create simple PDF documents (using Canva, Google Docs, or similar tools)

* Bonus if you have written content about construction, safety, health, or any technical topic before

Important Note About the Content

The readers of this website are American construction workers, contractors, and safety managers. The writing must feel natural to an American audience. That means using American English spelling, American units of measurement, and understanding US workplace safety topics like OSHA rules. You do not need to be an expert — I will guide you — but you need to be willing to learn and research these topics.

Schedule and Pay

* This is a remote, work-from-home position

* 10 to 20 hours per week to start

* This is ongoing, long-term work — not a one-time project

* Pay: ($400 USD or 24,500 Philippine Pesos)

How to Apply

“Send me a video (2-3 minutes) to my
 
 explaining your previous experience with Wordpress etc. It does not need to be edited or professional, just proof you are dedicated and real.



- Start the video with: “I am ready to take charge of your operations.”



- “Put your favorite ice cream flavor in the video



- Answer this question in your reply- If Sally has 5 bananas, gives 3 to Tom and 1 to Karen… how old is Sally?

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Dr. Jones' Team
description:
?? Two non-negotiables. Read before applying:



1. You must have a proven track record of working Mountain Time hours, 8 AM–5 PM (Denver, Colorado), Monday through Friday. Not "willing to try." Not "flexible." A real history of working these hours consistently. If you can't show that, don't apply.

2. You must have strong English speaking and comprehension skills. You'll be writing captions, posting content, and communicating with our team daily. If your English isn't strong, this role isn't for you.



Dr. Jones' team is hiring a Short-Form Video Editor to turn raw talking-head footage into polished, high-performing short-form videos for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
 Reels.



This role is about speed and quality at volume.



You're not finding clips. You're not watching long-form replays. You receive raw footage filmed from finished scripts and turn it into finished shorts — fast.



Target pace: roughly one finished 60-second short per hour, 60–90 minutes for stronger quality work. If that pace sounds unrealistic for you, this isn't the role.





What You'll Actually Do:



- Edit raw talking-head footage into finished short-form videos for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels, and
 Reels



- Add captions, on-screen text, light graphics, zooms, pattern interrupts, and sound design



- Hit a target pace of ~1 finished short per hour



- Write captions and hashtags for each post



- Post directly to TikTok and YouTube Shorts



- Prepare Instagram Reels for handoff to our US-based poster (Instagram requires a domestic poster — you won't post there)



- Export properly formatted vertical video for every major platform





What We're Looking For:



- Mountain Time availability with verifiable history — non-negotiable.



- Strong English — non-negotiable.



- Speed without sacrificing quality — non-negotiable. ~1 short/hour at 60-second runtime. You should be able to maintain this pace consistently across a 40-hour week.



- Strong short-form editing fundamentals: clean cuts, tight pacing, captions, on-screen text, visual emphasis, sound design, pattern interrupts.



- Independent operator. You don't need step-by-step direction on the edit itself. You receive the footage, edit, post, move on.



- Caption and hashtag writing skills.





Bonus Skills: 



- Background in healthcare, fitness, wellness, GLP-1, weight loss, or functional medicine content



- Motion graphics, sound mixing, color correction



- Cover frame / thumbnail design



- Familiarity with YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram performance trends



- You don't need to be a health expert on day one. We have an AI tutor system that will get you up to speed.





Technical Requirements:



- Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro (NOT CapCut)



- High-performance editing computer with reliable, high-speed internet



- Mobile device (for Slack, Trello, and posting workflows)



- Fluency with project management and communication apps — specifically:



- Trello (project management — you'll live in this daily)



- Slack (team communication — primary channel)



- Google Drive (file workflows)



- 
 (review/approval)



- Ability to export properly formatted vertical video for every major platform





Availability:

- Full-time, 40 hours/week

- 8 AM–5 PM Mountain Time, Monday–Friday — verifiable history of working these hours required

- 100% remote



Compensation:

$5–$7/hour, with flexibility above that range for an exceptional portfolio and proven turnaround speed.





How to Apply:



 the following to 



- Updated CV or resume

- Confirmation that you can work 8 AM–5 PM Mountain Time consistently, plus a brief note on your history doing so

- Portfolio of short-form vertical videos you've edited — YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels preferred

- A short paragraph on your editing experience and typical turnaround time per finished short

- Any background in educational, healthcare, fitness, or wellness content



Optional but encouraged: a short explanation of how you approach editing a 2-minute talking-head clip into a strong 30–60 second short



Trial edit: We'll send shortlisted applicants raw footage. You'll edit it into a finished short and report your turnaround time.

Apply only if you can work Mountain Time hours, have strong English skills, can hit ~1 short/hour, and can work independently with minimal supervision.

title: Virtual Assistant – Web Hosting & MSP Operations
description:
We're a U.S.-based managed services provider (MSP) and web hosting company operating dual-site infrastructure and serving a diverse client base. We handle web hosting, colocation, domain management, and ongoing technical support for our customers. We're looking for a sharp, reliable Virtual Assistant to support our day-to-day operations.

s, and inquiries

You're a Great Fit If You:

Use 4 apply points when you apply.

s and text messages

mber

title: IT Support/Help Desk
description:
We are a growing MSP company based in New York providing support to multiple clients across different industries.



We are looking for someone who can troubleshoot, investigate, and solve problems across different environments. This role is focused on handling support tickets and supporting clients with their requests.



What You’ll Be Doing:



-Respond to support tickets and work directly with clients

-Troubleshoot a wide range of IT issues across different environments

-Investigate and resolve problems, even when the answer is not immediately clear

-Manage users and systems across multiple platforms

-Support network,
, and software-related issues



Required Technical Skills and Experience:

To qualify for this role, you should have experience in the following areas:



-User & System Management (Active Directory, Microsoft 365 (Azure AD / Entra), Google Workspace)

-Networking & Connectivity (DNS, DHCP, IP addressing, VPN troubleshooting, Ubiquiti, SonicWall, or similar environments)



-General IT Support & Troubleshooting (Windows environments, Software installation and troubleshooting,
 troubleshooting and migrations, VOIP configuration and support, endpoint security and protection)



Soft Skills:



-Strong written communication (most client interaction is via

title: Controller
description:
Ikigai Cases is hiring a Controller!

Location: Remote / Work From Home

Reports to: CEO





About the Company

Ikigai Cases (
) is a fast-growing ecommerce brand manufacturing aerospace-grade aluminum pill cases. Founded in December 2021 by two brothers after their father’s neurological diagnosis led them to discovering the issues with plastic pill organizers, we’ve built a multi-million dollar business in just over four years with a team of 25 across the globe. 



Our mission is simple: make exceptional pill cases and provide exceptional customer service. We deliver on this by managing in-house fulfillment at our Washington, DC facility (including custom engraving) and maintaining obsessive attention to detail.





About the Role

We are hiring a Controller to take complete ownership of our financial operations - accounting, reporting, payroll, budgeting, cash flow, tax coordination, and financial systems. This is a critical senior role, and we’re looking for someone whose professional identity is built around three things: the integrity of the numbers, running the finance function end-to-end, and providing strategic financial insight to the CEO.



The ideal candidate has served as a Controller (or equivalent) for an e-commerce or DTC brand in the $10–30M revenue range. You understand the financial rhythms of e-commerce: Shopify revenue recognition, inventory accounting, seasonal cash flow swings, sales tax across multiple states, and the speed at which decisions need to be made. If you’ve done this before at a similar-sized company, you already know what we need.



At $11.5M in revenue and targeting $30M by 2028, our financial complexity is outpacing our financial infrastructure. We need someone who builds systems, not just operates inside them. You’ll report directly to the CEO and work hand-in-hand with our external financial advisor. No layers of management between you and the decisions your work supports.









Core Responsibilities

Monthly Close & Financial Reporting: Close books by the 10th of every month. Produce reviewed P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow statements in Finaloop. Resolve misclassifications proactively. Maintain a clean chart of accounts. No CEO intervention required.



Budgeting & Financial Planning: Prepare and maintain monthly, quarterly, and annual budgets. Own budget vs. actuals: produce variance reports monthly alongside the P&L close with plain-language explanations. Update balance sheet items and expenses weekly inside the company’s financial models.



Cash Flow Management & Forecasting: Maintain the 13-week cash flow forecast weekly and proactively. Flag upcoming cash movements, exposure, and risks before they become surprises. This is one of the most critical tools the CEO uses for capital allocation.



Payroll Operations (Zero-Error Standard): Own bi-weekly payroll across ADP (US) and Deel (Philippines). Submit the morning of payroll day, every cycle. PTO, overtime, and deductions captured before submission. You catch discrepancies before they reach the CEO.



Tax Coordination & Compliance: Own the relationship with Numeral on multi-state sales tax filings. Maintain the estimated tax payment tracker. Coordinate with our external CPA on annual filings. Flag tax exposure and timing proactively.

Vendor Payments, Disbursements & Financial Systems: Execute and double-check all vendor payments (Venmo, PayPal, wire). Track owner distributions and related-party transactions. Manage Finaloop, Shopify revenue reconciliation, and Google Sheets financial modeling. Manage financial admin including insurance, vendor accounts, and benefits.



CEO Reporting & Ad Hoc Analysis: Weekly: 13WCF update, flagged variances, upcoming cash movements. Monthly: clean financial statements with brief narrative. As needed: ad hoc financial analysis without requiring a detailed spec.



Why You Should Take This Role

-You’ll work at a brand obsessed with its customers, with a loyal following. Read the reviews: 

-A company that’s scaled rapidly in 4 years and is aggressively investing in growth.

-You’ll work hand-in-hand with the founder, not through layers of management, with full autonomy to own your domain.

-The company was founded to solve a personal problem - Tavish’s father battled a neurological condition for a decade and the family discovered the issues with plastic pill organizers.

-You’ll own the entire financial function for a company on a trajectory from $11.5M to $30M - a career-defining role for the right person.





Required Experience & Skills

-5+ years in accounting, bookkeeping, or finance operations

-Prior Controller or senior finance role at a company doing $10M+ in annual revenue - you’ve owned the full financial function, not just pieces of it

-E-commerce or DTC company experience strongly preferred - Shopify revenue recognition, inventory accounting, seasonal cash flow, multi-state sales tax

-Experience closing books independently, on a monthly cadence, without supervision

-Demonstrated accuracy record - you should be able to speak to this specifically

-US GAAP familiarity (CPA not required, but you must understand the principles)

-Experience preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual budgets

-Payroll experience across multiple platforms

-Advanced Google Sheets / Excel (SUMIFS, financial modeling, pivot tables)

-Strong proficiency with Finaloop, QuickBooks Online, or equivalent cloud accounting platform

-Strong written and verbal English; ability to explain financial insights to non-financial stakeholders





Nice-to-Have Experience

-Experience working remotely for a US-based company from the Philippines

-Exposure to sales tax compliance across multiple US states

-Experience using Notion (or similar task management software)

-EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System) familiarity

-Prior experience coordinating with external CPAs and tax advisors





What We’re Really Looking For

-Technical skills get you in the door. These traits determine whether you succeed:

-Detail orientation as professional pride - you catch your own errors before they go out, and you change your process so they don’t recur.

-Proactive disclosure - you surface problems before being asked, even when it’s uncomfortable.

-Ownership without supervision - if it’s due, it’s done. No prompting required.

-Direct communication - you push back when something doesn’t look right.

-Reliability - when you say you’ll be available, you’re available. When you can’t be, you say so immediately.





Compensation Details & Schedule

-Compensation: TBD based on candidate experience. Target compensation will be requested during screening.

-Work Hours: 50 hours/week, Monday–Friday. Core overlap with US Eastern hours (9AM–5PM EST).

-Paid Holidays: 10 paid holidays per year

-PTO: 1 week earned for every 6 months worked at the company

-Location: Remote / Work From Home





To Apply

Fill out the application form here: 



This application includes a number of questions in order to ensure we hire an outstanding candidate for this position, so please be advised in advance that it will take time to complete.



Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted for interviews. Applications on OnlineJobs.ph, DMs, and messages sent via
 will not be reviewed.
