title: Monthly Bookkeeper / QuickBooks Online Reconciliation Assistant
description:
ABOUT INUMIN MEDIA



Inumin Media is a small digital marketing agency based in Canada. We provide social media management, website design, video production, SEO, and paid advertising services for small and medium-sized businesses.



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented bookkeeper to help keep our QuickBooks Online account organized and reconciled each month.



This is a small monthly bookkeeping role.



This is not a full-time role.



This is not a daily role.



You can work your own hours as long as the monthly bookkeeping is completed on time.



–––––––––––––––––––



IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE APPLYING



This role is mainly for monthly bookkeeping cleanup and reconciliation.



The work should not take many hours each month because the business does not have a large number of transactions.



You will be responsible for keeping the books clean, organized, and ready for accountant review.



Accuracy is more important than speed.



Please do not apply if you are looking for full-time work only.



–––––––––––––––––––



WORK SCHEDULE



This is a flexible monthly role.



• Estimated time: 3–6 hours per month to start

• You can work your own hours

• No fixed daily schedule required

• Monthly bookkeeping should be completed by the agreed deadline each month

• Occasional communication may be needed if there are questions about transactions



We prefer someone who can work independently, communicate clearly, and complete the work consistently every month.



–––––––––––––––––––



COMPENSATION



• Starting rate: $6.00-$8.00 USD per hour

• Estimated 3–6 hours per month to start

• Paid monthly or bi-weekly, depending on agreed arrangement

• Independent contractor role

• No 13th-month pay

• No employee benefits



If the workload grows, hours may increase over time.



–––––––––––––––––––



WHAT YOU WILL DO



You will help manage monthly bookkeeping tasks in QuickBooks Online.



Monthly Bank Reconciliation



• Reconcile bank accounts monthly

• Compare QuickBooks balances against bank statements

• Identify missing, duplicate, or incorrect transactions

• Flag unclear transactions for review

• Report reconciliation issues clearly



Credit Card Reconciliation



• Reconcile credit card accounts monthly

• Match credit card payments correctly

• Identify duplicate transactions

• Flag personal or unclear expenses

• Confirm balances match statements



Transaction Review



• Review bank feed transactions

• Categorize income and expenses properly

• Match transactions where possible

• Avoid guessing when the category is unclear

• Prepare a list of questions for unclear items



Monthly Bookkeeping Summary



Each month, provide a simple summary including:



• accounts reconciled

• number of transactions reviewed

• unclear transactions

• missing receipts or documents

• issues found

• items needing owner review



Bookkeeping Cleanup



From time to time, you may help with small cleanup tasks, such as:



• duplicate transactions

• old uncategorized transactions

• miscategorized expenses

• incorrect bank transfers

• old reconciliation issues



Major changes must be discussed first before making adjustments.



–––––––––––––––––––



TOOLS YOU WILL WORK WITH



• QuickBooks Online

• Google Drive

• Google Sheets

• Bank statements

• Credit card statements

• Gmail or
 communication

• Slack Statements 



Experience with QuickBooks Online is required.



Experience with Canadian bookkeeping is helpful but not required.



–––––––––––––––––––



REQUIREMENTS



• Experience using QuickBooks Online

• Experience with bank reconciliations

• Experience with credit card reconciliations

• Basic bookkeeping knowledge

• Strong English communication skills

• High attention to detail

• Ability to work independently

• Ability to ask questions when something is unclear

• Reliable monthly availability

• Stable internet connection

• Ability to handle confidential financial information



–––––––––––––––––––



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience with Canadian bookkeeping

• Experience with GST/HST tracking

• Experience with Stripe or PayPal

• Experience cleaning up QuickBooks Online files

• Experience preparing simple monthly bookkeeping reports



–––––––––––––––––––



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



• You are looking for full-time work only

• You need daily hours

• You guess transaction categories

• You do not like reconciliation work

• You do not communicate when something is unclear

• You are careless with numbers

• You miss deadlines

• You do not protect confidential information



–––––––––––––––––––



WHAT WE VALUE MOST



We value people who:



• are accurate

• are honest

• communicate clearly

• ask questions when unsure

• meet monthly deadlines

• protect confidential information

• keep records organized



Bookkeeping mistakes create real business problems, so we need someone who takes the work seriously.



–––––––––––––––––––



TO APPLY



Please send the following:



1. Your resume / CV

2. A short explanation of your bookkeeping experience

3. Confirm your experience with QuickBooks Online

4. Confirm your experience with bank and credit card reconciliations

5. A link to your internet speed test



Optional but preferred:



8. A 1–2 minute video introducing yourself



Please include the word RECONCILE in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job description.



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.

title: Account Executive – Sports Uniforms & Athletic Gear (Remote)
description:
About Us



Phoenix Performance Solutions is a fast-growing U.S.-based sports company focused on custom uniforms, athletic gear, leagues, and performance products. We work with youth and adult sports organizations across the United States and are actively expanding our football, cheer, basketball, baseball, and softball divisions.



We are looking for a highly motivated remote Account Executive to help grow our custom sports uniform and gear business by building relationships with teams, leagues, coaches, athletic directors, and organizations.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.



---



## Compensation



* Hourly Pay: $5–$15 USD/hour depending on experience and communication skills

* Commission with each close. Higher commission with lower hourly rate. Structure



  * Sliding scale commissions based on profitability and deal structure

  * Higher-margin deals = higher commission opportunities

  * Strong performers may grow into leadership opportunities



---



## What You’ll Do



* Prospect and identify new leads across youth and adult sports organizations

* Reach out through:



  * Cold calling

  *
 outreach

  *
/social media outreach

  * Text messaging

  * Follow-up campaigns

* Build long-term relationships with coaches, leagues, and organizations

* Educate potential clients about our uniforms, apparel, and athletic gear

* Manage the relationship from initial contact through payment

* Pass completed order details to management/operations for mockups and production

* Ensure all client information and updates are logged accurately into Zoho CRM

* Follow up consistently with clients throughout the sales process

* Help generate repeat business and referrals



---



## What We Provide



* Sales guidance and onboarding

* Product education and pricing structure

* Marketing materials and resources

* Lead lists and outreach support

* Ongoing coaching and support

* AI/LLM tools and workflow recommendations

* Assistance on larger calls when needed



You will NOT be expected to figure everything out on your own. We want someone willing to learn, improve, and grow with the company.



---



## Requirements



### MUST HAVE:



* Strong spoken and written English

* Minimal accent and excellent communication skills

* Reliable internet connection

* Comfortable making outbound calls

* Comfortable with CRM usage and organization

* Ability to work during U.S. business hours (Central Time)

* Strong professionalism and ethical communication



### PREFERRED:



* Cold calling or sales experience

* Sports knowledge (football, cheer, basketball, baseball, softball)

* Experience using Zoho CRM or similar systems

* Familiarity with AI tools or LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

* Experience managing customer relationships long-term



---



## Important Notes



We are looking for relationship builders, not aggressive short-term salespeople.



We value professionalism, honesty, and long-term partnerships with our customers. Calls may occasionally be joined by management or recorded/shared internally for quality assurance, training, and maintaining ethical sales standards.



If you are someone who genuinely enjoys helping customers, building trust, and growing relationships, we would love to speak with you.



---



## To Apply



Please include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your sales experience

3. Experience with cold calling

4. Your experience working with U.S.-based clients

5. A voice recording introducing yourself

6. What sports you are familiar with

7. Your availability in U.S. Central Time

8. Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role



Bonus points if you have experience in sports apparel, uniforms, or athletic organizations.

title: GHL Tech and Automation Specialist
description:
Who We Are and What This Role Actually Is



Elya Consulting, also known as The Digital Doula, is a done-for-you systems agency founded by Anabelle Elya. We build the back-end tech infrastructure that lets purpose-driven businesses run cleanly and grow without chaos. Our clients come to us because they have a vision for how their business should work and no idea how to make GoHighLevel do it. That is where you come in.



This role is not a support ticket queue. It is not a list of tasks you check off and hand back. We are looking for someone who reads a client brief about a custom healing plan generator or a CBD storefront or a bot-driven intake funnel and immediately starts thinking about how to architect it, what might break, and how to make it better than what the client imagined. The best version of this person does not wait to be told what to do next. They notice the inefficiency, have a fix in mind, and bring Anabelle a suggestion before the problem becomes a problem.



If you get genuine satisfaction from solving puzzles that have no established answer, building systems that have never been built before, and leaving your work in a cleaner state than you found it, this role was designed for you.



What You Will Own



You will be responsible for the end-to-end build quality of client systems inside GoHighLevel. That means you do not just connect the pieces, you understand why they connect, and you catch it when something downstream is going to fail before it does.



You will own the architecture and implementation of custom funnels, automation workflows, pipeline logic, forms, calendars, course builds, membership areas, and integrations with third-party tools. You will work across a genuinely varied range of clients: wellness practitioners, course creators, e-commerce operators, service providers, and more. No two builds look the same.



You will be the person who flags when a client's request has a better solution than the one they described. You will bring those ideas to Anabelle clearly and concisely, with your reasoning, and you will be trusted to implement them once aligned. Over time, you will also help document systems and improve how we hand things off internally.



What We Are Looking For



On the technical side: you need to be genuinely fluent in GoHighLevel. That means pipelines, automation workflows, forms and surveys, funnel builders, calendars,
 and SMS sequences, course and membership tools, and connecting GHL to external platforms via Zapier, Make, or native integrations. You should be comfortable working without a tutorial for most of what you do.



On the thinking side: we need someone who reads ambiguous instructions and extracts clarity rather than asking for more hand-holding. Someone who encounters a broken automation and works backward through the logic to find the actual root cause, not just the symptom. Someone who, when they finish a build, asks themselves whether it is as good as it could be and actually acts on the answer.



You should be organized enough to manage multiple client projects without things slipping, and communicative enough that Anabelle always knows where things stand. You do not need to be loud about your ideas, but you do need to have them and share them.



Experience with any of the following is a genuine plus: Kajabi, Teachable, Shopify, Zapier, Make, ActiveCampaign, Stripe, or building for health and wellness clients.



AI Knowledge Is Required, Not a Bonus



This agency runs on the intersection of smart systems and human-centered delivery. We use AI tools actively to improve client workflows, generate assets, automate research, build smarter funnels, and find efficiencies that free up our clients' time. We are not looking for someone who has experimented with ChatGPT once. We are looking for someone who follows the space, tests tools before they are mainstream, and already has opinions about what works and what does not.



You should be able to look at a client process and identify where an AI layer would genuinely improve it, then build or integrate that layer. You should be comfortable working with AI-assisted content, prompt engineering for repeatable outputs, and automation tools that incorporate AI decision-making. If you are the kind of person who finds a new tool on a Tuesday and has already tested three use cases by Thursday, that is exactly the energy we are looking for.



What This Role Is Not



This is not a slow-paced role where you work through a tidy backlog one ticket at a time. Client projects move quickly, scope shifts, and sometimes the right solution only becomes clear once you are halfway through building the wrong one. You need to be comfortable with that rhythm and good at reorienting without spinning out.



This is also not a role where you can stay quiet when something is not working. If you see a better way, we expect you to say so. If you are stuck, we expect you to say so early, not after the deadline. Passive execution is not what we are hiring for.



This is a remote, async-first role. You will need to manage your own time and output without someone checking in on you daily. That is a feature, not a bug, for the right person.



How to Apply



Submit a Loom video under three minutes walking us through a real GoHighLevel build you have worked on. Show something you actually built: a workflow, a funnel, a course setup, a complex automation. Tell us what problem it solved and what decision-making went into it. If there is something you would do differently now, tell us that too.



Written applications submitted without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



Compensation



$10/hr USD depending on experience



Apply Here:

title: Senior Ecommerce Growth & Marketing Operations Director (Remote)

Strategic Leadership

 / ClickUp / Trello

Required Academic Qualifications:

Minimum:



Bachelor’s degree in:



Marketing

Business Administration

Ecommerce

Communications

Digital Marketing

Operations Management



Related field

Preferred:



MBA

Master’s in Marketing, Business, or Operations

Ecommerce specialization



Preferred Certifications:

Strongly preferred certifications include:

Shopify Certification

Google Analytics Certification

HubSpot Marketing Certification

Amazon Advertising or Marketplace Certification

Six Sigma Green Belt or process improvement certification

Project Management Certification (PMP, Scrum, Agile, or equivalent)

Digital Marketing Certifications



Conversion Rate Optimization certifications



Required Experience:



Candidates should have:



5–8+ years of senior ecommerce, growth marketing, or operations leadership experience

Proven track record scaling ecommerce revenue

Experience building systems in growth-stage or operationally immature environments

Strong history of process improvement

Leadership-level communication skills

Revenue growth accountability

Experience managing ambiguity and building from scratch



Ideal Candidate Traits:

You are:



Highly strategic

Operationally elite

Systems-minded

Revenue-driven

Data-driven

Autonomous

Proactive

Process-oriented

Executive communicator

Comfortable with chaos

Strong under pressure

Leadership-capable



You Are NOT:



A passive executor

A junior marketer

A basic VA

Success Metrics:

title: MULTIPLE HIRES: Part-time support engineer for web hosting & managed services company
description:
We're a growing web development, hosting, and infrastructure company looking for a dependable support engineer to be the first line of response for client issues. You'll handle incoming tickets, resolve common website and hosting problems, and escalate anything beyond T1 scope with clear, detailed notes.



This is a long-term role. We'll train you on our systems and escalation procedures — what matters most is solid technical fundamentals, clear communication, and consistent follow-through.



What you'll be doing

- Respond to client support tickets via
, phone, and chat in a timely, professional manner

- Troubleshoot and resolve T1 website and hosting issues — DNS,
, WordPress, site errors, SSL, and similar

- Work through common MSP-style tickets: account issues, connectivity checks, service requests, and basic configuration

- Escalate unresolved or complex issues to the next tier with thorough handoff notes

- Document resolutions in our ticketing system

- Use AI tools to assist with diagnostics and client communication





What I'm looking for in you

- Solid understanding of web hosting environments — DNS, WordPress, basic Linux

- Clear written and spoken English — clients and teammates need to understand your notes and responses

- Methodical troubleshooter — you work through a problem before escalating

- Knows the limits of T1 scope and escalates cleanly when needed

- Reliable and consistent — support only works if someone actually shows up

- Willing to learn our systems and tooling by reading documentation





Skills

- Primary (required): Web hosting / T1 technical troubleshooting  

- Secondary (nice to have): Strong English writing, ticketing systems (Freshdesk, Zendesk, ServiceNow, or similar)



Details

- Hours: Approximately 20–40 hrs/week

- Salary: Negotiable based on experience

- Commitment: Long-term — we're building a reliable support team, not filling a temporary gap



How to apply

Send a short note describing your technical background and any relevant hosting or support experience. Include the word SUPPORT101 at the end of your subject line. Use 3 Apply Points if you are really interested in this role. Applications without it will not be reviewed.

title: Amazon VA Product Sourcer
description:
Job Responsibilities

Source 8–12 high-quality, in-stock leads per day.



Develop, follow, and refine Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).



Maintain consistent output with minimal supervision.



Requirements

Expertise: Advanced proficiency in Keepa and SellerAmp (SAS).



Strategy: Mastery of manual sourcing, reverse sourcing, storefront stalking, and Keepa Product Finder.



Data Literacy: Deep understanding of ROI, profit margins, and sales rank.



Availability: Full-time (40 hours per week) or Part Time (20 hours per week)



Reliability: High-speed, stable internet connection.



Exclusivity: We do not accept candidates currently working for other clients.



Compensation & Benefits

Performance-based bonuses (to be discussed).



Professional growth in a long-term environment.



Who You Are

We are looking for a "rockstar" who is dependable, eager, and detail-oriented. In this competitive market, we need a tea
mber we can rely on for years to come. You must be able to read data accurately and ensure that the items you share pass all SOP checks and are ready for purchase. Loyalty is our #1 priority.



Application Instructions:

To prove you pay attention to detail, please set the title of your application as your favorite food.



Expedite Your Application:

If you want to be moved to the front of the line, send 3 leads researched on the same day as your application. Include both the Supplier Link and the Amazon US link.



Our Criteria: 1.  Minimum 20% ROI.

2.  Minimum 12% Margin.

3.  Minimum $3.00 Profit per unit.

4.  Low sales rank and stable Keepa history.



Required Submission Questions

What is your previous experience with professional product sourcing?



If you were previously employed in this field, why did you leave?



What are your computer specifications and how many monitors do you use?



Why are you the best candidate for this specific team?



What is your favorite sport and why?



Do you have a VPN, and do you maintain your own SellerAmp/Keepa subscriptions?

title: Graphic designer
description:
Full-Time AI Creative Specialist

Base Image Creation | High-Level Creative Team | Growth Opportunity

We are looking for a full-time AI Creative Specialist who can create high-quality base images made specifically for video advertisements.

This is not a video editing role.

Your responsibility is to create the foundation image — the main visual that everything starts from.

These base images will later be used by our animation team for B-roll creation and by our video editing team for final advertisements.

You are the first and most important step in the creative process.

If the base image is weak, unrealistic, or low quality, the final ad will fail.

You will work from storyboard briefs created by our video editors. Based on these briefs, you must create strong, realistic, high-converting visual assets that feel premium, trustworthy, and natural.

The standard is simple:

there should be almost no visible difference between your work and reality.

We are looking for someone with very high standards, strong taste, attention to detail, and someone who understands what makes an ad look expensive, trustworthy, and built to convert.

You will be joining a fast-growing international e-commerce brand with a 15-person marketing team focused heavily on performance marketing and creative testing.

What You Will Do

Create high-quality base images for advertisement use

Turn storyboard briefs into strong visual foundations for video ads

Build animation-ready assets that can later be turned into B-roll

Make sure all visuals are realistic, premium, and conversion-focused

Avoid unnatural visuals, obvious mistakes, and scam-looking creatives

Continuously improve outputs so ads feel real and trustworthy

Stay updated with the newest creative systems and workflows

Work closely with our creative, animation, and video teams

Understand that your work is the starting point of the entire ad production process

What We Need

Full-time availability

Around 50 hours per week

Very high standards for realism and quality

Strong understanding of premium e-commerce creatives

Ability to identify when content looks fake or unnatural

Someone who works fast without sacrificing quality

A-player mindset and strong ownership

Someone who wants to grow with the team long-term

Someone who understands that details d
 performance

Salary

$700 USD per month

Growth Opportunity

This role is for people who want to stay ahead of the market.

You will work inside a high-level marketing team and continuously learn the newest systems, workflows, and ways to create better-performing creatives.

The goal is not just making images.

The goal is becoming someone who understands how winning creatives are built from the very first frame.

If you are serious, hungry, and want to grow inside a real performance-driven team, apply here:

title: Video Editor / Content Manager
description:
Video Editor + Content Manager (Full-Time) | AI/Entrepreneurship Creator

I run a YouTube channel and Instagram page focused on AI and entrepreneurship. I am looking for a full-time Video Editor and Content Manager to help produce, manage, and grow the content across all platforms.

This is an equal split between editing and managing. You are not just cutting videos, you are owning the content operation.

What you will be doing

Creating and posting short-form content every single day (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) repurposed from long-form

Designing and posting Instagram carousels

Managing the content calendar, scheduling, and posting across all platforms including weekends

Keeping the workflow organized and proactively flagging what needs to be done



What we are looking for

Premiere Pro preferred

Any channels or brands you have helped grow and what the results were

title: Social Media Moderator & Virtual Assistant (Part-Time)
description:
About the Role:



We're a U.S.-based Internet company that runs online competitions and grant programs. We have an active presence across
 pages,
 groups, and
/Instagram ads, and we're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented virtual assistant to handle daily social media moderation and engagement across all of these surfaces — plus additional VA tasks as they come up.



This is a task-based, execution-focused role. All responses are prewritten — you will not need to write or create any content. You just need to follow established workflows, use good judgment on which response fits each situation, and keep the queues clear every day.



What You'll Do:



Review comments that have been auto-hidden by our moderation tool (NapoleonCat) and either unhide them or, when they violate community standards or are spam, block the user first and then delete the comment



Respond to comments using prewritten, documented standard responses — always properly tagging the original commenter



React to all comments (Like or Love, as appropriate)



Like your own comments



Go through all page posts, group posts, and ads, click to view engagements (likes, loves, etc.), and work down the full list inviting every engaged user to follow the page



Send "Invite to Follow" to users who engage positively with our ads



Keep the comment queue fully cleared each day



Take on additional virtual assistant tasks as needed



Where You'll Work:



You'll moderate and engage across:

 pages

 groups

 ads (running on
 and Instagram)



Tools You'll Use:



NapoleonCat — primary tool for reviewing and managing hidden comments (unhide, or block-then-delete)



Meta Business Suite — for replying to comments (to ensure proper commenter tagging), reacting, inviting users to follow, and managing pages and groups. For some ads, it can also be more efficient to unhide and reply directly within Meta rather than through NapoleonCat.



Training and SOPs will be provided. 



Prior experience with NapoleonCat is nice but not required.



Hours & Schedule:



10–20 hours per week (volume varies with ad activity)



Flexible scheduling, but the queue must be cleared daily — consistency matters more than specific hours



This is an ongoing, long-term position



What We're Looking For:



Required:



Previous experience with social media moderation



Previous experience with
 and Meta Business Suite



Strong English reading comprehension (you need to understand the context and tone of comments to select the right response and identify comments that should be deleted)



Comfortable navigating web-based tools and switching between platforms



Reliable and consistent — this role depends on daily follow-through



Detail-oriented — tagging the right commenter, choosing the right prewritten response, and not missing comments matters



To Apply:



Please include in your application:



A brief description of your experience with social media moderation, Meta Business Suite, and other tools



Your general availability (hours per day and time zone)



Confirmation that you have a personal
 account (required for Meta Business Suite access)

title: Social Media Editor (Contractor)
description:
Social Media Editor | Freelance / Contract • Remote



Sugar Rim is hiring a freelance editor for a social media campaign. You'll cut short-form video for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn, with motion graphics doing a lot of the heavy lifting.



Responsibilities



Edit 15 to 60 second social videos optimized for hook, retention, and platform pacing

Build motion graphics, kinetic typography, and animated transitions in After Effects

Design on-screen captions, lower thirds, and callouts that elevate the content

Deliver in 9:16, 1:1, and 16:9 without losing impact

Maintain consistency with client's brand voice and style



Requirements



Strong proficiency in Adobe After Effects

Editing chops in Premiere Pro or equivalent

Fluency in social-forward editing: punchy hooks, fast cuts, captions-first, native pacing for Reels and TikTok

Portfolio of motion-driven social work (not traditional video edits)

Reliable turnaround and clear communication



Nice to have



B2B SaaS or tech brand experience

Sound design skills

Familiarity with AI editing tools (Runway, Topaz, ElevenLabs)



Details

Project-based with potential to extend. Rate negotiable based on experience.

To apply: Send your reel, two social samples (Reels, TikToks, or Shorts)

title: YouTube Video Editor (Contractor)
description:
YouTube Video Editor (Contractor)



Sugar Rim | Remote, Contract



About Sugar Rim (www.sugarrim.co)



Sugar Rim is a boutique influencer marketing, UGC, and creator agency. We embed with lean marketing teams at funded consumer brands and build creator programs that drive acquisition. We move fast, ship great work, and treat our contractors like extensions of our core team.



The Role



We're looking for a YouTube Video Editor to help us produce high-performing long-form content for our brand partners. You'll cut explainer videos, product demos, founder content, and creator-led pieces designed to convert viewers into customers. This is a contract role with consistent project flow and the chance to grow into recurring brand work.



What You'll Do



- Edit YouTube videos from raw footage to publish-ready cut, including explainer videos, product demonstrations, founder vlogs, and brand storytelling

- Build engaging hooks in the first 3 to 5 seconds that hold retention and drive watch time

- Design intro and outro animations that feel native to the brand

- Add captions, b-roll, zoom edits, sound effects, and pacing cues that keep viewers engaged

- Apply motion graphics and light VFX to elevate explanations, callouts, and transitions

- Color correct and grade footage to match brand aesthetics across episodes

- Edit, mix, and master audio so dialogue is clean, music sits right, and levels are consistent

- Deliver multiple cutdowns when needed (social cutdowns primarily for YouTube Shorts)

- Create engaging and brand aligned thumbnails for videos



What You Bring



**Skills**

- Motion graphics and VFX

- Color correction and grading

- Audio editing and mixing

- Strong sense of pacing, rhythm, and storytelling for retention-driven YouTube content



**Software Proficiency**

- Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred)

- Adobe After Effects (preferred)

- Final Cut Pro or DaVinci Resolve also welcome



**Experience**

- Proven work on YouTube-style explainer videos and product demonstrations

- Comfortable with standard YouTube editing practices: intro and outro animations, engaging hooks, captions, zoom edits, and dynamic b-roll integration

- Portfolio of published YouTube work (channel links or 
 reels welcome)



Nice to Have



- Experience editing for DTC consumer brands, particularly in technology and/or software apps

- Familiarity with YouTube best practices for retention, CTR, and audience growth

- Thumbnail design instincts (not required, but a plus)

- Ability to source music, SFX, and stock assets that fit a brand



Logistics



- 1099 contractor

- Remote

- Project-based with potential for ongoing retainer



How to Apply



Send a short note about yourself, your reel or 2 to 3 relevant YouTube edits here or to 
 reviewed, we will be in contact to schedule a short video interview if interested.

title: Seeking a proactive and resourceful AI Specialist / Virtual Assistant
description:
Time Zone: U.S. Central Time (flexibility required for overlap)

Compensation: Based on experience, paid weekly

Language: Fluent English required (spoken and written)

Overview:



We are a growing U.S.-based company seeking a proactive and resourceful AI Specialist / Virtual Assistant from the Philippines with strong communication, problem-solving, and technical skills.



This role is a unique opportunity to work directly with ownership to build and implement AI systems into our existing CRM platform, while also supporting customer interactions and learning our business from the ground up.



Who are we looking to hire?

We’re looking for someone who is tech-savvy, curious about AI, and eager to build systems—not just follow them.



This is not just a typical VA role.

You will:

Assist with customer service and sales communication

Learn our internal workflows and pricing systems

Help design, build, and improve AI-driven processes that integrate into our CRM (which has an Open API)



Think 50% inside sales rep - responding to customer inquiries and learning our current system.  

50% building out AI Driven process to streamline operations and speed up sales process. 



We want someone who can grow into a key role helping automate and scale our operations.

What You’ll Be Doing:

AI + Systems Development (Primary Growth Role)

Work with our team to build AI workflows and automation inside our CRM

Help design systems to handle customer inquiries, quoting, and follow-ups

Learn and improve our internal processes using AI tools

Assist in testing and refining automation workflows

Customer Support & Sales Assistance (Training + Ongoing Role)

Answer inbound phone calls and assist customers professionally

Respond to inquiries via phone,
, CRM, and social media

Build quotes using our proprietary pricing model

Review customer-submitted images to improve quote accuracy

Log and track customer interactions



Qualifications:

Fluent spoken and written English (non-negotiable)

Confident and clear communicator on the phone

Experience as a Virtual Assistant, Customer Service Rep, or similar role

Strong problem-solving mindset

Comfortable learning new software and systems quickly

Interest in AI, automation, or technical systems

Bonus (Not Required, but Highly Valued):

Experience with automation tools like Zapier or similar

Familiarity with APIs (Application Programming Interfaces)

Experience with CRM systems

Exposure to AI tools (ChatGPT, workflow automation, prompt building, etc.)

Basic programming or technical background

Technical Screening (Important):



As part of our hiring process, we want to understand your technical awareness and experience. Please be prepared to answer the following:

Do you know what Zapier is and how it is used?

Do you understand what an API is and how it works?

What is your technical or programming background (if any)?

Have you ever built or worked with automations or integrations?



You do not need to be an expert—but you should be comfortable learning and thinking through systems.

Structure:

You will be trained by our current VA team

Ownership and leadership are U.S.-based

We’ve successfully worked with Philippines-based VAs for over 2 years

This role has growth potential into a long-term technical/AI-focused position

Schedule:



Flexible, but must have overlap with U.S. Central Time (CST)



We are open to:

Full-time (preferred)

Part-time (for the right candidate)



Why This Role Is Different:

You will:

Learn how our business operates behind the scenes

Help build systems that replace manual work

Play a direct role in scaling the company



Application Process:

While we review applications on OnlineJobs.ph, you must complete our application form to be considered.

Application includes:

Basic Information

Work Background

Wage History

Tech Setup

Video Submission (answering a few questions)

title: Client Book Builder
description:
Lead generation building a book of
leasing agents who will be paid $80-$200 for every tenant that gets electricity from us. Will take 20-40 hrs per week to start, depending on your skill levels. 



Your success will be determined by how consistent you are, your ability to build relationships thru service and the quality of your English. 



Calling, determining their desire/ability, onboarding them into our program and use of our app., maintaining the relationship over time, generating new relationships on a regular basis.



1) You will assist in building a book of agents that we will work with on a daily/weekly basis.

2) It takes on average 3-6 months to build the book. (If it were easy everyone would be doing it because the money is long term and good)  

3) The agents you are recruiting will be paid by us (between $80-$200) per deal, they will average 2 deals a month X 12 mo.

4) You will be paid $10 and hour for the first month, $8 an hour for the second month, $6 an hour for the third month, etc.

5) You will be paid $10 for every electric deal that is generated by the agents in your book. We would need you to make a minimum of $2,000/P$114,000 once you are established.

6) Once you are vested, you will continue to make $10 per deal whether you continue working with us or not

7) To keep earning the money even after you have moved on to something else, the book must stay at 100+ active per mo.

8) We will supply you with the lists to call, however you are free to generate your own lists in addition

9) Our current relationships in the Philippines have been with us for several years

10) We currently have a team of 27 and have been together for 7 years and are wanting to add another book.

title: Operations Coordinator — Guest Experience, Content & Finance (Mac / Philippines Daytime)
description:
Company:

BookThatStay is a luxury short-let accommodation company operating design-led properties across South & East London — Greenwich, Southwark, Lambeth, and Beckton. Our guests pay premium rates for boutique interiors and precise service. We are currently managing 6 properties and onboarding 4 additional properties in summer 2026.



We are hiring our first full-time remote Operations Coordinator. This is a long-term role for someone who moves comfortably between hospitality communication, visual content, and financial detail.



Schedule:

Monday – Friday, 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Philippine Time

(covers UK overnight/early morning batch work)

Fixed daytime shift. No night work.



Compensation:



$750 – $900 / month (based on experience)

Monthly salary, paid via Wise on the 15th of each month

13th-month pay after 12 months

Bump in Salary after finishing 90 Day probation period



Core Responsibilities:



1. Guest Operations & Communication (35%)



Batch-process overnight guest inquiries across WhatsApp,
, Airbnb, 
, 
, Expedia, and Hopper dashboards before UK business hours begin.

Prepare daily check-in packs for arriving guests: lockbox codes, WiFi details, transport guidance for Greenwich, Southwark, Lambeth, and Beckton.

Schedule cleaners and linen services via Guesty and Breezeway; monitor turnover completion and flag delays.

Respond to guest reviews within 24 hours on all platforms.

Build and maintain FAQ documentation and SOPs to reduce repeat inquiries.

2. Financial Reconciliation & Admin (25%)



Weekly reconciliation of Stripe and ChargeAutomation payouts against Guesty reservation records.

Track OTA commission deductions across 
, Expedia, Airbnb, and Siteminder; flag discrepancies.

Log and categorise operational expenses (cleaning, linen, maintenance) in Zoho Books.

Process supplier invoices and prepare monthly summary reports for founder review.

Maintain accurate records for UK accountant handover.



3. Social Media & Content Creation (25%)



Produce 3 Instagram posts per week showcasing our properties and neighbourhoods: Greenwich, Southwark, Lambeth, and Beckton.

Write captions in a boutique, warm tone — polished, never corporate.

Curate and lightly edit property photos using Mac-native or Canva tools for consistent luxury presentation.

Manage Instagram Stories and engagement during your shift.

Develop reusable neighbourhood guides for each property location.



4. Quality Control & Listing Optimisation (15%)



Audit OTA listings monthly across 
, Airbnb, 
, Expedia, and Hopper for photo quality, description accuracy, and amenity completeness.

Flag visual content or copy that does not meet luxury standards; request replacements where needed.

Sanity-check PriceLabs pricing outputs for obvious errors or anomalies.

Update internal SOPs and documentation in Zoho Projects as processes evolve.

Non-Negotiable Requirements:



Macintosh computer (MacBook or iMac) as your sole work device. Screenshot proof required.

Full-time availability: Monday–Friday, 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM PHT. No other employment.

Written English: Impeccable grammar, British spelling preferred. Warm, precise, adaptable tone.

Numerical accuracy: You work cleanly in spreadsheets. You spot discrepancies without being asked.

Visual judgment: You can articulate why one interior photograph looks "luxury" and another looks "budget."

Instruction discipline: You follow documented SOPs exactly. You confirm before improvising.

Internet & Power: 25+ Mbps, backup power source, quiet private workspace.



Experience: At least ONE of the following must be true:

2+ years in hospitality, property management, or luxury customer service.

1+ year in bookkeeping, reconciliation, or financial administration.

1+ year managing social media for lifestyle, property, or hospitality brands.

Proven advanced fluency with property or operations platforms such as Guesty, Breezeway, Zoho One, PriceLabs, or ChargeAutomation.



Not For You If:



You need part-time or flexible hours.

You work primarily on Windows.

You describe yourself as "not a numbers person."

You have never worked a fixed full-time remote schedule before.



How to Apply — Follow Exactly

Applications missing any step below will be deleted unread. This is your first test.



1. Subject line:

London Luxury VA - [Your Full Name]



2. Paragraph 1 — Your hospitality eye:

Tell us about your favorite hotel or Airbnb stay and what made it memorable. What did the host or staff do that impressed you? (We want to see how you think about hospitality.)



3. Paragraph 2 — Attention to detail:

Explain why you're interested in this role specifically. Include the word "Greenwich" naturally somewhere in this paragraph.



4. Paragraph 3 — Availability & Logistics:

Confirm your full-time availability (Monday–Friday, 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Philippine Time). State your exact available hours in UK time. Confirm your Mac model/year, your internet speed, and your backup power arrangement.



5. Voice Recording:

Record a 2-minute response to this scenario: "It's 8pm on a Friday. A guest messages: 'I just arrived and I can't find the WiFi password anywhere! I have a work call in 30 minutes and I'm really stressed. This is ridiculous!' How would you respond?"

Upload to 
 (free, no signup needed) and include the link in your application.



6. Work Sample A (Writing):

Attach or link to one social media caption you have written for a lifestyle, travel, or property brand. If none exists, write an original caption (maximum 80 words) for a luxury two-bedroom apartment in Greenwich with Thames views.



7. Work Sample B (Numbers):

Attach a screenshot of a spreadsheet you have built to track expenses, bookings, schedules, or similar. If none exists, create a mock 5-row tracker showing: Date, Supplier, Property (Greenwich / Southwark / Lambeth / Beckton), Category, Amount, Payment Status.



8. Proof:

Attach a screenshot from 
 showing your internet speed AND your Mac "About This Mac" screen.

title: Medical Billing & Virtual Assistant Position
description:
About Us:

We are a USA-based Internal Medicine (Primary Care) clinic looking to add a highly skilled, remote Medical Biller and Virtual Assistant to our team. We are seeking an applicant with at least 2–5 years of experience in true full-cycle medical billing (not simply posting payments) who can also provide excellent remote administrative support to our patients and providers. 



---



Key Responsibilities: Medical Billing & Revenue Cycle



Claims Processing & Submission:

Prepare and submit medical claims for reimbursement to insurance companies, Medicare, Medicaid, and other payers, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and compliance with billing regulations and guidelines.



Prior Authorizations (Medications & Procedures):

Initiate, submit, and track prior authorizations for prescription medications (e.g., using Cover
ds), imaging/radiology, and medical procedures. Gather necessary clinical documentation from the provider's notes to support authorization requests, follow up persistently with insurance carriers, and assist in navigating prior auth denials or scheduling peer-to-peer reviews.



Insurance Verification:

Verify insurance coverage, eligibility, and benefits for active patients to ensure services will be covered prior to their visit.



Billing Inquiries & Resolution:

Respond to billing inquiries from patients, insurance companies, and healthcare providers. Research claim status, resolve billing discrepancies, and communicate effectively to ensure timely payment.



Coding & Documentation:

Assign appropriate medical codes to diagnoses, procedures, and services using ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS code sets. Ensure accuracy and compliance with regulatory guidelines.



Revenue Cycle Management (RCM):

Monitor and track the status of medical claims. Identify, research, and resolve claim denials, rejections, and unpaid claims. Follow up with payers to appeal denied claims.



Patient Billing & Collections:

Generate patient statements, invoices, and bills. Review accounts receivable balances and follow up on outstanding patient balances to minimize bad debt.



EHR & Software Management:  

Utilize eClinicalWorks (eCW) and TriZetto to input, update, and securely manage patient demographics, insurance details, and billing records. 



Compliance:

Maintain up-to-date knowledge of healthcare billing regulations, coding guidelines, and payer policies.



---



Key Responsibilities: Virtual Assistant





Patient Communication:

Act as the first point of contact for remote inquiries. Answer inbound phone calls professionally, address non-clinical patient questions, and triage clinical questions to the appropriate medical staff.



Schedule Management:

 Manage the provider calendar by scheduling, rescheduling, and canceling appointments. Send out patient appointment reminders and manage the clinic's waitlist to ensure a full schedule.



Care Coordination & Referrals:

 Coordinate outbound specialist referrals for primary care patients, ensuring the receiving specialist has the necessary medical records and approved authorizations.



Pharmacy Coordination:

 Assist in routing prescription refill requests to providers, communicating with pharmacies regarding out-of-stock medications, and answering patient questions about prescription statuses.



Pre-Visit Preparation:

Ensure all patient demographic and insurance information is fully updated in the EHR prior to their scheduled appointment. 



Administrative & Inbox Support:

 Monitor the clinic’s general
, e-fax, or EHR inbox. Attach incoming documents, lab results, and records securely to the correct patient charts.



Telehealth Support:

 Send telehealth links to patients and assist them with basic onboarding or troubleshooting for their virtual visits.



---



Skill Requirements & Qualifications





Experience:

 2–5 years of dedicated medical billing and prior authorization experience. Must be familiar with eClinicalWorks and TriZetto.

 Experience with prior auth portals (like Cover
ds, Availity, or Evicore) is highly preferred.



Medical Billing Knowledge:

 Strong understanding of medical billing procedures, terminology, coding systems (ICD-10, CPT, HCPCS), and insurance billing regulations to optimize reimbursement.



Attention to Detail:

Meticulous in reviewing, coding, processing claims, and submitting clinical documentation for auths, ensuring absolute accuracy and compliance.



Analytical Skills:

Ability to analyze billing data, identify trends or patterns in claim denials, and resolve discrepancies to maximize revenue.



Problem-Solving Abilities:

Proactive in researching and resolving billing inquiries, claim denials, authorization rejections, and reimbursement issues efficiently.



Communication & Customer Service:

 Excellent verbal and written communication skills. Ability to interact with patients, pharmacies, insurance representatives, and healthcare providers clearly, professionally, and empathetically.



Multitasking & Time Management:

Highly organized with the ability to seamlessly pivot between heads-down billing tasks, navigating insurance portals, and patient-facing virtual assistant duties.



Computer Proficiency:

 Highly proficient in EHR systems, medical billing software, and standard office productivity tools.

title: Legal Assistant
description:

THIS IS A PART-TIME TO FULLTIME ROLE (will start as part-time for 60-90 days then transition to fulltime)!



We’re looking for a Senior Web Developer to join our dev team. You thrive building beautiful, high-performing websites and digital experiences for top-tier brands. You can lead multiple projects, mentor other developers, and communicate clearly with clients while still getting deep in the code when needed.



RESPONSIBILITIES: 



In this role, you'll get to...



lead development of WordPress using ACF, custom blocks, Twig templating, custom post types, and block-based themes, with performance, accessibility, SEO, and high-quality execution built in

build projects with headless CMS platforms like Contentful, Storyblok, or WordPress as a headless backend, leveraging REST API or GraphQL, and using frontend frameworks like Next.js or Nuxt.js with headless architectures

create pixel-perfect, fully functioning frontends using Tailwind CSS, GSAP , and other modern frontend technologies, ensuring responsive, interactive, and high-performance experiences

integrate backend systems, APIs, CRMs, marketing automation (Salesforce, Marketo, HubSpot, careers platforms), AI tools, and eCommerce solutions

own CI/CD workflows and deploy sites across Vercel, Netlify, AWS, Kinsta, and WP Engine, including edge/CDN optimizations

serve as a primary technical point of contact for internal teams (PM, design, SEO) and clients, translating complex ideas into clear recommendations

mentor junior developers and provide technical leadership across multiple projects

collaborate using Figma, Slack, Teamwork, and Pastel to bring designs to life efficiently

perform other ad hoc duties related to the role as assigned

REQUIREMENTS: 



On day one, we'll expect you to...



have 7+ years of web development experience, ideally in agency environments

have strong full-stack expertise, comfortable with both frontend and backend

have deep knowledge of modern WordPress, headless CMS, Next.js or Nuxt.js, Tailwind, GSAP, CI/CD, deployments, and integrations

have proven experience leading multiple projects and teams, with excellent client-facing communication

have hands-on experience with API integrations, marketing automation, AI tools, eCommerce, SEO, security, and DevOps

be detail-oriented, proactive, and capable of translating technical decisions into actionable solutions

be open to part-time to fulltime opportunity

have a fully functional and up-to-date computer with which to perform duties

be willing to install next-generation endpoint protection on the computer

be willing to work in US Pacific time zone (8:00am-5:00pm PST) corresponding to 12:00am -9:00am PH time

be a current resident of the Philippines and legally able to perform work from there

What separates the best from the rest:



advanced GSAP/ animations experience

mentorship, client management, and cross-team collaboration experience

experience optimizing performance, accessibility, SEO, security, and DevOps at scale

Edge and CDN strategy experience for modern web projects

NOTES:



Benefits await full-time contractors. 

This is a remote (work from home) position.

1. COPY & PASTE this link to your browser:

We will reach out to you via
 using our system!

Thank you!

title: Productivity Lead - Ecommerce/Marketing
description:
Productivity Lead (Ecommerce Operations – Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, TikTok Shop) – Detail-Oriented, Technical, Growth-Focused



We are looking for a highly skilled Productivity Lead to take full ownership of our multi-platform ecommerce operations. You will lead a team of  5-8 remote VA's.  You will be responsible for ensuring our stores are set up correctly, optimized for conversion, and operating efficiently across Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, and TikTok Shop.



You need more than surface-level experience for this role—you must understand the full eCommerce and marketing lifecycle from product setup to post-purchase optimization. This position requires someone who is highly detail-oriented, technically skilled, and capable of thinking critically under pressure. You will be expected to identify gaps, troubleshoot issues across platforms, and implement effective solutions without constant oversight.



In addition, you must have a strong understanding of brand voice and overall vision. You should be able to ensure consistency across all platforms—Shopify, Etsy, Amazon, TikTok, and marketing channels—so that every product listing, piece of content, and customer interaction aligns with the company’s identity and positioning.



Success in this role means continuously improving store performance, optimizing workflows, maintaining brand integrity, and driving measurable results across all channels.



Role Overview



You will manage the backend setup, product listings, design coordination, and marketing execution across all platforms. Your goal is to ensure consistency, accuracy, and growth.



You should be comfortable working independently, making decisions, and building systems that improve efficiency and scalability.



***************Key Responsibilities****************

Set up and manage product listings across Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, and TikTok Shop

Ensure all product data is accurate and consistent across platforms (titles, descriptions, SKUs, pricing, images)

Optimize listings for SEO and conversion on each platform

Build and manage Amazon A+ Content, ensuring strong visual storytelling and brand consistency

Work with graphics (or create them) to ensure high-converting product images and content

Manage Shopify backend including themes, apps, and basic customizations

Troubleshoot technical issues and improve store performance (speed, UX, app conflicts)

Audit listings and stores regularly to catch and fix errors

Assist with marketing and advertising strategies across platforms (Amazon PPC, TikTok, Meta, etc.)

Monitor performance metrics and identify opportunities for growth

Create and maintain SOPs for ongoing operations



**************Required Skills & Experience**************



Strong experience with Shopify backend (themes, apps, basic development understanding)

Experience managing Amazon, Etsy, and TikTok Shop listings

Understanding of Amazon A+ Content and listing optimization

Strong attention to detail (this will be tested)

Ability to troubleshoot and solve problems independently

Experience with product research, SEO, and conversion optimization

Familiarity with design tools (Photoshop, Canva, or similar)

Understanding of ecommerce marketing metrics (CTR, conversion rate, ROAS, CAC)

Strong written and verbal English communication

Highly organized, dependable, and proactive



*************Compensation & Schedule***********************



Starting rate: $4 per hour with an increase to $5 after 90 day trial period 

Hours: 25–40 hours per week depending on workload

Long-term opportunity with growth potential for the right candidate

Schedule: Overnight (Philippine Time, aligned with U.S. hours)  9:00PM to 3:00 AM PHP Time 

Work Setup: Remote (Philippines-based preferred)

Pay: Starting at $4.00/hour (based on experience), paid weekly via Wise

Start Date: ASAP

Requirements: NDA, contract agreement, TimeProof tracking, and daily EOD reports



************************Work Requirements************************

Daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports required (for both personal work and team oversight)

Strong English communication (written and verbal)

Stable internet connection

Ability to manage both tasks and tea
mbers effectively





**************************HOW TO APPLY**************************



Submit the following:



: 

*Send the link to your OLJ profile

*the OLJ link to the job you are applying for

*Resume

*portfolio

*Graphic design samples (mockups, product images, or similar work) ( If applicable to the position) 

* A LOOM video introduction about yourself and why you're best suited for the position, provide details about your past experience 

* Verification that you agree to the job requirements, including salary, NDA, payment via Wise, and working hours

* Include your availability dates for the interview and start if selected





Please note we will not consider applications that do not follow the application process - this is the first test of your attention to detail.

This is an immediate hire position. If the job is still posted we are still interviewing and hiring.

title: TikTok Affiliate Coordinator | Hiring ASAP!
description:
We need someone who’s built this before — not someone we have to teach from scratch.



Full-time · Remote (Philippines-based) · TikTok Shop · $5-6/hr USD



THE ROLE:

We’re launching a TikTok Shop affiliate program and need someone who has done this before — end to end. You’ve managed creator outreach at volume, coordinated samples, chased spark codes, and kept a CRM clean. You know the rhythm of a TikTok Shop affiliate program because you’ve lived it. You won’t need hand-holding on what to do next.



If you have not worked directly inside a TikTok Shop affiliate program, this role is not the right fit. That experience is the baseline, not a bonus.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

– Source and recruit TikTok Shop creators daily — filtering by GMV, niche, and content performance to find the right fit for the brand

– Run high-volume outreach via TikTok DMs,
, and collab invites — writing messages that actually get replies, not copy-paste blasts

– Coordinate samples end-to-end — who’s getting what, confirming delivery, and following up until the video is live

– Collect spark codes from top-performing videos and submit whitelisting requests so content can run as paid ads

– Keep the CRM clean — every creator tracked, every follow-up logged, nothing slipping through the cracks

– Monitor live content for brand compliance and flag anything that needs review

– Pull weekly performance data — GMV, content volume, outreach conversion, creator count — and deliver a clean report on schedule

– Flag top performers each week so the right ones get escalated into incentive tiers

– Help run creator contests and leaderboards — tracking participation, submissions, and payouts



REQUIREMENTS (MUST HAVE):

– Direct experience running or supporting a TikTok Shop affiliate program — you’ve sourced creators, managed outreach, and coordinated samples in this specific ecosystem

– High-volume outreach experience — you’ve worked a large pipeline and know how to keep it moving without things falling apart

– Strong written English — your outreach reads like a person, not a template

– Obsessive follow-through — you don’t wait to be reminded, you close the loop yourself

– Comfortable with data — pulling numbers, organizing a spreadsheet, delivering a clean weekly report on time



BIG PLUS:

– Experience with Euka — if you’ve used it, say so upfront, it matters

– Familiarity with spark ad workflows and whitelisting

– Worked inside a creator CRM like Euka or similar

– Run or assisted with GMV-based creator contests or incentive programs



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

– You’re sourcing and messaging creators from day one — no ramp-up period needed on

the basics

– Samples are tracked, content is going live, and spark codes are flowing within the first two

weeks

– A clean weekly report lands on time every week without being asked for

– Top creators are identified and escalated — you’re not just executing, you’re paying

attention



HOW TO APPLY:

Please submit your resume via Google Drive link to be CONSIDERED for this position.

title: Email Marketing Specialist
description:
About DreamCare

DreamCare is a Dutch DTC sleep brand. Our flagship product is an anti-snoring mouthpiece — the best-selling one in the Netherlands. We sell primarily through our own webshop and run paid ads as our main acquisition channel.

We have an active Klaviyo account with flows and a list of ~7,600 engaged profiles (NL/BE).
 is currently underutilized. We want to change that — and we need someone who knows exactly how.



What you will own

You take full ownership of our Klaviyo account. That means:

Managing and optimizing all active flows (welcome series, post-purchase, abandoned cart, winback, and more)

Building new flows where gaps exist

Planning and sending campaigns — we will inform you of upcoming actions around key dates and periods so you can respond to these

Segmentation — making sure the right message goes to the right person

Monitoring performance and reporting key metrics

Writing copy in English first, then translating to Dutch using AI tools. We prefer candidates who work with Claude as their primary AI tool.



What we are looking for

Proven experience with Klaviyo in a DTC or e-commerce context

Understands
 marketing fundamentals: flows, segmentation, deliverability, A/B testing

Data-driven — you make decisions based on what the numbers say

Takes ownership without needing constant direction

Comfortable using AI tools for copy and translation

Communicates clearly in English



Important context

DreamCare sells a product with a low repeat purchase rate — most customers buy once. This means
 is not primarily a retention channel for us. It is a brandbuilding, upsell, and awareness channel. We want to keep customers engaged, introduce them to add-on products, and build long-term brand affinity.

We focus on NL/BE for now. Other markets are early stage and not a priority.



How this works

We do not set a fixed number of hours or a fixed rate upfront. We want to hear from you.

As part of your application, we ask you to do a short audit of our Klaviyo account (access will be provided). Based on that audit, tell us:

What you see as the biggest opportunities

What you would prioritize in the first 30 days

How many hours per week you think this requires

What revenue impact you realistically expect to generate

The best audit wins the role. We are looking for someone who can think and execute — not just manage a tool.



How to apply

Send a short intro and tell us about your Klaviyo experience — what brands have you worked with and what results have you achieved? If you have proof of results, feel free to share it.

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to do a Klaviyo audit of our account as the next step.

Applications without relevant Klaviyo experience will not be reviewed.



Learn more about DreamCare:

title: Performance Marketing Specialist (Google Ads Focus)
description:
About Us



FliteHouse (
) is a Canadian growth and revenue operations company.



We help businesses turn their sales and marketing playbooks into real execution — building systems that consistently generate leads, improve conversion, and scale performance over time.



Our focus is not just running campaigns, but creating structured, repeatable growth engines across paid acquisition, CRM, and funnel optimization.



About the Role



This is a mid-level role with real responsibility for campaign performance.



You will not just execute tasks — you will be expected to build, manage, and improve campaigns independently.



We are looking for someone who understands how paid acquisition actually drives results, not just how to set up campaigns.



This role is best suited for someone who has already managed campaigns independently and is looking to take more ownership and responsibility.



Google Ads will be your core focus, with opportunities to expand into Meta Ads, tracking, and funnel optimization.



What You Will Do

Google Ads (Primary Focus)

Build and launch well-structured Google Search campaigns from scratch

Own campaign structure (ad groups, keyword segmentation, match types)

Manage and continuously improve keyword strategy

Build and maintain negative keyword systems

Monitor performance and take ownership of optimization and improvements

Improve CTR, CPC, and conversion performance over time

Performance & Tracking

Validate and maintain conversion tracking (GA4, Google Ads)

Ensure data accuracy across campaigns and landing pages

Identify gaps in tracking and suggest improvements

Analyze performance data and provide clear optimization actions

Landing Pages & Funnel Alignment

Review landing pages for clarity, structure, and conversion logic

Ensure strong alignment between ads ? keywords ? landing pages

Coordinate updates and QA to improve conversion rates

Growth Support (Secondary)

Support Meta Ads campaigns when needed (nice to have)

Contribute ideas for improving lead quality and cost efficiency

Help identify opportunities to scale what is working



What We Are Looking For



Must-Have

At least 2+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads (Search campaigns)

Strong understanding of:

campaign structure

keyword strategy and match types

bidding and performance optimization

negative keywords

Ability to analyze performance and make improvements independently

High attention to detail (you catch issues before they become problems)

Ability to follow structured processes while thinking critically

Reliable execution and strong sense of ownership

Clear written English



Strong Plus

Experience with Meta Ads

Experience with GA4 and conversion tracking setup

Experience working with landing pages or CRO

Familiarity with HubSpot or other CRM systems

Experience in an agency or performance marketing environment



How We Measure Success



Success in this role means:



Campaigns are structured correctly from the start

Minimal errors in setup, tracking, and execution

Performance improves consistently over time

You can identify and fix problems without constant supervision

Work requires minimal revisions and rework

You proactively suggest improvements, not just execute assigned tasks



Work Setup

Fully remote

Flexible hours

Some overlap with North America preferred

20–40 hours per week

Contractor role



IMPORTANT – Application Instructions



To apply, please:



Describe your experience with Google Ads (Search campaigns)

(Optional) Share your experience with Meta Ads



Answer this question:

“What are negative keywords, and how do they impact campaign performance?”

Include the word FLITEHOUSE in your subject line

title: Senior PHP Developer
description:
Senior PHP Developer

Job Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior PHP Developer to join our dynamic team. The ideal

candidate will be responsible for developing, implementing, and maintaining scalable and

efficient software solutions. As a Senior PHP Developer, you will collaborate with

cross-functional teams, mentor junior developers, and contribute to system architecture and

design.



To excel in this role, you should have strong analytical skills, a problem-solving mindset, and a

passion for coding. You must be comfortable working in a fast-paced environment while

ensuring high-quality deliverables that align with business goals. You must be able to have

outside-of-the-box thinking and be able to communicate ideas across various types of expertise.



Key Responsibilities

? Software Development & Coding

? Write, test, and maintain high-quality PHP code.

? Design and implement robust, scalable, and secure web applications.

? Collaborate with front-end developers to integrate user-facing elements.

? Familiar with frameworks such as Yii2.

? Provide guidance and mentorship to junior developers.

? Promote best coding practices, including object-oriented programming (OOP).

? Architecture & System Design

? Develop and maintain APIs (REST/SOAP) and integrations with third-party

services.

? Optimize databases (MySQL, MongoDB) for performance and scalability.

? Implement and maintain cloud-based solutions (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure).

? Collaboration & Continuous Improvement

? Work closely with product managers, designers, and stakeholders to define

technical requirements.

? Work closely with CTO to help manage expectations and run product

development, release and production cycle.

? Stay updated on emerging industry trends, frameworks, and technologies.

? Participate in Agile (Scrum) development cycles, including sprint planning and

code reviews.

? Maintain clear documentation and promote transparency across teams.

Qualifications & Skills

Required:

? 4+ years of experience in PHP development.

? Strong expertise in Object-Oriented PHP programming and frameworks like Yii/Yii2 or

Laravel.

? Experience with MySQL, MongoDB, JavaScript, jQuery, OOP, REST/SOAP APIs,

XML/JSON.

? Familiarity with Continuous Integration.

added.

? Version control experience with SVN/GIT.

? Familiarity with NetBeans, AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure.

? Knowledge of Linux/Ubuntu system administration.

? Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

? Ability to multitask and prioritize workloads in a fast-paced environment.

? Experience working in Agile (Scrum) teams.

? Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

Preferred:

? Experience in microservices architecture.

? Understanding of DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines.

? Familiarity with modern front-end frameworks (React, Vue.js, or Angular).

? Familiarity with Mongo and AWS.

title: AI Marketing Specialist
description:
Who We Are



Elya Consulting, also known as The Digital Doula, is a done-for-you systems agency. We build the back-end tech and marketing infrastructure that purpose-driven businesses need to grow without burning out their founders. Our clients come to us because they are ready to stop duct-taping their operations together and start running on systems that actually work.



This role sits at the center of that work, and it is worth being direct about what it is and what it is not.



This is not a social media manager position. We are not looking for someone to schedule posts, write captions, or manage a content calendar in the traditional sense. We are looking for someone who builds marketing infrastructure: automated content pipelines,
 nurture sequences, lead magnets, ad creative at scale, and systems that turn existing content into distribution assets. The output of this role is always a system or a finished asset, not just a post.



If you have been waiting for a role that lets you think strategically, write well, work autonomously, and use AI the way it was actually meant to be used, this might be it.



What You Will Own



You will be responsible for building the marketing backbone that keeps our clients visible and growing, even when they are not actively creating new content.



Taking a client's existing long-form content, whether that is a podcast library, a video archive, or a folder of raw transcripts, and building out full distribution systems from it.
 sequences, lead magnets, ad copy, social assets, and nurture flows all come from what already exists.



Designing and building AI-assisted content pipelines so clients are never starting from scratch. The goal is a client who has a sustainable content engine, not one who depends on a single person to manually produce everything.



Writing and testing ad creative at volume. You will produce multiple variations, think through angles and audiences, and iterate based on what the data tells you, without needing a full creative team behind you.



Writing
 sequences that sound like the client. Not generic. Not templated. You will get inside their voice, their offer, and their audience, and you will write copy that moves people.



Building and positioning lead magnets and quiz result copy that do actual conversion work, not just list-building for its own sake.



Connecting content strategy to sales outcomes. Every asset you build should have a clear place in the funnel and a clear reason for existing.



What We Are Looking For



The most important thing is how you think. You are someone who looks at a client's content library and immediately sees five ways to activate it. You do not wait to be assigned tasks. You identify the opportunity, build the plan, and bring it to the table.



Beyond that, we are looking for:



Strong writing ability. AI handles volume, but the judgment, voice-matching, and strategic thinking still have to be yours. You need to be able to write clearly, persuasively, and in someone else's voice when the work calls for it.



Real experience building marketing systems, not just executing individual campaigns. You understand how content,
, and ads connect to each other and to the bottom of the funnel.



Comfort working directly with clients and business owners. You will ask good questions, synthesize what you learn quickly, and turn it into a plan without needing a lot of back-and-forth.



An organized, documented way of working. The systems you build should be handoff-ready. Other people on the team need to understand what you built and why.



AI Fluency: A Separate Note



We want to be specific about this because fluency in AI tools is a real requirement for this role, not a nice-to-have.



You should already be using AI tools daily in your actual work, not experimenting with them occasionally. You should know the current landscape well enough to have opinions: what tools are worth the hype, what is being overstated, what actually saves time in a real workflow, and what creates more problems than it solves. You should be testing things before they are mainstream and applying what you learn to client work, not waiting for someone to send you a tutorial.



The expectation is not that you know every tool. The expectation is that you are genuinely embedded in this space, that you build AI-assisted workflows rather than one-off prompts, and that you can articulate clearly why a particular approach works for a particular outcome.



If AI fluency is something you are still developing, this is not the right fit yet.



What This Role Is Not



This is a fast-moving agency. Priorities shift, client needs evolve, and the work requires someone who can adapt without getting derailed. There is creative freedom here, but it lives inside a structure that is accountable to client outcomes.



There is no hand-holding. Onboarding will orient you, but from there you are expected to operate independently, ask clear questions when you are stuck, and figure things out without waiting to be walked through every step.



If you thrive with clear outcomes, loose structure, and a lot of ownership, this will feel like the right kind of challenge. If you need a lot of direction and check-ins to do your best work, it probably is not the right fit.



How to Apply



Send us a short Loom video, under three minutes, showing us a piece of marketing you built or a content system you created using AI. Walk us through what it was, why you made the choices you made, and what the outcome was. We are not looking for polish. We are looking for how you think.



Written applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



Compensation



$7–$10/hr USD depending on experience



Please Apply Here:
